| | Happy Thanksgiving to you, one and all! I can't believe that roughly a year ago, I actually came to the decision to throw my hat into the ring for this Congressional seat race. As it was, we were dealing with nearly a year of Covid and all the tragedy, concern and confusion we had already experienced. The horror of it attacking so many and tragically taking so many, including the seemingly healthy. The disconnection we had become accustomed to with social distancing and remote learning for the kids in school. The idea that vaccines were on the way and the hope they would instill for getting back to "normal" one day. And of course, we had just been through a historic presidential election, with the highest number of voters casting their ballots than ever before.
---
| | Yet, in the wake of both tragedy and triumph, I saw something I never thought I would. An attack on the very democratic institutions and principles we claim to hold so dearly. By a sitting president, who had already cried foul long before a single vote was cast. By his supporters, with little regard for facts and figures, only for the feeling of losing what they thought would be an easy victory. I also saw Democrats in the House lose seats; challenging but not overcoming their majority. This last one was like a bucket of ice water over my head because knowing that if we didn't keep the House majority, we'd be mired in inaction and obstruction, as the country creeped further backwards. I wanted us to progress forward. I knew the 3rd District, my home, was a flippable seat. I saw a moment in my mind and decided that I had to act. Looking back on this year and seeing the ever continuing difficulty we've faced in dealing with the variants of Covid. Learning that too many were willing to throw their hands up or even outright fight against facing this public health emergency together because of some perception of freedoms that only account for a selfish view and not a societal one. Seeing the resilience of kids in dealing with getting back to school and the easily predicted shutdowns that would come with positive cases and potential exposures. Seeing the perpetuation of the Big Lie fully twelve months after the November 2020 election. So what am I thankful for a year later?
---
| | Obviously for my wife, Amber, as well as our kids; Briana, Braydon, Brynlee and our sweet Addison, who was only with us for a moment in the vastness of time. I'm thankful for my family and friends; here, across the country and around the globe. I'm thankful for the health of those I know and don't know because of actions taken, medicines developed and lessons learned. And I'm thankful for you, who didn't know me before, yet are rallying behind me and our campaign with words of encouragement, active participation and donations. Grateful that I've seen people from all walks of life, inside and outside of District 3, stepping up to support me. I'm thankful for the hard work done by President Biden, VP Harris and so many members of Congress; who've rolled up their sleeves and done the hard work of continuing Covid relief, getting millions of shots in arms, passing the long overdue infrastructure bill and hopefully soon the Build Back Better Act. I'm grateful that civility has returned to the White House. I look forward to voting rights being protected further in federal law, hopefully soon, in the form of the John Lewis Voting Rights Act; strengthening the Voting Rights Act of 1965 that Mr. Lewis played a role in inspiring with his civil rights activism. And I am extremely thankful that our institutions held the line against the horror show of all that led up to January 6th. While Thanksgiving Day has faced critics and questions that are rooted in the past of our country; I think we can all agree that the tradition of gathering with family and friends, enjoying the bounty that life has given us, even in it's limited quantity for so many, is a good reason to have a day of thankfulness. That history belies the mythology that sprang up around the first "Thanksgiving" is not in doubt but neither is the fact that the sentiment of being grateful to be here is an extremely valid reason to celebrate. We can all have both a sincere understading of the history while still maintaining the holiday.

* Protect a [woman's bodily autonomy](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/49NrD6jnw/c?w=tj7RMt6rRCTswAEbkLstf_5nmGA_XisTga1igUgMsds.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3dhMDMiLCJyIjoiM2ZmNDY0NzAtMWFlZi00ZmVkLTI2YTktMzU0NDRiZTdkOTAyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0) with protected reproductive care, written into law.

**Let’s look at the facts:**

Xi forced Biden to meet for a virtual summit in the middle of the night that only benefitted the Chinese.

After Biden claimed that things were ‘strictly business’ between them and that they were not ‘old friends’, Xi opened the summit by greeting Biden as an “old friend.”

The summit was completely pro-China and Biden didn’t get his way on even one agenda item.

Biden failed to hold China accountable for genocide, the Hong Kong abomination, purposefully intimidating Taiwan, and global predatory economic activities hurting American families.

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Regarding Sunday’s Tragedy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
My thoughts and prayers are with everyone in Waukesha. A fund has been set up to help the individuals and families that are affected. If you are able, please consider donating.
Peter,**I was absolutely devastated when I heard the news. My thoughts and prayers are with the victims and their families.** It is absolutely heartbreaking to see this happen to our community. We don't yet know why this occurred, but justice must be served.**Please take this time to pray for the victims and their families. We cannot let this act of violence destroy our sense of safety and community.****[If you are able, please consider donating to the Waukesha County Community Foundation. All help is greatly appreciated and goes towards helping the families affected by this tragedy.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zgzik-idtjvlhlh-r/)** With heavy heart, Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Donate to the Waukesha County Community Foundation](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zgzik-idtjvlhlh-y/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zgzik-idtjvlhlh-j/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zgzik-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zgzik-idtjvlhlh-i/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zgzik-l-h) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

subject: Less than 200 Days Left!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JIMMY FREMGEN FOR CONGRESS**_
body:
Time's flying by and we're hard at work to make sure the people of Sacramento finally get the representation we need to thrive. | | |
---
| **Hey friend,**
---
| We have 196 days until Election Day. We launched this campaign a little over 5 months ago and time is absolutely flying. I could not be more inspired by those who I have met, and for those who continue to support our campaign. Over the last few months, we have raised enough money to get some serious momentum. I’ve been able to connect with thousands of people in Sacramento and across California - from speeches at events, to heart-to-heart conversations at rallies, to listening sessions with community organizers. I am so grateful for what we have been able to build together so far. And I can’t wait to see what we can continue to achieve together in these next crucial months. But in order to prepare for the road ahead, I need your help.
---
|
---
| |
**The people of Sacramento deserve better than barely getting by, and in order to keep fighting, this grassroots campaign needs your support. **

---
| [DONATE NOW](https://jimmyfremgen.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5d6ec865a0183dc1741ede23a&id=0c26c65eba&e=c4fbacefe0 "DONATE NOW")
---
|
---
| We’re fighting to end the era of career politicians that answer to corporate donors and Wall Street banks and leave the rest of us behind. **Every single donation matters** \- whether it’s $5 or $500. This campaign is about more than just each one of us individually, it’s about a movement to change the systems that put PACs, power games, and partisanship over people.

With me, you’ll see _**every**_****_**single**_****_**dollar**_ donated to this campaign going back to fighting alongside our community, amplifying the people most impacted by our government and its failures. So I’m asking you to join me.
---
|
---
| | **Make a donation today, and help me in this fight to end political dynasties that leave us behind. **
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://jimmyfremgen.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5d6ec865a0183dc1741ede23a&id=f8d5ad1bdb&e=c4fbacefe0 "DONATE NOW")
---
|
---
| **Thank you for being in this fight with me.**

---
| | **P.S.: Jimmy has pledged not to accept corporate PAC money, police union money, or fossil fuel money. Your donation empowers our work to keep the people most impacted at the forefront.**
---
|
---
| [DONATE TODAY & #JOINJIMMY](https://jimmyfremgen.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5d6ec865a0183dc1741ede23a&id=aab548c3e5&e=c4fbacefe0 "DONATE TODAY & #JOINJIMMY")

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: They HATE Your Freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58858996:6Kn6MU2N2:m:1:3253819041:E8DF4F5747F10AE6D9E1DC0229200496:r "Headline") Peter: I will never allow Nancy Pelosi to tell me what to do. I don't care how many times she threatens me, and I don't care how many times she fines me. I will not wear a face diaper - they do nothing to protect anyone. This, of course, forces Nancy to retire to her fainting couch in horror. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58858996:6Kn6MU2N2:m:1:3253819041:E8DF4F5747F10AE6D9E1DC0229200496:r "Nancy")**_Good. Angering Nancy Pelosi is the surest sign I know how to show I am on the right track.[If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to take actions that make her FURIOUS.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58858996:6Kn6MU2N2:m:1:3253819041:E8DF4F5747F10AE6D9E1DC0229200496:r "If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to
take actions that make her FURIOUS.")_** I was born in America, and I am free - my freedom is my birthright. That birthright is behind every vote I take in Congress, and I will never stop fighting for freedom. Sadly, for our nation, my commitment to our freedom makes me a target for so many powerful entities. **[I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58858996:6Kn6MU2N2:m:1:3253819041:E8DF4F5747F10AE6D9E1DC0229200496:r "I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict
your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.")** They HATE our freedom and our unwillingness to accept their socialist takeover. They HATED President Trump for fighting to protect it. They HATE me for continuing that work. And that HATE colors every decision they make, just as my love for America colors every decision I make to uphold our Constitution. I will not wear a mask simply because Nancy Pelosi and Anthony Fauci decreed it, and I won't stop fighting for this nation. We will make decisions about our "public safety," and we'll never allow the radical left to force their demands on us. **[Not when I have patriots like you on my team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58858996:6Kn6MU2N2:m:1:3253819041:E8DF4F5747F10AE6D9E1DC0229200496:r "Not when I have patriots like you on my team.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58858996:6Kn6MU2N2:m:1:3253819041:E8DF4F5747F10AE6D9E1DC0229200496:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

clean_body: "Headline" Peter: I will never allow Nancy Pelosi to tell me what to do. I don't care how many times she threatens me, and I don't care how many times she fines me. I will not wear a face diaper - they do nothing to protect anyone. This, of course, forces Nancy to retire to her fainting couch in horror. "Nancy"Good. Angering Nancy Pelosi is the surest sign I know how to show I am on the right track. "If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to take actions that make her FURIOUS." I was born in America, and I am free - my freedom is my birthright. That birthright is behind every vote I take in Congress, and I will never stop fighting for freedom. Sadly, for our nation, my commitment to our freedom makes me a target for so many powerful entities. "I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom." They HATE our freedom and our unwillingness to accept their socialist takeover. They HATED President Trump for fighting to protect it. They HATE me for continuing that work. And that HATE colors every decision they make, just as my love for America colors every decision I make to uphold our Constitution. I will not wear a mask simply because Nancy Pelosi and Anthony Fauci decreed it, and I won't stop fighting for this nation. We will make decisions about our "public safety," and we'll never allow the radical left to force their demands on us. "Not when I have patriots like you on my team." Thank you. God Bless America. "Marjorie Taylor Greene" Marjorie Taylor Greene Congresswoman (R-GA) | PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Biggest FREEDOM PARTY of 2021!
body:
Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a brand new event: AmericaFest 2021! This four-day event will be the largest co
_Sponsored message_
| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z1rlncqckdv7jvvi2vhhu51f5nu9j05nihiulm20_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or7cjh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqk8urj8p0hsf8mqpi70ac6v8cuja9m7d3ibipk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or7cjh2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z04csqcoq4b9u95jhdb1q5jgmr6sf378pnnneq9o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or7cjh2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztbf3akt6omkvf3htddv5pn4gogk2p6m4gpu9bfo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or7cjh2bs)**[?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z71qa94efrfoaus49l59q33ej5ue0t8bihtlptk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or7cjh2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zujmq9b94e814gl69qmfa0lq8eleichuvar08frg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or7cjh2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zu3ddhahp02mg41qce57bn58ujmtvikmi9u6q7vg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or7cjh2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zq55ql20harrrhufrbi5cqq8fkadqac25ge6qrgg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or7cjh2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zilab57rfp8fd8pp6m4rt1mu3208pno3bgll14g8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or7cjh2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfajah9ce9s2r5v3svcm81sqla5uo5j6nbs6cp2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or7cjh2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhvat51h58jg47hh0nma730g80n4obg1he6q4g48_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or7cjh2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4p6pgis4jds8r3s85unjj1suu9dpmb1s8gdl520_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or7cjh2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp3347qbni9hfe0qkcfe3gi6j02vs0pcn0idtklg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or7cjh2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2zetr6ai03pf7l1befc9p2tda5eri8id3mkc1g3bo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmvtg48f0tukvfjnkcrma66n4a67c7ooe255k6r8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or7cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: American Update
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8154%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Kb82s0lSB5QLq%2fd558VV1g&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18122%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xYmBwClGnsedigsT7vA%2bsw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18123%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Nnk7zJE%2bm9k97ipErdVmGQ&sysid=1) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18124%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yfEelTG7Ko3fw00lz5JGsw&sysid=1)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18135%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KOs6KHQnucZEtyYbiS8Q%2bw&sysid=1)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18135%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KOs6KHQnucZEtyYbiS8Q%2bw&sysid=1)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18136%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tBMXildB7AarfBUle1GBCg&sysid=1) today.** When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18137%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=c8yz1C0Vsce3TjFVG8g55g&sysid=1)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. clean_body: Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt. It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. The New York Times’ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” “Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.” Outrageous! The New York Times’ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas. Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our most urgent priority. Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective. Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. As The New York Times’ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible. And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline for you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission. Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people. You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” This free course is called “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called Imprimis , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. Imprimis is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the Wall Street Journal or the “fake news” New York Times. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set Imprimis apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an Imprimis subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year. Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. The response has been astounding. We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. So please complete the today. When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards, Bill Gray Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. No End in Sight on Higher Fuel Prices

The fuel prices continue to rise, and we're all facing larger bills to heat our homes this winter. Yet, we keep hearing that the Biden Administration is aware and willing to help. Still, Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm can't name a single thing Biden has done to lower fuel prices. Instead, they continue to ban oil and gas leasing on federal lands and talk of shutting down another pipeline.

subject: A dangerous ideology
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup

| | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgh5ika00sgshofrc3i5usm8a0mk93p4fdqd71eg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or4c1h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4t7jlkem5alsutq0iegsq2qc27nrcaqhtvusuio_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or4c1h2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhcboj6ve90bvr8ah4i73c7eh6cn90l7teo8246g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim8or4c1h2bs)
---

Larry P. Arnn

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: We all hate taxation! But there's a better way...
body:
| | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | No one likes paying taxes, Peter.

Personally, I believe we are over-taxed, immorally taxed, and I want to see the 16th Amendment (income tax) repealed and Jeffersonian taxation principles restored.

I know, I know... that sounds a little unrealistic. I get it, so please keep reading.

Don't get me wrong... taxes have their place.

But our government has abused its authority to tax us both, and it needs to be held accountable.

Progressive income taxes give absolutely zero incentive for us to strive to be, do, or have more. Because the more money we earn, the more we're punished by having to pay more.

And as business owners, the federal government forces us to become tax collectors against our will because they know if they had to go directly to each individual citizen, those citizens might vote differently.

So what would I like to see?

Personally, I'm a fan of indirect taxation and a flat tax.

It's less invasive and the percentage you pay never goes up, no matter how much money you earn.

HOWEVER...

Like I said a second ago, I also recognize that something like that just sounds like an unrealistic "pie in the sky" idea.

But what I can tell you is that I will vote down every bill that attempts to increase your taxes and will ALWAYS vote to decrease them.

What are your thoughts, Peter?
---
| | |
---
| | For Freedom,
---
| | |
---
| |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | No one likes paying taxes, Peter. Personally, I believe we are over-taxed, immorally taxed, and I want to see the 16th Amendment (income tax) repealed and Jeffersonian taxation principles restored. I know, I know... that sounds a little unrealistic. I get it, so please keep reading. Don't get me wrong... taxes have their place. But our government has abused its authority to tax us both, and it needs to be held accountable. Progressive income taxes give absolutely zero incentive for us to strive to be, do, or have more. Because the more money we earn, the more we're punished by having to pay more. And as business owners, the federal government forces us to become tax collectors against our will because they know if they had to go directly to each individual citizen, those citizens might vote differently. So what would I like to see? Personally, I'm a fan of indirect taxation and a flat tax. It's less invasive and the percentage you pay never goes up, no matter how much money you earn. HOWEVER... Like I said a second ago, I also recognize that something like that just sounds like an unrealistic "pie in the sky" idea. But what I can tell you is that I will vote down every bill that attempts to increase your taxes and will ALWAYS vote to decrease them. What are your thoughts, Peter? | | | | | For Freedom, | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Jameson Ellis For Congress, 206A S Loop 336 W #309, Conroe, TX 77304, United States

name: ICYMI News
subject: Euclid for YOU!
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zevt071fqeokf7a712tb03n234l59ent7668kc50_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctimaoj1chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z80p777vofq6gj36mhkgvva2b13ura82jdncd2o0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctimaoj1chh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zolftq76qemn6b9a41338fbkhmdg9q3lb2mqn4g0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctimaoj1chh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

No End in Sight on Higher Fuel Prices

The fuel prices continue to rise, and we're all facing larger bills to heat our homes this winter. Yet, we keep hearing that the Biden Administration is aware and willing to help. Still, Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm can't name a single thing Biden has done to lower fuel prices. Instead, they continue to ban oil and gas leasing on federal lands and talk of shutting down another pipeline.

At [CaucusRoom.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zta4uerdjsnc5kqpfifl1ulv8f29vasflv2kjmog_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctimeo36cdh2bs), members are free to discuss ideas, hold honest conversations and form their opinions without being overwhelmed or suppressed by the liberal bias inherent in Twitter, Facebook, and other platforms.

name: American Defense News
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsdeqhtt636cjt756f1kejugopdo41kam50p2n1g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim1o75c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sb56uqr0sj2mhin8olgshi7cc9he1in4p1m6urbcpdgm9o73d5icmobasrhmdjjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30sllmko74c36epibbcj7m2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh8v1a5onmvvolo0i2439442soqlubojn32nrepg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim1o75c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zah5g737929guts0821t0euu2j8umf84ummfk77g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim1o75c5h2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvv15q2galu73q8fn9r3n29cfdrd845gceh98dg0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim1o75c5h2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztqj3s3ln18c94uvs4t7g9smkbr50vcabsnrs040_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim1o75c5h2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhbt48271bff56q2ifi01793c13uoohp7eb1hd1g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim1o75c5h2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z52mvf91nqur3ac23bct00cmfaiefcuov49qiqv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim1o75c5h2bs) today.** When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd5420upkju68l3e095m6cpvc4j2l314c8jni1ag_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim1o75c5h2bs)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2z5078lmqsu5cd1cdciu7e8toa054cubkj7qdosfg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3jrbnrcahj29mgken3i2gr8a5v8jsl6va1fa9n8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctim1o75c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people. You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” This free course is called “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called Imprimis , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. Imprimis is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the Wall Street Journal or the “fake news” New York Times. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set Imprimis apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an Imprimis subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year. Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. The response has been astounding. We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. So please complete the today. When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards, Bill Gray Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty. If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

President Trump has endorsed our campaign and is ALL IN to help us win. Now he wants YOU to join us at a private reception at the Mar-a-Lago Club in December.

If you donate ANY AMOUNT right now, you'll be entered to WIN a ROUND TRIP TICKET, hotel stay, a ticket to the Reception at Mar-a-Lago, and a photo with ME!

You'll have a chance to join President Trump and other special guests like Heisman Trophy winners Pete Dawkins, Doug Flutie, Mike Garrett, and Johnny Rodgers; Country music artists Brian Kelley and Travis Tritt; MLB Hall of Fame baseball player Tom Glavine; and WWE Hall of Fame wrestler Ric Flair. **This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, Peter, and we hope to see you there!**

This is an exclusive event Peter, so don't hesitate in responding.

As one of our top supporters, we're hoping you'll respond to this email before the contest ends. The president is counting on hearing from YOU.
