name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: Thankful for YOU, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
| Hey, Peter. I don’t want to bother you while you’re spending time with friends and family, so I wanted to send you this quick note before the holiday. I have so much to be thankful for in the last few months on this campaign. **Thank you for reading our emails** , taking our surveys, and passing them on to your friends and family. **Thank you for showing up** to talk with me on our 95 County Tour — whether it was a small gathering of just a few people or one of our larger events, I so appreciate you giving me the chance to hear directly from you. **Thank you for your donations**. We say this all the time, but it really is true: Every dollar makes a difference, and just by [**giving what you’re able — $1 or $10 or $100 at a time**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38950636/317775079/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211123thanksgiving_JM_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjg0MGRjZi0yZTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eHVHDZoS8dJIPK1OAq7W5pIHorUKttZ3Doxy1Gmn7lU=) — you’re helping us build a grassroots movement that’s by and for Tennesseans. **Most of all, thank you for believing that there’s a better way forward** for our state, and for placing your trust in this doctor from Alabama who never imagined he’d be called on this moment. That trust is what keeps me going, and I (literally) wouldn’t be able to do it without you. I’m so proud to have you on our team as we buckle up for the next 11 months. Together, we’ll reclaim what is ours and bring dignity, compassion, and honesty back to the governorship. **And remember: Together, Tennessee thrives.** Thank you again, Dr. Jason Martin | [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38950639/317775089/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211123thanksgiving_JM_active_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjg0MGRjZi0yZTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eHVHDZoS8dJIPK1OAq7W5pIHorUKttZ3Doxy1Gmn7lU=)

name: American Update
subject: Euclid for YOU!
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8163%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=GRHk22vJX8V5na41JKG8QQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18139%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dTX8Gj%2fRcEnOMnyQEOG9xA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18130%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QrOZBWcfodTyQiUsrVr%2fHQ&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18131%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VlWuwUK%2fnuYIMER9AqJWEw&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8163%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=GRHk22vJX8V5na41JKG8QQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8163%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=GRHk22vJX8V5na41JKG8QQ&sysid=1)

name: The Wade Wave
subject: A day in the life!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem111721 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem111721] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Peter, we love finding new ways to show what goes on behind the scenes at Wade Wave HQ.
Click below to see a “Day in the Life” of Wade (yes, we’re on TikTok too!):
https://www.tiktok.com/@wadeherringforcongress/video/7032111509031374127?_t=8NT9OwmDCb8&_r=1 [https://www.tiktok.com/@wadeherringforcongress/video/7032111509031374127?_t=8NT9OwmDCb8&_r=1]
As you can see, Wade’s schedule is packed full and we are using every moment we can to spread our message across the First District.
We’re getting closer to the end of the month, and need your help to meet our November fundraising goal. Your support has been crucial to the first phase of this campaign, and now we’re ramping up our operations before the end of the year!
Can you take a moment to pitch in $25, $75, $150 or more to keep us on track? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=112421whem]
We hope you have the opportunity to enjoy Thanksgiving in the company of friends and family.
Have a safe & happy holiday,
The Wade Wave
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Support Wade [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem111721] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Wade Herring, lawyer and community volunteer, is running for Congress in Georgia’s First Congressional District. Wade grew up in Macon, Georgia. He has worked with the law firm of HunterMaclean since 1985. Among other volunteer positions, Wade has served as president of the Savannah Bar Association, chair of the trustees at Wesley Monumental United Methodist Church, and board member of Georgia Appleseed. Wade is a graduate of Dartmouth College and the University of Georgia School of Law.Wade lives in Savannah, Georgia with his wife Susan of 39 years. Wade and Susan are the parents of two children, a son who is a lawyer in Atlanta, and a daughter who is a doctor in Winston-Salem, North Carolina.
https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1 [https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1] https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1 [https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1] https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringga1/ [https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringga1/]
www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [http://www.WadeHerringForCongress.com] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: I’m Marjorie Taylor Greene’s first real opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38952228/317782040/-1739877693?refcode=20211124_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTBiZmI5Ni0zMDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CyFKk_7Z3tAtiVnZoxgHY4w9osgJR3-9YhUPIgj-9bY=) Friend, We all know about Marjorie Taylor Greene’s dangerous rhetoric and vile beliefs. **But did you know that she didn’t even have a Democratic opponent in 2020? The Democratic nominee dropped out months before the election.** **That all changes next year, because I’m a Democrat who’s running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene.** I’ve served this country on multiple continents, and I’m sick of watching Marjorie Taylor Greene fight to undermine our democracy and alienate us from the rest of the world. I’ll be honest: this isn’t going to be an easy mission. But my time in the service taught me that by working together and not giving up -- anything is possible. [**But, to do this, I’m asking you for help. Can you split a donation of $20 (or whatever you can afford) today between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC to help give my campaign the resources we need to fight back against Marjorie Taylor Greene’s lies and disinformation?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38952230/317782042/-68044773?refcode=20211124_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTBiZmI5Ni0zMDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CyFKk_7Z3tAtiVnZoxgHY4w9osgJR3-9YhUPIgj-9bY=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38952232/317782044/-1739877693?refcode=20211124_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTBiZmI5Ni0zMDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CyFKk_7Z3tAtiVnZoxgHY4w9osgJR3-9YhUPIgj-9bY=)

I am so proud and humbled to be a part of this historic campaign. I have a long history in this state and across the country in driving protections for the vulnerable, and I know Letitia is the changemaker New York needs to make this the best place for _everyone_ , not just the privileged and wealthy.

I joined this campaign because I am as passionate as Letitia about putting the concerns of everyday New Yorkers _first and foremost_ , every step of the way. **But we can't let every last New Yorker know that Letitia is the changemaker we need if we don't have your support – and we still have to make up a major shortfall in our fundraising goal before 11:59 p.m. tonight.****[Please, will you make a donation right now to help us reach our $15,000 fundraising goal to help us get this next chapter of Letitia's historic campaign off to a great start?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38952929/317784763/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk220-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTAzNDg0Zi0zMjRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kWb5Wc-B-jFRoxcMVB9EnULL_TmJbtEvijXE0If_dBw=)**

Gabby Seay

Friend,

It's hard to believe it's come to this. Earlier this month, at least 10 insurrectionists were elected to state and local office.

**While we're focused on building a democracy and an economy that works for everyone, the other side is sending QAnon conspiracy theorists to our state legislatures and local school boards.**

This is what I mean when I say our democracy is under attack. At every opportunity, they've continued spreading Donald Trump's "Big Lie," and that's exactly what led to the storming of the Capitol on Jan. 6th.

But friend, we can help put a stop to this anti-democratic nonsense, once and for all. I've sworn an oath to protect our Constitution three times -- as a Marine, a prosecutor, and a member of Congress -- and I will always keep that oath.

I hope I can count on your support.

**[The next stop for many of these newly-elected insurrectionists could very well be Congress -- the same institution they attacked on Jan. 6th. That's why we _have_ to win this Senate race, pass common-sense laws that protect voting rights and our elections, and protect our democracy from these attacks. Chip in to help us make it happen.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38953563/317787558/-922610241?refcode=em21_211124_insurrectionists&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWM0ZDkwMC0zMzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PiiU9vmP4ITMKESxfLoYPv8vIzltEzBxQxLmc0bYaWw=)**

This is the most-watched Senate race in the country, and I don't think it's a coincidence that Pennsylvania -- the birthplace of our democracy -- will be the one to turn things around and stop this anti-democratic wave we've seen from Donald Trump and the Republican Party.

And look, I know we have lots of other work to do, too: jobs, affordable healthcare, secure retirement, climate change...the list goes on. **But if we don't start with the preservation of our voting rights and elections, the GOP will do everything they can to make sure we never make __any__ progress.**

**[If we're going to win this fight, we need the grassroots support of Americans like you -- not big corporate PACs and special interests. clean_body: | = | = Friend, It's hard to believe it's come to this. Earlier this month, at least 10 insurrectionists were elected to state and local office. While we're focused on building a democracy and an economy that works for everyone, the other side is sending QAnon conspiracy theorists to our state legislatures and local school boards. This is what I mean when I say our democracy is under attack. At every opportunity, they've continued spreading Donald Trump's "Big Lie," and that's exactly what led to the storming of the Capitol on Jan. 6th. But friend, we can help put a stop to this anti-democratic nonsense, once and for all. I've sworn an oath to protect our Constitution three times -- as a Marine, a prosecutor, and a member of Congress -- and I will always keep that oath. I hope I can count on your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = This is the most-watched Senate race in the country, and I don't think it's a coincidence that Pennsylvania -- the birthplace of our democracy -- will be the one to turn things around and stop this anti-democratic wave we've seen from Donald Trump and the Republican Party. And look, I know we have lots of other work to do, too: jobs, affordable healthcare, secure retirement, climate change...the list goes on. But if we don't start with the preservation of our voting rights and elections, the GOP will do everything they can to make sure we never make any progress. = = Thanks for your support, friend. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38953832/317788747/-555147108?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGIxNmM4My0zMzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xv-BHhzdzBJbYm5pc4x-POzFj6IxKrWDLI1GpNtHPY=&emci=4343f4c5-c61b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=6db16c83-334d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686212) Hey Peter, thank you for joining our grassroots campaign!

My name is John Lira -- I’m a proud father, Texan, Marine Corps veteran, and Democrat. I was born and raised right here in Southeast San Antonio and now I’m running for Congress to bring our Texas values to Washington.

As the son of a working-class Mexican-American family, I've always been committed to serving our country. I served 11 years in the U.S. Marine Corps, including two combat tours in Iraq. When I returned to civilian life, I used the G.I. Bill to go back to school and ultimately earned a master’s degree in public policy.

Since then, I’ve focused on empowering community organizations to support veterans and military families. At the U.S. Small Business Administration, I helped to reverse the generational decline of veterans’ entrepreneurship, and at the National Commission on Military, National, and Public Service, I helped develop policies aimed at reviving an ethos of service in America.

Peter, the real work is just getting started, and we’re going to need your help. Together, we must deliver change for the people. I’m working hard to build a people-powered campaign to bring our Texas values to Congress, but I need to hear from you: **[What issues should I prioritize for this campaign? Take my priorities survey right now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38953833/317788748/-1025807589?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGIxNmM4My0zMzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xv-BHhzdzBJbYm5pc4x-POzFj6IxKrWDLI1GpNtHPY=&emci=4343f4c5-c61b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=6db16c83-334d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686212)**

Peter, Thanksgiving Dinner is going to be a lot more expensive than usual.****[**Almost every Thanksgiving dish**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/9c2923fbf6417753/051b440f84f4e4b1c3d6b838967d376c/36963) will cost more than last year.
* Green beans are up 10%.
* Russet potatoes are up 12%.
* And the price of an 8-16 pound turkey is up a whopping 26 cents more per pound.

**Peter, Biden’s reckless Big Government spending and failed socialist policies have led to a supply chain crisis and a severe labor shortage. And hard-working Americans are paying the price at the check-out line.** As your next Congressman, Casey will FIGHT to block Biden’s radical far-left agenda and get inflation under control. But he urgently needs your help to win this do-or-die battle for our nation’s future. Alabama and America literally can’t afford another two years of one-party Democrat rule. name: Freedom Caucus
subject: DOJ Whistleblower
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
To make America great again, we need to take the fight for America to the Left.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqec3ot874ihbjbfj9fp8qjeif455h86eh1lqlb0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cthm2oj2clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4oni6lgj4pj6c9r39ddkm1jrddhi6cpjeopke8qmcobhcoor2tr5mmor8otj6kr31puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75dr665obbcj7map6ccdgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
| |
---
We knew Attorney General Merrick Garland was an incompetent partisan, but _**new whistleblower evidence says Garland may be a criminal, too**_.

In October, we learned that the Biden White House conspired with woke special interests to sic the FBI on concerned parents and brand them **“domestic terrorists.”** Amid the public backlash against this abuse of power, Garland told Congress the Justice Department would never weaponize the Patriot Act to tyrannize parents in this way.

But now, a whistleblower inside DOJ has come forward with hard evidence contradicting Garland’s sworn testimony. **Documents show the FBI’s Counterterrorism Division (!) has indeed opened investigations, at Garland’s direction.** They are categorizing parents’ free speech with an FBI “threat tag.”

**[Please help the Freedom Caucus stop the lies now!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvbismbvk9i0ecu2m82umla0f34jr7dlmpngp9j0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cthm2oj2clh2bs)**

This is tyranny, plain and simple. That’s why they’re hiding it. That’s why Garland lied about it. The same people who opened our borders and ignited a national crime wave is cracking down on moms and dads defending their kids from racist propaganda and sexual predators.

Conservatives in the House Freedom Caucus are doing everything they can to unearth the truth and fight Garland’s abuse of power. But until we can win back the House, we cannot issue subpoenas or compel testimony, or finally reform our politicized Justice Department.

**[That’s where the House Freedom Fund comes in.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zc16agfuavld4mjmf7751fjrqcmcpavpg863cko0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cthm2oj2clh2bs)**

When – not if – Republicans win control of Congress next year, it won’t be enough to have another Democrat-lite majority. To make America great again, _**we need to take the fight for America to the Left.**_

Only principled, fighting conservatives can be trusted to finish the fight against Joe Biden’s socialist bullies. And only HFF will call out the Republican candidates not worth supporting. In the primaries, in the general election, and then in 2023, we will fight for you.

[**Click here to see our candidates.**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztbpqdji9grolrcur4chjvj6q5nvk1f04k8kfbbg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cthm2oj2clh2bs)

[**Click here to support our cause.**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zup2lusns4rovhgh09cmuclitdhg1otvi580pdrg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cthm2oj2clh2bs)

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing to much to fight for conservative leadership in Washington.

Sincerely,
Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund
|
---

**CANDIDATES**
|
---

|

|

I’m Jane Hope Hamilton, and I’m exploring a run for Congress in Texas’s 30th Congressional District. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38954664/317792223/889388569?contactdata=oARY9IqeYaeWuAJsHB%2FRGE2BBJyaOxDl4AjHEQCKuQR6iNbYwfV9H3nPLui3AXc9pyubdqkHKsieTv7GwkAKMwDxPAlRFwDyOsbfZ1l1tSpCI16Ze7RL7S3SukA%2B8fma7FQc95rVM3onuIeNTZpHljEnOrhBQlZzCaEBtLcet2c%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTgxMWE2OC0zNTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWW4SCnaGTVjeXcz84Q8eDE4vR9ZgoC_f5_6sMtYBAU=&emci=c0795f62-a4db-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=3e811a68-354d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686233)
[**Meet Jane →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38954666/317792224/889388569?contactdata=oARY9IqeYaeWuAJsHB%2FRGE2BBJyaOxDl4AjHEQCKuQR6iNbYwfV9H3nPLui3AXc9pyubdqkHKsieTv7GwkAKMwDxPAlRFwDyOsbfZ1l1tSpCI16Ze7RL7S3SukA%2B8fma7FQc95rVM3onuIeNTZpHljEnOrhBQlZzCaEBtLcet2c%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTgxMWE2OC0zNTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWW4SCnaGTVjeXcz84Q8eDE4vR9ZgoC_f5_6sMtYBAU=&emci=c0795f62-a4db-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=3e811a68-354d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686233) For nearly 30 years, we’ve had the experienced leadership of Congresswoman Eddie Bernice Johnson in Washington. Now, folks across the region are encouraging me to run for this seat -- because with so much on the line, it is our duty to make sure we continue toward progress. **I am a wife, a mother, a public servant, and a battle-tested activist.** I know what’s at stake, and I’ll be ready on day one to deliver for our communities. That’s why I’m starting early to build an inclusive, responsive, grassroots team. If I decide to run, I’ll do what I’ve done my whole life: Listen to people, not big donors, and fight for everyone, no matter their color, background, or zip code. **So Peter, are you in? clean_body: | Peter, thank you so much for joining the team! I’m Jane Hope Hamilton, and I’m exploring a run for Congress in Texas’s 30th Congressional District. For nearly 30 years, we’ve had the experienced leadership of Congresswoman Eddie Bernice Johnson in Washington. Now, folks across the region are encouraging me to run for this seat -- because with so much on the line, it is our duty to make sure we continue toward progress. I am a wife, a mother, a public servant, and a battle-tested activist. I know what’s at stake, and I’ll be ready on day one to deliver for our communities. That’s why I’m starting early to build an inclusive, responsive, grassroots team. name: Tom Perez
subject: This Thanksgiving
body:
As I get ready to sit down with my family to celebrate tomorrow, I can't help but feel grateful.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38956156/317800065/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDYzYmYzMy0zNzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l3_XvK18tItUBj0_m2ThUZ2dHhk4pZ-2Bgq-yMsLjC0=)

Happy (almost) Thanksgiving, Peter!

As I get ready to sit down with my family to celebrate tomorrow, I can't help but feel grateful.

I'm **grateful** for the scientists and researchers whose work enabled myself and so many others to gather safely and responsibly with friends and family this year.

I'm **humbled** by our workers and service members keeping us fed and safe, whose work requires them to take time away from their families during the holidays. My family is holding you especially close this week.

And **I'm thankful for you, team,** for your continued support and shared commitment to our progressive values. You've given the son of Dominican immigrants a chance to ensure _every_ Maryland family gets a fair shot, and I could not be more proud of what we've accomplished so far.

**While there's still work to be done, I take comfort and pride in knowing that you'll be by my side, fighting the good fight with me.**

Happy Thanksgiving, and thank you for your amazing support.

Tom

P.S. If you're able, please join me in **[donating to the Maryland Food Bank](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38956157/317800066/-532260280?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDYzYmYzMy0zNzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l3_XvK18tItUBj0_m2ThUZ2dHhk4pZ-2Bgq-yMsLjC0=)** to support Maryland families this Thanksgiving.
Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer.
Tom Perez for Maryland

TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389
United States

name: NextGen America
subject: Honoring Native American Heritage Month
body:
| | Friend, **This month is Native American Heritage Month, and here at NextGen America, we’re recognizing the leadership and contributions of Native American communities.** As we continue to fight for a truly representative democracy through accessible voting rights and a safer climate through environmental justice for clean water, air, and land,**it’s crucial that we remember how these issues disproportionately impact Indigenous communities across the country. ** Due to deliberate voter-suppression tactics and policies, such as**lack of information on how and where to register to vote,** **low levels of internet access** due to inadequate investments for Native communities, and **lack of polling places on Native land,** Native Americans have a much harder time casting their ballots. Over the centuries, Native Americans have been intentionally displaced into land that is now most susceptible to climate disruption. Severe heat, droughts threatening access to drinking water, and aggressive storms are quickly making Native land uninhabitable. **Despite these obstacles, Native Americans continue to be the leaders in the fight for a better future for us all.** In the 2020 election, **Native voters showed up in record numbers,** thanks to years of investment and work from Native people across the states. Native activists have led the fight for climate justice and a more inclusive future, helping secure major climate-resiliency and infrastructure investments in the Build Back Better Agenda and bipartisan infrastructure bill, including:
* Commitments to **replace dangerous lead pipes to deliver clean drinking water on Tribal lands;**
* **$216 million invested** in the Bureau of Indian Affairs Tribal Climate Resilience Program for project planning and development to help combat climate change;
* **$250 million provided** to the Bureau of Indian Affairs for **construction, improvement and maintenance of irrigation and power systems, water sanitation, and other facilities;**
* **$1 billion devoted to broadband access,** meaning households on Native land will have reliable access to high-speed internet technology.

Simply put, our work is not possible without the decades of dedication, activism, and continued leadership of Native American communities. And as our work continues, we remind ourselves that **our fight for a stronger democracy and safer climate is a fight for a safe and prosperous future for Indigenous communities everywhere.** Thank you, NextGen America
---

268 Bush St. #2919

| | It’s that time of the year, Peter. We’ve reached the end of the month and our important end-of-year FEC deadline -- when all of our fundraising numbers go public -- is fast approaching. Fundraising during the holidays is not easy. And I get it. This is when people close their computers, go on vacation, and enjoy some well-deserved time with their families. But that means in order to boost our fundraising efforts, my team and I need to ramp up on the emails for the next week so that we can hit our crucial $30,000 end-of-month goal. With the holiday season upon us, I know it’s a lot to ask for your hard-earned dollars. But if we’re going to create a new path forward together -- one built on kindness and compassion -- then we need to stay on top of our fundraising numbers. [**I’m running in NC-14 to replace the extremism promoted by our current Congressman in Western North Carolina. clean_body: | = | | It’s that time of the year, Peter. We’ve reached the end of the month and our important end-of-year FEC deadline -- when all of our fundraising numbers go public -- is fast approaching. Fundraising during the holidays is not easy. And I get it. This is when people close their computers, go on vacation, and enjoy some well-deserved time with their families. But that means in order to boost our fundraising efforts, my team and I need to ramp up on the emails for the next week so that we can hit our crucial $30,000 end-of-month goal. With the holiday season upon us, I know it’s a lot to ask for your hard-earned dollars. But if we’re going to create a new path forward together -- one built on kindness and compassion -- then we need to stay on top of our fundraising numbers. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for your support, Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Hi friend, Congresswoman Val Demings here, and I'm dropping into your inbox with a very specific and important request: **I want YOUR thoughts on my campaign so we can build the grassroots strategy it takes to win.**
I'm running for Senate to ensure _everyone_ can have a story of opportunity like mine, no matter where they come from – **and I'm running to ensure Democrats win this critical seat and maintain control of the Senate. **To build a winning strategy, I'll be relying on feedback from as _many supporters as possible_ – here on the ground in Florida and from highly engaged supporters like you across the country.
**My team and I set a goal to secure 76 more participants in this strategy survey before 11:59 p.m. tomorrow. Will I see your name in my review packet of responses, friend?[Please, click here now to begin our campaign strategy survey and let me know what this battleground race should focus on. name: Adam Schiff
subject: What I’m thankful for this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, Thanksgiving is so close, I can almost taste it! Before you close your email to spend time with loved ones tomorrow, I want to share a few things I'm thankful for. Democrats have accomplished so much this year – and your activism helped us keep fighting. This is what we fought for together:
* The expanded Child Tax Credit that's cut child poverty in half.
* Extensive relief to put over 445 million COVID-19 vaccines in arms, helping in the fight against the COVID-19 pandemic.
* A massive and historic bipartisan infrastructure bill.
* And hopefully (fingers crossed), a _Build Back Better_ bill representing the biggest investment in America's workers and families in generations.

**Derek, that’s amazing considering Democrats haven’t even held the reigns of Congress for a full year and have the narrowest majority in history. Will you make a critical donation this holiday season to help us defend this progress, and fight for more?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38957370/317804646/-751938712?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20211124_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDYzYmYzMy0zNzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l2mOixvbPeLLgmE43xCVoiE1MSBM13ulCTerXLIkJp8=)

name: CELEBRATION @ Madison for Senate
subject: You're invited to a special event
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
| Hey,

On Dec. 1st at 5:30pm CT, Madison is celebrating her birthday and the end of her first full month of campaigning to be the first woman Senator from Oklahoma! And she wants to see you there.

**[Click here to RSVP →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38958733/317810748/1414188874?refcode=MH_EM_INV_WL_211124_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWVkMDE4Mi0zYjRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zw49x3Q64cTkT7PNcORYK5bFZt6VAsjpUfMhz--Jxls=)**

This celebration will be via Zoom (link sent upon RSVP).

**While no donation is required to attend, we're asking everyone who can donate to consider chipping in $10, $25, $50, or more. Every dollar in a race like this matters a lot.**

**What:** Let's Celebrate Madison's Horn Birthday!
**Where:** Zoom
**When:** Dec. 1st from 5:30 to 6:30pm CT

_Email info@madisonhorn.com with questions._

Our country is facing major challenges that demand action from servant leaders to work together to build on America’s legacy. Madison is running for Senate to work towards the promise of the American dream and represent Oklahomans who have been left behind by self-serving politicians. Together, united by a common set of values, we can work to fight inequities, secure and defend our country, and build a better future. Let me explain why your support for Maggie Hassan is so important | | |
---
Hi -- I’m about to ask you to **[make a donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38959386/317814140/-1803038125?refcode=e20211124_aj-priorities-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmI4YzUzZi0zZTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNG-n3_PPQHBKTOyeDRRDIXm_cBgRHdaPDzCd83usd0=)** to support Democratic Senator Maggie Hassan. name: bob@mark4ohio.com bob@mark4ohio.com
subject: Hey Patriot! Join Us Today At Noon!
body:
Hey, Patriot!

The Pukita Train is on fire and gaining momentum- you don’t want to be out of the loop!
We don’t want to elect a Rob Portman 2.0- right? That would be someone who says everything they know we want to hear and doesn’t give any substantial answers to what they would do. Then they go to Washington and compromise.

**We have the opportunity to work to get a PATRIOT FIGHTER elected, not a Swamp creature!**

This is your invite to come **meet this Patriot Fighter- Mark Pukita** Wednesday, November 24 at noon- on ZOOM or on your phone- **right from the comfort of your home.** If you have already met Mark and agree that he IS THE CANDIDATE, please share this and invite others. Let's send a citizen candidate to Washington who will work and fight for us!

name: The King Family
subject: Happy Thanksgiving, from my family to yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Our family can’t thank you enough for the support you’ve shown as we continue fighting for progressive causes and a brighter future for Maryland.

| Peter,

Thanksgiving is a special holiday in our household. Tomorrow we’ll reflect on all we’re grateful for – from our health to the time we get to spend with one another – and all that we have to look forward to in the upcoming year.

Among all we’re thankful for, our family can’t thank you enough for the support you’ve shown as we continue fighting for progressive causes and a brighter future for Maryland. Your commitment to what we’re building here confirms we can improve lives for people across our state and elect John as the state’s first Black governor and the nation’s first Afro-Latino governor.

Today, while we reflect, we’ll also savor each other’s company – almost as much as we will our meal – and we hope you’ll do the same as you safely gather with your loved ones.

We thank you again for your unwavering support and wish you a Happy Thanksgiving,

The King Family [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38960011/317817916/-923212789?refcode=BLU-KING-20211124-1-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=23ac7994-3f4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2FjNzk5NC0zZjRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O9ELwj95BldzUGXYIb6b9RyUw1Z3dj3KmtG4aR5G8Ck=)

clean_body: Our family can’t thank you enough for the support you’ve shown as we continue fighting for progressive causes and a brighter future for Maryland. | Peter, Thanksgiving is a special holiday in our household. Tomorrow we’ll reflect on all we’re grateful for – from our health to the time we get to spend with one another – and all that we have to look forward to in the upcoming year. Among all we’re thankful for, our family can’t thank you enough for the support you’ve shown as we continue fighting for progressive causes and a brighter future for Maryland. Your commitment to what we’re building here confirms we can improve lives for people across our state and elect John as the state’s first Black governor and the nation’s first Afro-Latino governor. Today, while we reflect, we’ll also savor each other’s company – almost as much as we will our meal – and we hope you’ll do the same as you safely gather with your loved ones. We thank you again for your unwavering support and wish you a Happy Thanksgiving, The King Family = * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, visit his . Friends,

When I entered this race, I did so because I believe I can help make western Wisconsin a better place and represent the interests of all my constituents, whether they voted for me or not.

My opponent, Derrick Van Orden, on the other hand, does not share our values. He was at the January 6th insurrection, attempting to violently overturn our election results.

**Make no mistake about it. I am running to keep a Capitol Insurrectionist out of Congress.**

But I can’t do it without a strong grassroots base. Van Orden has already raised over $1,000,000. So even though we have had a strong start to our campaign, I really need your help once again.

name: American Defense News
subject: Euclid for YOU!
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcvf0thqkaa0fpolr0ol0q3lkv4k26519a7p3qpo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cthm9or1c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s76e9qj0p32e6o6cpbgmuon9dpncpgjecpksaqn2dbnchh70ormejhbbdjlclg6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30sllmkrr4sb6e4rjbcj7m2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsd87688ngbvsc38jfnp27bemc24ij4isp0s3a50_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cthm9or1c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7iusbcd0v41v3aq4qoovleo5k9pjt035iu6hup0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cthm9or1c5h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. ** You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. name: GOP Presidential
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zikv89apinfi3kpobbrscrfpa72u7eei0942v2l8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cthm9or2c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onnctjbep9me4oj2crlccob6p5gc1gr2ohhclhm8stj6dim4dr36uomapjiclpn1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75dr665obbd77m9p6cdb0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z57grl6m8mncg5h4et3sev1li8842e81k18977oo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cthm9or2c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8sri57b9ehrl0qrhnd0bbh2fkm6gqbo7jha27fo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cthm9or2c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z00001tgtgrmv1r3h62fon8v8t388r7rfqrisp9g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cthm9or2c5h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: The news coming out of Washington is complicated. But the facts are simple. Jahana is quietly working diligently – outside of the headlines and outside of the cameras – to get real work done. Work that positively impacts all Americans. | | The news coming out of Washington is complicated. But the facts are simple. Jahana is quietly working diligently – outside of the headlines and outside of the cameras – to get real work done. Work that positively impacts all Americans. Just last week, House Democrats passed the Build Back Better bill. This historic legislation puts working families first – securing affordable child care, universal Pre-K, and a living wage for caregivers. It lowers the cost of prescription drugs, elder care, health care, and housing. And it makes significant investments in our fight against the climate crisis. But this work would not have been possible without our House Majority. The bill passed with NO Republican votes. Everything we’ve accomplished is at stake in 2022 and we must continue to deliver on our promises to the American people.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Here’s a quick rundown of more incredible results House Democrats have accomplished for us this year: ✅ The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill) ✅ The American Rescue Plan (COVID-19 Relief Bill) ✅ The For The People Act (Democracy Reform + Safeguarding Elections) ✅ The Women’s Health Protection Act (Reproductive Rights) ✅ The National Commission to Investigate the January 6 Attack on the United States Capitol Complex Act ✅ The Equality Act (LGBTQ+ Rights) ✅ The George Floyd Justice in Policing Act (Criminal Justice Reform) ✅ The John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act (Expanding Voting Rights) ✅ The Bipartisan Background Checks Act (Common Sense Gun Reform) ✅ The INVEST in America Act (Funding for Roads, Bridges, Rail, and Public Transit) ✅ The Dream And Promise Act (Immigration Reform) These are just a few examples of the incredible work Jahana is doing in Congress – work that would not have been possible without our Democratic majority in the House. = Democrats will not be able to get anything done without the House majority – and CT-05 is a MUST WIN toss-up district that will determine control of Congress in 2022! = We cannot take a break now. Thank you, for all you do. – Team Hayes = * Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. | | I’m sure you’re ready to log off and go spend time with your loved ones. I just have one quick favor to ask before you go: [**_Will you chip in anything to help me hit my Midnight Goal and flip this seat blue? I’m almost at the $7,047 mark, but I need a final push from my top supporters. From the bottom of my heart, thank you so much. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38961800/317826900/1129282168?refcode=20211124_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmIwMmQ3NS00NDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ExQCtqx1W0_PESG1XMcl80N1Net5d4ydqCKcfA8qgVo=)

Let me explain why your support means so much to me. I don’t come from money. My parents taught me to work hard for every dollar you earn. So I’ll admit: When I decided to run for Congress, I was a little worried. Our elections are really expensive. It stacks the deck against everyday people like you and me running for office -- _and winning._ But when I told you my Republican opponent, Don Bacon, favored tax cuts for billionaires...

[**_You pitched in._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38961801/317826901/1129282168?refcode=20211124_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmIwMmQ3NS00NDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ExQCtqx1W0_PESG1XMcl80N1Net5d4ydqCKcfA8qgVo=) When I told you he voted against affordable healthcare and lower prescription costs...

[**_You pitched in._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38961802/317826902/1129282168?refcode=20211124_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmIwMmQ3NS00NDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ExQCtqx1W0_PESG1XMcl80N1Net5d4ydqCKcfA8qgVo=) And when I told you he voted against COVID relief funding when we needed it most...

[**_You pitched in._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38961803/317826907/1129282168?refcode=20211124_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmIwMmQ3NS00NDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ExQCtqx1W0_PESG1XMcl80N1Net5d4ydqCKcfA8qgVo=) [**_Because of you, everyday I’m getting closer to winning this race for hardworking folks across the country. And that’s exactly why we can’t give up. Little donations here and there got me to where I am, and they’re the only way I’ll win this election. So I’m asking, can you pitch in whatever you can (even a dollar!) and keep this campaign going strong? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38961804/317826931/1129282168?refcode=20211124_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmIwMmQ3NS00NDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ExQCtqx1W0_PESG1XMcl80N1Net5d4ydqCKcfA8qgVo=) This time of year always has me feeling thankful for the support of my family and friends. But this year I feel extra lucky knowing supporters like you believe in me. Trust me: I wish I didn’t have to ask you again. [**_But I’m hoping I can count on you to have my back once more, and chip in $10 so I can reach my goal and win this race, for working families like yours and mine. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38961805/317826932/1129282168?refcode=20211124_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmIwMmQ3NS00NDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ExQCtqx1W0_PESG1XMcl80N1Net5d4ydqCKcfA8qgVo=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38961806/317826933/1129282168?refcode=20211124_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmIwMmQ3NS00NDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ExQCtqx1W0_PESG1XMcl80N1Net5d4ydqCKcfA8qgVo=)

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

clean_body: | | | I’m sure you’re ready to log off and go spend time with your loved ones. I just have one quick favor to ask before you go: = Let me explain why your support means so much to me. I don’t come from money. My parents taught me to work hard for every dollar you earn. So I’ll admit: When I decided to run for Congress, I was a little worried. Our elections are really expensive. It stacks the deck against everyday people like you and me running for office -- and winning. But when I told you my Republican opponent, Don Bacon, favored tax cuts for billionaires... = When I told you he voted against affordable healthcare and lower prescription costs... = And when I told you he voted against COVID relief funding when we needed it most... = = This time of year always has me feeling thankful for the support of my family and friends. But this year I feel extra lucky knowing supporters like you believe in me. Trust me: I wish I didn’t have to ask you again. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for sticking with me, = = | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. Trying My Hand at Poetry

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbajacbbj1agsc417308v1fua808rfpu985vjehg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cthm9or1cjh2bs)
---

Friend,

I’ve been trying my hand at poetry. **_Could you let me know if it’s any good after reading?_**

_Roses are Red, the Southern Border is open

Joe Biden’s incompetence is as deep as the ocean

If I had a dollar, I’d try my hand at saving

Before Pelosi came for the Socialist’s taking_

name: Derek Marshall
subject: This campaign is built on love
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,

As we all know, it’s Thanksgiving this week and I’ve been reflecting a lot on the values that ground me and my race. In all of my days working abroad, staffing Democratic campaigns, or living in a Republican-held district, there’s some things I’ve found to be true that I want to share with you.

**I believe in decency, compassion, and respect for all.** Whether you’re a colleague I’ve organized with, a donor I’ve connected with, or a voter I’ve had a conversation with, I have love for you. **Because I have love for every person.** I believe that every person deserves this and that’s why first and foremost, this is a campaign built on love. I believe in the potential of every voter in California’s 8th and that’s why my policies are about giving back and truly serving those who I ask to vote for me next year.

Too often these days, those values are rare in politics. In a country where the Republican Party is moving farther and farther away from democracy and closer and closer to embracing outright violence, **it can be hard to imagine a way to heal this nation and bring those values into our political sphere. **

But I’ve found that most people are not just the parties they cast their votes for. Especially in California’s 8th, a district that currently leans Republican and has voted Republican for years, it can be daunting at first to imagine a progressive transformation. But here’s the thing. **Many people that I speak to, whether Republicans, Democrats, or non-partisan, they speak first about the issues that impact them, not the party.**

And when I talk to those folks about the bread and butter issues of our time, when I talk to them about healthcare, about wages, about jobs, about debt, people tend to open up. We can agree to disagree about certain issues, but **I’ve found that most people have a common core of experiences that mean we can also see eye to eye at times.** That’s why I’ve already had conversations with staunch Republicans who have told me—after hours of talking—that I have earned their vote.

Call me idealistic, but I’m inclined to believe what the voters themselves are telling me. And don’t get me wrong, I don’t think we’re going to win over every Republican or defeat Trumpism in one fell swoop. **But don’t count me out for believing that people are complex enough to be swing voters, or first-time voters, in a district where so-called political leaders have left them behind.**

I’m not running this race for my name or my ego. I don’t want fame. I’m not trying to line my own pockets with corporate kickbacks. I’m in this race because I think **in the richest country in the history of the world, it is unacceptable that so many people in my district don’t have reliable shelter, can’t pay their bills on time, are going hungry, or avoiding medical care** they need because it’s too expensive.

**Like I said, this campaign is built on a love for every person in this district and country** , because it is love that will guide us to the lifesaving policies we need. It is love that will empower someone to vote for the first time. It is love that compelled me to run. **[If that speaks to you, I invite you to support our campaign in our work to bring that love back to California’s 8th district. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38962664/317831446/-225988523?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTlmZDNmNS00NzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1cNiZ7vJP0PXf_9V4oZCY-c_b9CPqmPAioJYWs5Adtc=)**

clean_body: Peter, As we all know, it’s Thanksgiving this week and I’ve been reflecting a lot on the values that ground me and my race. In all of my days working abroad, staffing Democratic campaigns, or living in a Republican-held district, there’s some things I’ve found to be true that I want to share with you. I believe in decency, compassion, and respect for all. Whether you’re a colleague I’ve organized with, a donor I’ve connected with, or a voter I’ve had a conversation with, I have love for you. Because I have love for every person. I believe that every person deserves this and that’s why first and foremost, this is a campaign built on love. I believe in the potential of every voter in California’s 8th and that’s why my policies are about giving back and truly serving those who I ask to vote for me next year. Too often these days, those values are rare in politics. In a country where the Republican Party is moving farther and farther away from democracy and closer and closer to embracing outright violence, it can be hard to imagine a way to heal this nation and bring those values into our political sphere. But I’ve found that most people are not just the parties they cast their votes for. Especially in California’s 8th, a district that currently leans Republican and has voted Republican for years, it can be daunting at first to imagine a progressive transformation. But here’s the thing. Many people that I speak to, whether Republicans, Democrats, or non-partisan, they speak first about the issues that impact them, not the party. And when I talk to those folks about the bread and butter issues of our time, when I talk to them about healthcare, about wages, about jobs, about debt, people tend to open up. We can agree to disagree about certain issues, but I’ve found that most people have a common core of experiences that mean we can also see eye to eye at times. That’s why I’ve already had conversations with staunch Republicans who have told me—after hours of talking—that I have earned their vote. Call me idealistic, but I’m inclined to believe what the voters themselves are telling me. And don’t get me wrong, I don’t think we’re going to win over every Republican or defeat Trumpism in one fell swoop. But don’t count me out for believing that people are complex enough to be swing voters, or first-time voters, in a district where so-called political leaders have left them behind. I’m not running this race for my name or my ego. I don’t want fame. I’m not trying to line my own pockets with corporate kickbacks. I’m in this race because I think in the richest country in the history of the world, it is unacceptable that so many people in my district don’t have reliable shelter, can’t pay their bills on time, are going hungry, or avoiding medical care they need because it’s too expensive. Like I said, this campaign is built on a love for every person in this district and country , because it is love that will guide us to the lifesaving policies we need. It is love that will empower someone to vote for the first time. It is love that compelled me to run. = = In Solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-08 * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

name: Election Integrity Task Force (via House GOP)
subject: Our elections are NOT secure, Fellow Conservative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | |
Now more than ever, it is essential that we secure our elections, Fellow Conservative.

In an effort to keep the Silent Majority even more silent, House Democrats are pushing to mandate radical policies like forcing states to allow vote-by-mail, and funneling your tax dollars to far-left candidates' political campaigns.

_**There is little doubt: Pelosi and her dark money machine puts the integrity of our elections and our Democracy at stake.**_

It's time we restore the American people's confidence in the integrity of our elections - guaranteeing they are truly FAIR and FREE. **[Will you support this effort by contributing to our Election Integrity Fund today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58867076:JlIeUU2N0:m:1:3299561967:C51F3A97703E29010323767EAFFF7F26:r "Will you support this effort by contributing to our Election Integrity Fund today?")**

name: Drew Anderson
subject: INDems Turkey Talkers: Key Messages for Your Thanksgiving Holiday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
From the moment President Joe Biden took office, he promised to work across the aisle and forge consensus to deliver results – and that is exactly what he has done. | |
---
| | **** _**Democrats Delivering for Hoosiers**_ From the moment President Joe Biden took office, he promised to work across the aisle and forge consensus to deliver results – and that is exactly what he has done. Here’s some more good news: Indiana Democrats have delivered on that promise, too! Thanks to the work and support of U.S. Congressmen André Carson and Frank Mrvan, the [American Rescue Plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38962763/317831597/2075701864?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjlmZDNmNS00NzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R1SQ6UIZCCwnCc4ugFtyEDCpuoMNDryeafvC6TkMgjE=&emci=8085d0b7-684c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cf9fd3f5-474d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) and [The Jobs Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38962768/317831604/-722644037?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjlmZDNmNS00NzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R1SQ6UIZCCwnCc4ugFtyEDCpuoMNDryeafvC6TkMgjE=&emci=8085d0b7-684c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cf9fd3f5-474d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) have become law. Also, Democrats at the statehouse have delivered on some of the issues most-pressing to Hoosier families - including [criminal justice reform](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38962770/317831606/377589838?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjlmZDNmNS00NzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R1SQ6UIZCCwnCc4ugFtyEDCpuoMNDryeafvC6TkMgjE=&emci=8085d0b7-684c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cf9fd3f5-474d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) and fully-funding Indiana’s public schools for the first time in a decade. Further, Democrats have hit the road all 2021 to sell the Rescue Plan and Jobs Act to Hoosiers in all counties big and small. This includes holding more than 63 public events in more than 55 counties - all talking about the investments Democrats are delivering for Hoosier families. Here’s what the Rescue Plan and Jobs Act have delivered for Hoosiers: _American Rescue Plan AND The Jobs Act_
* $350 million for broadband internet expansion

_American Rescue Plan_
* COVID-19 vaccines in arms.

**Flashback** : less than [1% of Americans](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38962772/317831608/-204002521?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjlmZDNmNS00NzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R1SQ6UIZCCwnCc4ugFtyEDCpuoMNDryeafvC6TkMgjE=&emci=8085d0b7-684c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cf9fd3f5-474d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) vaccinated during holidays last year
* $5.8 billion in COVID-19 relief for state AND all 92 counties

**NOTE:** County-specific investments [can be found here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38962774/317831610/2075701864?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjlmZDNmNS00NzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R1SQ6UIZCCwnCc4ugFtyEDCpuoMNDryeafvC6TkMgjE=&emci=8085d0b7-684c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cf9fd3f5-474d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535).
* $2 billion for schools to fight COVID-19

**NOTE** : County-specific school investments [can be found here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38962776/317831612/2075701864?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjlmZDNmNS00NzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R1SQ6UIZCCwnCc4ugFtyEDCpuoMNDryeafvC6TkMgjE=&emci=8085d0b7-684c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cf9fd3f5-474d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535).
* [$540 million](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38962778/317831614/62110823?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjlmZDNmNS00NzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R1SQ6UIZCCwnCc4ugFtyEDCpuoMNDryeafvC6TkMgjE=&emci=8085d0b7-684c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cf9fd3f5-474d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) to tackle childcare crisis across Indiana
* $500 million provided to Governor Holcomb’s READI economic program
* Lifting 80,000 Indiana kids out of poverty via the Child Tax Credit
* Fully-funded Indiana’s public schools for first time in over a decade
* Provided teachers a well-earned pay raise

_The Jobs Act_
* $7 billion to repair Indiana’s roads and bridges
* $761 million to deliver clean and safe water, revitalize state’s water infrastructure system
* $680 million to update and invest in modernized public transportation systems
* $100 million to invest in the state’s electric vehicle (EV) charging network
* $20 million to fight climate change, extreme weather that hits Indiana

President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats have delivered once-in-a-generation investments that’ll create good-paying jobs, revitalize Indiana’s infrastructure system, AND create a better future for Hoosier families. Democrats are also expected to deliver more transformational investments through The Build Back Better Act by this Christmas.
_**Debunking INGOP’s Misinformation About Democrats**_ While Democrats are delivering a brighter tomorrow for Indiana and Hoosier families, Indiana Republicans are saying “NO”. The entire Indiana Republican Party - led by Chairman Kyle Hupfer and U.S. Senator Todd Young - made clear their Party’s extreme partisanship and obsession with culture wars matter more than securing a better tomorrow for Hoosier families. In fact, Republicans like Hupfer, Young, Jackie Walorski, and Larry Bucshon have all begun to describe the American Rescue Plan and The Jobs Act as “socialism” - [despite campaigning on the very issues themselves](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38962780/317831621/-237124388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjlmZDNmNS00NzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R1SQ6UIZCCwnCc4ugFtyEDCpuoMNDryeafvC6TkMgjE=&emci=8085d0b7-684c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cf9fd3f5-474d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535). Here’s what the INGOP is calling “socialism”:
* Indiana’s Economy
* Good-paying Jobs
* Broadband
* Roads and Bridges
* Clean Water
* Public Schools
* Childcare

The Indiana Republican Party will use this extreme and partisan strategy for the 2022 and 2024 elections, and Democrats are ready to hold them accountable against this effort. \- delivering a tax cut for big corporations and America’s rich - not one Indiana Republican said a word during that time **LIE:** Democrats support Critical Race Theory (CRT) being taught in K-12 clean_body: From the moment President Joe Biden took office, he promised to work across the aisle and forge consensus to deliver results – and that is exactly what he has done. | | | | ** Democrats Delivering for Hoosiers From the moment President Joe Biden took office, he promised to work across the aisle and forge consensus to deliver results – and that is exactly what he has done. Here’s some more good news: Indiana Democrats have delivered on that promise, too! Thanks to the work and support of U.S. Congressmen André Carson and Frank Mrvan, the and have become law. Also, Democrats at the statehouse have delivered on some of the issues most-pressing to Hoosier families - including and fully-funding Indiana’s public schools for the first time in a decade. Further, Democrats have hit the road all 2021 to sell the Rescue Plan and Jobs Act to Hoosiers in all counties big and small. This includes holding more than 63 public events in more than 55 counties - all talking about the investments Democrats are delivering for Hoosier families. Here’s what the Rescue Plan and Jobs Act have delivered for Hoosiers: American Rescue Plan AND The Jobs Act $350 million for broadband internet expansion American Rescue Plan COVID-19 vaccines in arms. Flashback : less than vaccinated during holidays last year $5.8 billion in COVID-19 relief for state AND all 92 counties NOTE: County-specific investments . $2 billion for schools to fight COVID-19 NOTE : County-specific school investments . to tackle childcare crisis across Indiana $500 million provided to Governor Holcomb’s READI economic program Lifting 80,000 Indiana kids out of poverty via the Child Tax Credit Fully-funded Indiana’s public schools for first time in over a decade Provided teachers a well-earned pay raise The Jobs Act $7 billion to repair Indiana’s roads and bridges $761 million to deliver clean and safe water, revitalize state’s water infrastructure system $680 million to update and invest in modernized public transportation systems $100 million to invest in the state’s electric vehicle (EV) charging network $20 million to fight climate change, extreme weather that hits Indiana President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats have delivered once-in-a-generation investments that’ll create good-paying jobs, revitalize Indiana’s infrastructure system, AND create a better future for Hoosier families. Democrats are also expected to deliver more transformational investments through The Build Back Better Act by this Christmas. Debunking INGOP’s Misinformation About Democrats While Democrats are delivering a brighter tomorrow for Indiana and Hoosier families, Indiana Republicans are saying “NO”. The entire Indiana Republican Party - led by Chairman Kyle Hupfer and U.S. Senator Todd Young - made clear their Party’s extreme partisanship and obsession with culture wars matter more than securing a better tomorrow for Hoosier families. In fact, Republicans like Hupfer, Young, Jackie Walorski, and Larry Bucshon have all begun to describe the American Rescue Plan and The Jobs Act as “socialism” - . Here’s what the INGOP is calling “socialism”: Indiana’s Economy Good-paying Jobs Broadband Roads and Bridges Clean Water Public Schools Childcare The Indiana Republican Party will use this extreme and partisan strategy for the 2022 and 2024 elections, and Democrats are ready to hold them accountable against this effort. name: Brett Guillory for Texas
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Guillory for Texas
body:
Thankful for Our Blessings and Remembering Waukesha, WI
| | | | |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,
This week, we take a moment to stop and give thanks to God for our many blessings: our families, our freedom, and our country. I hope that you are enjoying this time with your loved ones: family and friends.
As you gather, please remember to pause and pray for the families that lost their loved ones this week during the tragic and intentionally evil act of violence in Waukesha, Wisconsin. My heart breaks for those who will now have an empty chair at their Thanksgiving table. My prayers are for those families and for those who were injured and are battling to overcome those injuries.
I condemn all those that enabled this act through their outrageous bail reform policies and their dangerous rhetoric. Milwaukee County DA, John Chisolm, and U.S. Representatives, Rashida Tlaib and Alexendria Ocasio-Cortez, among others, who all have supported cash-bail reform for repeated, violent criminals must be held accountable for enabling and inciting such behavior. I also condemn the media who has largely ignored this story because it does not fit their narrative of white supremacy and "white male rage." When they have mentioned this horrific act, they have framed it simply as "a car accident." This is a misrepresentation of the facts and is disgusting. Jackson Sparks, 7; Virginia Sorenson, 79; Leanna Owens, 71; Tamara Durand, 52; James Coolidge, 52; and Wilhelm Hospel, 82; were not killed in a car accident. They were killed when Darrell Brooks Jr., out on $1,000 bail for previously running over the mother of his child, posted on social media calling for violence towards white people, and then deliberately ran his car into a community's Christmas parade.
---
---
Another headline from this past week is the NOT GUILTY verdict in the Kyle Rittenhouse case. What an encouragement it was to see true justice can still be found in this country despite the media's attempt to ignore facts, spread lies, and smear the defendant. Kyle did nothing wrong. He acted in self-defense. I'm glad the jury understood that. But, this trial wasn't about Kyle Rittenhouse. The Second Amendment and the American citizen's right to self-defense was on trial. The radical left knows that they can't completely take over and ruin our country and our lives while we are still armed. This joke of a trial was their attempt to set a precedent and move to take away our 2A rights and the right to defend ourselves. While justice reigned during this trial, make no mistake, the left will continue their assault on these, our constitutional rights. As your elected representative, I will ALWAYS ensure that those rights are not infringed.
---
---
Friend, as we look at everything going on in our country, it is sometimes hard not to get discouraged. However, I encourage you to have hope and courage. We can turn this around if we are willing to take a stand and fight back. I am thankful that I and [my campaign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Vn42MWHFrBBM_aXb89OO-eMZmJXEXACgEElTJvpHKkuhZ3GsXzHGGV60q3JCc7fL3W1w08U0hyY_r-EK_e5FifYKhKQJu494HJnbshbMUhKE0NYNMLqq6OtwiWjl8MMmFmUmqRgyRu6RcKc90Lin5OVLO02ZNPip&c=Ryji5XjVcZWdTGzD1S5kmZjS1sgMGDd_-deKF7IuV9HWWqlYTffjyA==&ch=8dgAbVXlvSWXBWOyYJnimPkvi5mXJeDsxswSeloqfOFM1TsPv8k4Fg==) have your support. I promise to always fight on your behalf, for our state, and for our country.
God bless you and your family.
From me and my family, Happy Thanksgiving!
---
---
---
