name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Coyote-in-Chief
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| |
---
Peter:

It's true. The U.S. government really did charter secret flights to relocate illegal immigrants into our country in the middle of the night.

Just as the chaos in southern Texas **IS** Joe Biden's border policy, smuggling illegals into the country **IS** his immigration policy.
At this point, Biden is nothing more than **Coyote-in-Chief**.

His Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas finally admitted what everyone knew: the illegal immigrants Biden is letting into the country are bringing Covid-19 with them.

And his Vice President, Kamala Harris, who is supposedly _**IN CHARGE**_ of getting the border under control, is too busy auditioning child actors for her TV ads to bother.

Nor have Democrats in Congress lifted a finger to secure the border. They think the border is racist. They think immigration enforcement is racist. They think America is racist!

**[ Take a stand and help stop the Coyote-in-Chief! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58867711:64BYOU2MN:m:1:3298722022:EF9BFC1A2153492E9A8C6CE4268979CB:r) **

Democrats are still in charge of our government for at least another year and a half. And they won't give up their anti-American bigotry unless we give them the political defeat of a lifetime next year.

** But we all know, it's not enough to turn blue Senate seats red. We need true conservative fighters like: **

✅ **Mo Brooks** in Alabama
✅ **Josh Mandel** in Ohio
✅ **Mike Lee** in Utah
✅ **Ron Johnson** in Wisconsin
✅ **Ted Budd** in North Carolina
✅ **Rand Paul** in Kentucky, and
✅ **Adam Laxalt** in Nevada.

**[ We need them ALL in the Senate! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58867711:64BYOU2MN:m:1:3298722022:EF9BFC1A2153492E9A8C6CE4268979CB:r) **

They are not just Republicans and conservatives. They are patriots, ready to fight and sacrifice to rescue America from the woke, socialist fanatics leading us into inflation, crime, censorship, election corruption, defeat, and racist indoctrination.

Senate Conservatives Fund has already done so much to impact these Senate races and, with your help, we're going to win back the Senate not for a party, but _**for our nation**_.

**[ Please join us by making a split contribution to our endorsed Senate candidates today! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58867711:64BYOU2MN:m:1:3298722022:EF9BFC1A2153492E9A8C6CE4268979CB:r) **

Together, we can build an earthquake election that fills the Senate with true conservatives who will fight for our future.

Thank you for considering this important request.

Sincerely,
Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund
|
---

**COUNTDOWN**

name: Defend the Senate
subject: 6 Days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38963369/317834453/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDY1ZWNhOC00ODRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=acyfy_Csb65ki1XDLdtf9BV5yp3rVbcxbwteUlamTpU=)
Friends — We have our November fundraising deadline coming up quickly, so here’s a quick rundown of the days ahead:
* Our goal is to get 10,000 contributions by the deadline to show that this team is ready to fight for our Senate majority.
* But we only have 6 days left to get it done, so we’re coming directly to you and asking for your support.

Our goal is based on the number of people donating and not a dollar amount, because this team’s strength lies in the number of people dedicated to defending our Senate majority. And usually we wouldn’t be so worried about hitting our goal, but the news that Republicans have the best shot they’ve had in forty years to take back the Congress and unravel all the progress we’ve made has us more worried than usual. **So you can see how important your support is to defending our Senate majority, which is why today we have to ask:** [_**If you are able, will you make a $10 donation to Defend the Senate? name: Office of U.S. Senator Raphael Warnock
subject: Delivering Jobs & Infrastructure for Georgia
body:
|
---
Hi Neighbor, I've often said our country needs a home improvement project to help heal our current divides. And since arriving to the Senate earlier this year, I have been fighting tirelessly to secure robust federal funding for projects all across Georgia that will improve the infrastructure of our communities while also creating good-paying, sustainable jobs and injecting new life into our economy. That's why, after months of pushing, I was so excited last week to see the bipartisan infrastructure deal officially signed into law. Thanks to hard work, Georgia is set to receive strong federal funding and benefit from policies I worked to secure that will revitalize and rebuild our state's aging infrastructure, address climate change, and help prepare our state and economy for the future. More specifically, these once-in-a-generation investments for Georgia will spur job growth and expand broadband access; repair and strengthen our roads, bridges and ports to help ease supply chain issues; expand public transportation options to increase hardworking Georgians' social and economic mobility; and so much more. **Simply put, these investments are a really BIG deal! Take a look for yourself: ** **** In addition to these investments, I fought hard to make sure the package addressed priorities for our state and ensure the federal government is doing its fair share for Georgia, including:
* Working across the aisle to pass a bipartisan provision **making I-14 a high-priority corridor**--a first step on the road to becoming a federal highway,
* Leading the charge for $5 billion in **electric and alternative school bus technology** being pioneered by Georgia's own Blue Bird Corporation,
* Locking in an estimated $2 billion to **expand broadband** in rural and underserved areas of Georgia,
* Securing $3 billion for a **new highway-rail crossing grade separation program** that will improve worker safety and rail efficiency--_**and that 's only the tip of the iceberg.**_

**This bill is a testament to the good we can do for people when we put politics aside in Washington.** However, the work is not over yet. I'm going to keep pressing in the Senate to conduct oversight, and ensure the federal dollars I secured make their way to Georgia communities as soon as possible. In the meantime, if you have any questions or need assistance, please don't hesitate to [reach out to me](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=15543.6397710.5539262.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2f&redir_log=352874959129274). It is the honor of my life to represent our state in the United States Senate, and I look forward to hearing from you about how I can continue working in Congress to make Georgia an even better place for us to call home. ￼ Keep the faith, and keep looking up. U.S. Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock To unsubscribe, please email press@warnock.senate.gov
---

I'm so proud of everything our grassroots movement has done for the people of New Mexico. We’ve had the most successful vaccination campaign in the country, raised the minimum wage for the first time in a decade, and legalized cannabis to end the war on drugs.
But we still have so much work to do – and if the GOP flips New Mexico red, they'll erase all of our progress and push our state further right than ever before. The governor's office is the first line of defense against GOP extremism, so there's zero room for error in this campaign.
**I'm falling $38,667 short of my goal at the worst possible moment. There's a special legislative session coming up, which means I won't be able to fundraise for THREE MONTHS. If I don't hit my goal today, I could start off 2022 behind the GOP, so I need you to give now:**
**[Please, Peter, will you donate $5 to help me hit my critical end-of-month goal and keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38963522/317835036/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1113-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTI3MjQ1Yy00OTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=374_2Ltf8p-a3Fhkhr7JF4eJcuDQOhqr_DBLXd3dFIo=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38963529/317835083/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1113-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTI3MjQ1Yy00OTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=374_2Ltf8p-a3Fhkhr7JF4eJcuDQOhqr_DBLXd3dFIo=)

Michelle Lujan Grisham

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Your thoughts?
body:
|
---
| | Hello Peter, I hope you're doing well today. I sent you an email last week and I wanted to make sure you'd seen it. I've been on the road working with politicians and educational leaders across the country. I believe there is a problem brewing in our educational system. From what I've seen, our most vulnerable youth are being taught to reject our American values. But that is just what I've seen. I want to know what you've seen. If you're willing, I'd like to get your opinion. I'd like to use the feedback you can provide to better inform my conversations. To that end, I've created a quick survey. It will take you less than 3 minutes and I'd really appreciate any feedback you're willing to share. You can take the survey here: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59206223:slE4tbHaN:m:1:2394957096:8B4027672075B14A7F81328B8F1D3AF5:r) Peter, I want to thank you for your support in the past. Together, I know that we can create much needed change in our nation.

Regards, Dr. Ben Carson
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

body:
Here’s your Bennet Defense Fund update. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38965097/317837884/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmVkYzUyNy00YzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NoSZqthcvg83K7OOcav8nXsVB2zxT8FZqAAcsUQ5Jao=)
Folks, **First:** We launched the Bennet Defense Fund to protect Michael’s seat from the National GOP’s attacks — and to defend our slim Senate majority. **Then:** Michael helped pass the historic _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ — a once-in-a-generation package that will:
* Invest deeply in improving Colorado’s 481 bridges and more than 3,600 miles of highways in poor condition;
* Increase public transportation options for Coloradans across the state to get to school and work;
* Make over one million Coloradans eligible for help affording their internet and expand high-speed internet access to tens of thousands of Coloradans who currently lack it;
* Provide funding to improve water infrastructure so all Coloradans have access to safe, clean drinking water, particularly our Tribal communities.

**Now:** We’re falling behind on our fundraising efforts as Rick Scott and Mitch McConnell decide which of Michael’s eight opponents will get access to the $75 million-plus they’ve raised this year to flip the Senate. The last time Michael ran in a midterm year, he won by just 1.7% — so the Bennet Defense Fund, and your support today, will be critical in helping defend his record against GOP attacks and ensure that Michael and Senate Democrats can continue to deliver results. **We’re counting on you, so please pitch in $10 — or whatever you can — to become a founding member of the Bennet Defense Fund AND to help Michael fend off attacks sent from National Republicans, extreme opponents, Fox News, and the Colorado GOP. name: Holly
subject: Secret family recipe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter,
I’m writing today to share my deepest appreciation for all of our nation’s veterans. Growing up on army bases and in a family full of veterans, I learned discipline very early on and that service is meant to be selfless.
Today, we want to honor members of the Armed Forces that have defended our nation’s freedom and protected our country's future.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88943/images/Image%20from%20iOS%20%2851%29.jpg]Today also reminds us that we must do more to protect our veterans when they re-enter civilian life. After returning home many veterans are not given adequate support. GA-14 has a considerable veteran population yet we only have one VA hospital in the district and no veterans’ cemeteries . We must do better. We will do better. That's why I'm running to change the way that we treat our veterans when they return home.
We owe a debt to those who’ve placed their lives on the line to protect our freedom as Americans, and we have to do better to provide for their care and to honor their sacrifices.
Sincerely,
Holly McCormack.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1111] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] http://www.hollyforcongress.org/ [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]
Paid for by Holly for Congress
Holly McCormack for Congress
862 Lafayette St
PO Box 1035
Ringgold, GA 30736
United States

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Coyote-in-Chief
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| |
---
Peter:

It's true. The U.S. government really did charter secret flights to relocate illegal immigrants into our country in the middle of the night.

Just as the chaos in southern Texas **IS** Joe Biden's border policy, smuggling illegals into the country **IS** his immigration policy.
At this point, Biden is nothing more than **Coyote-in-Chief**.

His Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas finally admitted what everyone knew: the illegal immigrants Biden is letting into the country are bringing Covid-19 with them.

And his Vice President, Kamala Harris, who is supposedly _**IN CHARGE**_ of getting the border under control, is too busy auditioning child actors for her TV ads to bother.

Nor have Democrats in Congress lifted a finger to secure the border. They think the border is racist. They think immigration enforcement is racist. They think America is racist!

**[ Take a stand and help stop the Coyote-in-Chief! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58865901:JBJ9RU2CN:m:1:3253819041:18FF05214E5E036344E3F8B1D3E29C76:r) **

Democrats are still in charge of our government for at least another year and a half. And they won't give up their anti-American bigotry unless we give them the political defeat of a lifetime next year.

** But we all know, it's not enough to turn blue Senate seats red. We need true conservative fighters like: **

✅ **Mo Brooks** in Alabama
✅ **Josh Mandel** in Ohio
✅ **Mike Lee** in Utah
✅ **Ron Johnson** in Wisconsin
✅ **Ted Budd** in North Carolina
✅ **Rand Paul** in Kentucky, and
✅ **Adam Laxalt** in Nevada.

**[ We need them ALL in the Senate! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58865901:JBJ9RU2CN:m:1:3253819041:18FF05214E5E036344E3F8B1D3E29C76:r) **

They are not just Republicans and conservatives. They are patriots, ready to fight and sacrifice to rescue America from the woke, socialist fanatics leading us into inflation, crime, censorship, election corruption, defeat, and racist indoctrination.

Senate Conservatives Fund has already done so much to impact these Senate races and, with your help, we're going to win back the Senate not for a party, but _**for our nation**_.

**[ Please join us by making a split contribution to our endorsed Senate candidates today! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58865901:JBJ9RU2CN:m:1:3253819041:18FF05214E5E036344E3F8B1D3E29C76:r) **

Together, we can build an earthquake election that fills the Senate with true conservatives who will fight for our future.

Thank you for considering this important request.

Sincerely,
Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund
|

**COUNTDOWN**

Hi friend,
As we all prepare for Thanksgiving tomorrow, I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support and ask you to join me in supporting the [**Community Food Bank of Southern Arizona.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38967077/317839010/540103074?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWU5NzczZC00ZTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjVnHL_4DvsnJU4S-8IO33Jylpq0nfdgUASjLYckjKw=&emci=4456d8c5-b74c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=99e9773d-4e4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12898431#!/donation/checkout)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38967078/317839011/540103074?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWU5NzczZC00ZTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjVnHL_4DvsnJU4S-8IO33Jylpq0nfdgUASjLYckjKw=&emci=4456d8c5-b74c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=99e9773d-4e4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12898431#!/donation/checkout)
---
Sadly, there are hungry people in every county and every congressional district across our nation. According to recent research, ~15.4% of the people in our Southern Arizona communities are "food insecure" and don't have consistent access to enough food for everyone in their household to live an active, healthy life.
I've seen what the power of grassroots can accomplish. From helping us reach our campaign fundraising goals, to activating our local communities to vote, I am continuously grateful for your tireless support and I hope we can use this same power to help our Southern Arizona communities.
Wishing you and your loved ones a safe and happy Thanksgiving,
Kirsten

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Giving Thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
With Thanksgiving just a few hours away, and your email inboxes soon to be (or already) flooded with Black Friday and Cyber Monday email deals.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankfulforyou-470954?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Giving Thanks_**
With Thanksgiving just a few hours away, and your email inboxes soon to be (or already) flooded with Black Friday and Cyber Monday email deals, this week’s Party Line is shorter and arriving earlier than usual. I just wanted to take a moment to thank all of our Hoosier Republicans for all you’re doing to keep this state moving forward.

Because of you, the Indiana Republican Party has become the most dominant political organization in recent Indiana history. In just the passed 4 years, we’ve set—and then beat—records for electoral success. Just think of where our party stands right now because of your hard work and support:
* We hold every statewide elected office- Governor, Lt. Governor, Secretary of State, Attorney General, Auditor, and Treasurer.
* We hold supermajorities in both chambers of the Indiana General Assembly.
* Indiana Republicans hold both United States Senate Seats and 7 of 9 of our US House Seats.
* 71 mayors throughout the state are Republicans, and all time record for our party.
* A whopping 88% of all county elected officials are Hoosier Republicans.

This success didn’t come by accident. It happened because we have a devoted, energized, and organized network of supporters. Folks who aren’t afraid of doing the hard work each year to maintain our winning streak.

And we also have the right policies. Hoosiers have seen the results in our state of focused, conservative leadership. Balanced budgets, low taxes, job opportunities, investments in education, public health, and infrastructure. We’re getting the job done at the ballot box but, more importantly, we’re getting the job done for Hoosiers every day.

That’s why we do what we do and that’s why we’re so thankful for your support and participation.

So, again, thank you for all you’ve done to support, not just our Indiana Republican Party, but the entire state. Working together we continue to make a positive impact on Indiana and I know there’s so much more we will continue to do in the months ahead.

Until then, I hope you have a wonderful holiday full of family, friends, faith, food, and football.

Happy Thanksgiving,
Kyle
---

|

---

subject: There’s plenty to be thankful for.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Quartey for Congress
body:
And it starts with you.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38968913/317841657/641313821?refcode=em_msg_2021.11.24_b1_qq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWY4YTc1Ni01MDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PyldvYL9-oM9UfXgDq6WpFYzmRUG5lRh1zhBo3New_g=) Team,

On behalf of my family, I want to wish you and your loved ones a happy Thanksgiving. I am looking forward to spending time with family tomorrow, and I hope you are able to spend time with yours, too. Whatever your circumstances are, you all are in our thoughts. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38968914/317841659/641313821?refcode=em_msg_2021.11.24_b1_qq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWY4YTc1Ni01MDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PyldvYL9-oM9UfXgDq6WpFYzmRUG5lRh1zhBo3New_g=) During this time of reflection, I am overcome by gratitude for the team at HQ driving this campaign and doing all within their power to make sure we succeed. I am also so grateful for all of our incredible grassroots supporters.

So please accept this sincere thank you, team. This people-powered movement wouldn’t be possible without your generosity and your commitment to building a better future for our district. I will continue to be grateful and humbled by your ongoing support.

From my family to yours,

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: a donation from you today would mean the world to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I can't keep quiet about the things working families go through in this country
#

I was born and raised in North Philadelphia.
My mom, Kelly, was a home healthcare aide and the sweetest person I know. Her love of North Philly was contagious.
My father, Malcolm, was a social worker and the son of civil rights activist Muhammad Kenyatta.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38970297/317844172/-360183459?refcode2=1c939950-514d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211124-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzkzOTk1MC01MTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cvWdfg-UDURdsBkshfEYy7Jq7PNevIVTafTaWWe4D88=)
Before I could even walk, they taught me that how I treat people and what I contribute to the community matter.
They taught me that I have a responsibility to do good for the community.
That's why I've always had a big mouth about the things that I believe matter — and I can't keep quiet about the things working families like mine go through in this country.
**I’m in this race because no one like me — like us — has ever had a seat at the table in the U.S. Senate. But I can’t get there alone, so I have to ask:**
[Could you please chip in $3 to my campaign for U.S. Senate today? Our work is fueled through lots of folks chipping in a few bucks at a time, so a donation from you would mean the world to me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38970298/317844213/-360183459?refcode2=1c939950-514d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211124-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzkzOTk1MC01MTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cvWdfg-UDURdsBkshfEYy7Jq7PNevIVTafTaWWe4D88=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38970299/317844227/-360183459?refcode2=1c939950-514d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211124-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzkzOTk1MC01MTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cvWdfg-UDURdsBkshfEYy7Jq7PNevIVTafTaWWe4D88=)**
That's because your donation will put us that much closer to delivering a government that works for working people.
Thanks for being a part of this campaign. I'm so grateful for everything you do.
All my best,
Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC

Philadelphia, PA 19110

name: Andy Ngo
subject: Assaulted 4 times for exposing Antifa
body:
Peter, I was one of the first civilians savagely beaten by lawless Antifa thugs. And unless we do something to stop them today, I'll be far from the last. **_[That's why I'm asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me fund my landmark lawsuit that will bring Antifa and their members to justice.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868230:Jk-MgU2Nl:m:1:3298722022:06912C4FC41D85F933E3FA3F51DDCF81:r) _** **You see, I was at Antifa 's "ground zero" in the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc before. I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist, to document and report on the event. As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety. The mob was angry and looking for a fight. Most of them wore masks -- and not the kind we're forced today because of coronavirus. They wanted to act like criminals without getting caught. Many had on helmets and makeshift armor. Some carried weapons like metal pipes, chains, crowbars, and even bricks. I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on. **People like you needed to know what was happening. ** But I didn't go unnoticed for long. Somebody recognized me and jeers quickly rose through the crowd. "F*** you, Andy Ngo!" and "Go home, fascist!" I tried to escape, but it was too late. **Projectiles started flying. Then came the fists. ** Before I knew it, I was being punched, kicked, and hit with flying objects. I tried to protect my head, but I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger. Not to mention they stole my camera. What they did to me is unacceptable. But this last summer, it became much worse than I could've ever imagined as Antifa set fire to entire cities for weeks on end. **And now, we 're watching Antifa and similar groups threaten mass riots and violence across the country.**
**[Will you donate $35 or more to help me cover the costs of my lawsuit against Antifa?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868230:Jk-MgU2Nl:m:1:3298722022:06912C4FC41D85F933E3FA3F51DDCF81:r)** This is bigger than me alone. You see, after I got away from the mob, police finally showed up to question me, but my attackers stole all my evidence. Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured the attack, clear as day. I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved. Wrong. To this day, over a year later, my attackers are walking free. Portland police did nothing. No charges. No convictions. No justice. It's not much of a surprise, though. You see, radical politicians have long-since bowed to the dangerous mob that terrorizes their streets. And now, as you and I are watching Antifa's nationwide takeover, more and more politicians across the country are following suit. It's so bad that the justice system is buckling under the pressure of threats of violence from these disgusting thugs. We have to stop them and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family. [_**That 's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my landmark lawsuit against Antifa and their members.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868230:Jk-MgU2Nl:m:1:3298722022:06912C4FC41D85F933E3FA3F51DDCF81:r) Because Antifa wants the end of America as we know it -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse - open anarchists who want to tear down our society and remake it in their own twisted vision. By any means necessary, **_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem. _** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. It's a sick strategy, but very smart - because so far, they've been right! **For the most part, they 've gotten off scot-free.**** ** Our politicians and media are treating this deranged terrorist group like peaceful protestors! As we've seen, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continues to escape consequences. **So now I 'm taking justice into my own hands - with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty. ** And, as I mentioned, we're suing Portland's Antifa Chapter. We've made a lot of progress in this case, but we're far from victory. [**_You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868230:Jk-MgU2Nl:m:1:3298722022:06912C4FC41D85F933E3FA3F51DDCF81:r) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger. This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't. This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe. And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver. By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. [**_Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to fund this critical lawsuit?_ ** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868230:Jk-MgU2Nl:m:1:3298722022:06912C4FC41D85F933E3FA3F51DDCF81:r) Please don't wait - if we don't fight back and win now, these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America, destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Andy Ngo Investigative Journalist P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over-- _**they 're just beginning**_. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out.[ **Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868230:Jk-MgU2Nl:m:1:3298722022:06912C4FC41D85F933E3FA3F51DDCF81:r) [**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868230:Jk-MgU2Nl:m:1:3298722022:06912C4FC41D85F933E3FA3F51DDCF81:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868230:Jk-MgU2Nl:m:1:3298722022:06912C4FC41D85F933E3FA3F51DDCF81:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868230:Jk-MgU2Nl:m:1:3298722022:06912C4FC41D85F933E3FA3F51DDCF81:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868231:Jk-MgU2Nl:m:1:3298722022:06912C4FC41D85F933E3FA3F51DDCF81:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

name: Mark Kelly and Gabby Giffords
subject: thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We hope that your next few days are spent in good health among those you love most.
#

Good morning, friends.
We wanted to send one last short note before the Thanksgiving holiday to say thank you.
Thank you for everything you’ve done to support us over the years, and most recently in the last two election cycles. Your help means the world to us, and we’re thankful for it every day.
We hope that your holiday is spent in good health among those you love most.
Last weekend we took part in El Tour de Tucson, a bike race in Tucson and we’ll be spending the holiday with family tomorrow. We’re both excited for some (relatively) quiet time at home.
But before we sign-off, if you can make a contribution to the re-election campaign, it’d mean a lot. We won’t be reaching out over the holiday, but it’s important we keep pace to meet our goals.
Contribute here: [**https://act.markkelly.com/go/November-Goals**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211124-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1703_6688874_E7WLdd&akid=1703%2E6688874%2EE7WLdd)
Thank you again for everything. We hope you’ll have a wonderful Thanksgiving.
Mark and Gabby

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=1703%2E6688874%2EE7WLdd).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: The next BIG step for the America-First movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sabatini for Congress
body:
Peter --

Every single day, I'm fighting in the Halls
of Congress to defeat the Democrats' communist agenda

But you and I will never win without backup.

I am happy to report I've met the man who can
help Donald Trump's movement grow to new heights, IMPEACH Joe
Biden, finish the wall, and take our country back from radical
leftwing nut jobs like AOC.

I am proud to announce my official
endorsement of Anthony Sabatini for Congress!

Anthony Sabatini is a proven conservative
FIGHTER. . .the most Pro-Trump champion in Florida's state
legislature.

Please join me by making
a donation of $20.22, $50, $100, $250 or any amount today!

As a conservative wife, mother,
businesswoman, and Trump supporter I only endorse the most
hardcore PROVEN candidates.

We DO NOT need more spineless politicians
infesting the Swamp who will bend their knee to Pelosi's orders.

Anthony is a man we can count on.

● Anthony Sabatini STOPPED vaccine
passports in Florida
● He is 100% pro-life, pro-Second
Amendment, and believes in the America-First agenda
● Anthony supports building the wall
● He has agreed to support my efforts to
IMPEACH Joe Biden
● Anthony is the leader for election
integrity in Florida and demanding an AUDIT of the election
results

Anthony Sabatini is fighting with me to Make
America FIRST, Drain the Swamp, and to destroy radical leftists
such as Pelosi and AOC.

I am announcing my personal endorsement of
Anthony's campaign as well as a fundraising drive to support this
America-First champion.

Please help me raise $25,000 for Anthony's
campaign by donating ANY amount below:

Donate $20.22
Donate $35
Donate $50
Donate $100
Donate $250
Donate $500
Donate $1,000

Peter, I need more allies like Anthony.

Anthony Sabatini has proven he isn't afraid
to take on the Establishment.

He's not only become a leader for election
integrity, but also agreed to join my efforts to IMPEACH Joe
Biden.

As you can see, he isn't afraid to pick
fights with the Swamp, the Deep State, or the enemies of freedom.
Together, I'm confident we can WIN big fights for America.

But he needs your help.

I told Anthony I would help him raise $25,000
in 48 hours.

Add your name to the list by making a
donation of $20.22 or more by clicking here.

I am counting on your help, Peter.

You are one of my top online supporters and
this is an URGENT request.

Please answer this email ASAP by making a
donation.

Thank you,

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene

Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Sabatini for Congress

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
Her record in the House shows this

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38970873/317846640/-1528880522?refcode=SL_headerlogoAB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2I2NWYxZi01MzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KL4fDn37QnwwD8adXO7KiscCS1ZjsmmbvEN05iVWRTQ=)

| | Folks, In addition to infrastructure and climate change, an issue that was top-of-mind for our supporters in Susie’s recent survey is urgent and already impacting the lives of so many Nevada residents. Here’s how Susie Lee envisions our path forward in ensuring **water security for every Nevadan.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38970874/317846641/2035241370?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_211124_FR_ISSUESERIES3_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2I2NWYxZi01MzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KL4fDn37QnwwD8adXO7KiscCS1ZjsmmbvEN05iVWRTQ=) Lake Mead’s water level has hit a historic low, and Nevada’s agricultural industry, economy, and our livelihoods are at risk if we don’t prioritize water security. Thankfully, **Susie Lee stepped up and introduced the ‘Large Scale Water Recycling Project Investment Act'** as part of the Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal that President Biden recently signed. _Here’s why Susie’s legislation on water security matters:_
* Nevadans will net **$403 million _(!!)_ to improve water infrastructure**
* **Water sources will be retrofitted** in response to the threat of climate change
* **Nevada’s economy will feel relief** from the pressure of the water shortage

**Thanks to Susie’s leadership in the House,** Americans across seventeen western states — including Nevada — will benefit from this legislation that goes miles to preserve the health of our water sources. Moving forward, Susie Lee knows that there’s more work to be done as climate change continues to shape our livelihoods. This is why she’s committed to working alongside her colleagues to protect water infrastructure for future generations. To be frank, **the only way Susie can continue advocating for water security is if she’s re-elected.** [_**Can you chip in $10 to help Susie Lee hold on to the most competitive House seat in the country? Every dollar counts in this race:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38970875/317846643/2035241370?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_211124_FR_ISSUESERIES3_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2I2NWYxZi01MzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KL4fDn37QnwwD8adXO7KiscCS1ZjsmmbvEN05iVWRTQ=) | | | [Chip in $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38970877/317846644/2035241370?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_211124_FR_ISSUESERIES3_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2I2NWYxZi01MzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KL4fDn37QnwwD8adXO7KiscCS1ZjsmmbvEN05iVWRTQ=)

clean_body: Her record in the House shows this | = | | Folks, In addition to infrastructure and climate change, an issue that was top-of-mind for our supporters in Susie’s recent survey is urgent and already impacting the lives of so many Nevada residents. Here’s how Susie Lee envisions our path forward in ensuring water security for every Nevadan. = Lake Mead’s water level has hit a historic low, and Nevada’s agricultural industry, economy, and our livelihoods are at risk if we don’t prioritize water security. Thankfully, Susie Lee stepped up and introduced the ‘Large Scale Water Recycling Project Investment Act' as part of the Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal that President Biden recently signed. Here’s why Susie’s legislation on water security matters: Nevadans will net $403 million (!!) to improve water infrastructure Water sources will be retrofitted in response to the threat of climate change Nevada’s economy will feel relief from the pressure of the water shortage Thanks to Susie’s leadership in the House, Americans across seventeen western states — including Nevada — will benefit from this legislation that goes miles to preserve the health of our water sources. Moving forward, Susie Lee knows that there’s more work to be done as climate change continues to shape our livelihoods. This is why she’s committed to working alongside her colleagues to protect water infrastructure for future generations. To be frank, the only way Susie can continue advocating for water security is if she’s re-elected.** = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = It’s up to all of us to make sure we send one of Nevada’s strongest fighters back to Congress. name: Ras Smith
subject: Thanksgiving.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
Iowa is only as good as the health and wellness of our most vulnerable populations. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38970890/317846714/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmY4OWYzYS01MzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nd6-m-gppQ-z0PVj_Gci07sOIoysxQdPpfDOBorW23I=)
Friend,

I hope you have the opportunity to spend time with family and friends for Thanksgiving. For many, this is the first time in a few years the entire family can gather around the dinner table. For others, including those whose families are in nursing homes or long-term care facilities, this Thanksgiving isn't that unique.

As a kid, I remember visiting my great-grandmother at the nursing home with my grandmother and mother. I would wait outside her room, where I could hear them cry as they found her without clean undergarments, sleeping in dirty sheets, and not being cared for.

**As governor, I will ensure that we protect our most vulnerable populations, and raise standards in nursing homes.** We can do that by: 1) Removing our elders from the current privatized Medicaid managed care system, 2) Providing higher quality care at home, and 3) Raising pay and benefits for long-term care workers.

[**If you agree with this proposal, please add your name in support. We'll be sure to share the number of you who agree as we publicize our plan throughout the campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38970891/317846715/1741020776?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmY4OWYzYS01MzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nd6-m-gppQ-z0PVj_Gci07sOIoysxQdPpfDOBorW23I=&emci=7fc7d8d1-394d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0ff89f3a-534d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=21044445)
| **[Add your name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38970892/317846716/1741020776?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmY4OWYzYS01MzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nd6-m-gppQ-z0PVj_Gci07sOIoysxQdPpfDOBorW23I=&emci=7fc7d8d1-394d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0ff89f3a-534d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=21044445)**
---

In the next decade, Iowa will be home to more Iowans over the age of 60 than under the age of 18. This presents an incredible opportunity to lead the nation by rethinking how and where we provide care.

**Iowa is only as good as the health and wellness of our most vulnerable populations.** I pledge to bring us together to make sure we do our very best for everyone.

Thanks, and enjoy your Thanksgiving.

_\- Ras_

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | Dear friends, Last week, House Democrats achieved an historic victory! Honoring the vision of President Biden and addressing the needs of the American people, we passed the transformative Build Back Better Act. This success would not have been possible without a courageous Democratic Majority and the support of our VIPs -- our Volunteers In Politics who make it all happen. In the Thanksgiving season, I write to express my personal appreciation and that of the House Democrats to you for your great support. Informed by the intellectual resource that you are and the candor of your friendship, we are strategically poised to Hold The House. As redistricting continues and our candidates emerge, we are preparing for victory one year out. Thank you for making that possible. Happy Thanksgiving! Nancy
---

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. name: Kathy Barnette for Senate
subject: Kathy's statement on Sean Parnell withdrawing from the race
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sUE4mEWmXY9iY3Qvdn8Jg1E-WmjQRaBYMDVumG9-wBVumkC-aClM0pwkl6aPfXiLqgozpIgolhMYx-48fEeG0P3tbk6oowZIEurUSVFUkS7RYCbgX9SI6WI_h1VGg06HnxQEKfE9cufiiHB6PCW_o_lYg-TZWzZJ68xXP8QwXGrQR4pScliQqQ0aVS9IwSMmgiWGnyGySlo=&c=tgrE84b27qkEtli9b_QSuS6uXULfhcDu72PJYKdnNMKRN-64IOj3Zw==&ch=FpZqyEPy_gGJqO26lmr_gV2mxU44cKQv34TqKuMAwWukA_uvf_XSBw==)
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,
Kathy Barnette had this to say about Sean Parnell, her primary opponent, withdrawing from the race earlier this week:
"Now more than ever, we need to focus on what's in front of us. Democrats have shown us exactly who they are and what they mean when they say they want to "fundamentally change" our nation. We reject their change. That's why it is vital we select a true Conservative to fill this Senate seat in PA. We must elect a candidate who can relate to the hard-working people of Pennsylvania. Farmers, steelworkers, small business owners - all need a Senator who understands their plight with rising gas prices, food prices, and the cost to heat their homes. We are living in serious times and we must focus."
"We must elect a candidate who will passionately defend our American values. The Republican Party cannot continue to put forward the same-old, cookie-cutter Republican and expect to win this Senate seat. My campaign makes sense. We can win. We will win. And the nation will win when the electorate sends me to the U.S. Senate."
Kathy is focused on the issues that are important to Pennsylvanians - something that has been missing from other Republicans in the race. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: A Message From Jackson Lahmeyer
body:
Happy Thanksgiving From The Entire Lahmeyer Family Tomorrow is Thanksgiving! Most people when they hear the word "Thanksgiving" they think of food, f
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=1393633.865.1.2c1f2f5441b80d9eee7bb3fd87fdaa81) |
---
## Happy Thanksgiving From The Entire Lahmeyer Family
---
Tomorrow is Thanksgiving! Most people when they hear the word "Thanksgiving" they think of food, family and football (all of which are good things). But... Thanksgiving goes beyond food, family and football. What is Thanksgiving all about? IT'S IN THE NAME: Giving Thanks. James 1:17 says, "Every good and perfect gift is from above, coming down from the Father of the heavenly lights, who does not change like shifting shadows." As American Citizens we have so many good things in life that we take for granted. As citizens of the Kingdom of God we have even greater things that we take for granted. It's important that we recognize all these good & great things in our life come from the Lord. Therefore, we should give thanks (not just on a Holiday either). I want to encourage you to be practical this Thanksgiving with 3 things you can do that will help you give thanks. 1\. Write down 2-3 things that you are grateful for and then post it to social media and acknowledge the Lord. Psalm 107:1 says, "Give thanks to the Lord, for he is good; his love endures forever."
2\. Gather your family and share with one another what you are thankful for out loud because our words are powerful. Proverbs 18:21 says, " The tongue has the power of life and death, and those who love it will eat its fruit."
3\. Perform an act of Generosity. In 2nd Corinthians 9:12 the Apostle Paul tells the church in Corinth that their giving is an expression of thanks to God. I want to challenge you to give thanks to the Lord by being generous with your time, talent & treasure.
| 1. | Write down 2-3 things that you are grateful for and then post it to social media and acknowledge the Lord. Psalm 107:1 says, "Give thanks to the Lord, for he is good; his love endures forever."
---|---
2. | Gather your family and share with one another what you are thankful for out loud because our words are powerful. Proverbs 18:21 says, " The tongue has the power of life and death, and those who love it will eat its fruit."
---|---
3. | Perform an act of Generosity. In 2nd Corinthians 9:12 the Apostle Paul tells the church in Corinth that their giving is an expression of thanks to God. I want to challenge you to give thanks to the Lord by being generous with your time, talent & treasure.
---|---
I also want to say how thankful Kendra and I are for your support through all the prayers and words of encouragement.
Happy Thanksgiving!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

name: Ali S. Zaidi, Team Collier
subject: Before you log off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Hi there, whether you're hosting friends, family, and neighbors this week or getting ready to travel, I know this must be a hectic time for you. So, I'm going to cut right to the chase: [**I’m writing to ask you to chip in $10 to help us meet our fundraising goal for November. The deadline for this goal is approaching, and right now, we’re coming up short. Will you make a donation today to help our campaign stay on track?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38971361/317849077/2022723758?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211124_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTNmMjFhMS01NjRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eWZt6Pvg6tSdxotKobSciI1hqjaHCbKDE72GlOKqJC0=) I'll be honest, these goals are very real and a result of Mike and the whole team creating a strategy to win — and then, working to figure out what resources we need to make it happen. | | Peter,

This is a hard email to write.
Thank you so much for signing up for emails from my campaign. This is the start of something great!

You know it and I know it, America is at the brink right now. Our so-called leaders are, all at once, incompetent, corrupt, and beholden to the dangerous ideology of Critical Race Theory. Patriotic Americans who work for a living are being left behind in the process.

In these tough times, it is important to realize we are not alone. That is why I hope you have signed up for these emails- Americans who love this country as founded have to come together if there is any hope of getting through this.

The emails you are about to receive from me will both keep you informed and remind you of why we are fighting the liberal elites.
---
| I am running for Congress because I am a small business owner who has a family to feed.

I am running because I took an oath to defend this country as a former member of the Air Force Special Operations.

I am running because America needs YOU to finally have a say in what happens.

This campaign needs your help right now. Every hour of [Volunteering](https://tommy4va.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b8fc70660f61c284cca6683cc&id=62131921f5&e=d79b9cec64) and every [Donation](https://tommy4va.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b8fc70660f61c284cca6683cc&id=1b6cabbc3c&e=d79b9cec64) helps!

Stay tuned for more.
---
| In Liberty,

Tommy Altman

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Adam Schiff
Date: Sun, Nov 21, 2021
Subject: Elaine Luria needs us right now

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38971786/317851676/1017468089?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211124_FR_EOM4SchiffFwd_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmNkY2RiNC01ODRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2IQR6i773NQhm97PsnqAi5aPEpkDIVH3BRZ8tp2nlzs=)
Folks,
Congressman Adam Schiff here. I want to talk to you about my friend and colleague, Elaine Luria.
Elaine is running in one of the most competitive swing districts in the country. She is one of the National Republican Congressional Committee's top targets in 2022. And she is up against several Republicans fundraising off of, and otherwise exploiting, Trump’s Big Lie. We can’t let them succeed.
**In order to fend off these extremist opponents, Elaine has a crucial fundraising deadline at the end of the month – [will you help her overcome these obstacles by chipping in $25 or whatever you can to her campaign right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38971787/317851677/1017468089?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211124_FR_EOM4SchiffFwd_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmNkY2RiNC01ODRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2IQR6i773NQhm97PsnqAi5aPEpkDIVH3BRZ8tp2nlzs=)**
| | [Chip in »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38971788/317851678/1017468089?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211124_FR_EOM4SchiffFwd_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25 style=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmNkY2RiNC01ODRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2IQR6i773NQhm97PsnqAi5aPEpkDIVH3BRZ8tp2nlzs=)
---
I have had the pleasure of working with Elaine in Congress for many years. She’s always willing to go the extra mile to get things done, to deliver, and she always puts her constituents first. She’s smart and asks the right questions.
Elaine has been a critical voice in Congress for keeping our elections fair and protecting our democracy – much to the chagrin of Republicans who want nothing more than to defeat her.
Trust me, I know the feeling.
The good news is that Elaine isn’t afraid to stand up to Republicans. To demand truth and accountability. And she’s certainly not going to let GOP outside spending defeat her. Last cycle, national Republicans spent _$3 million_ trying to unseat her, but she stood strong and **won**.
We will need to stand up to even stronger forces this time around. And Elaine needs your help to get the job done. clean_body: | = | | Hey everyone, I wanted to quickly reach out and make sure that you saw Congressman Adam Schiff’s email from Sunday. In case you didn’t get a chance to read it, I’ve attached it below. Congressman Schiff talks at length about the competitiveness of Elaine’s district and how she needs help from each and every one of us in order to hold her seat. That’s why I was surprised to see so few people take action and chip in to Elaine’s campaign. But, it’s not too late. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = \-- Emily Emily Sherron Finance Director Elaine Luria for Congress \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Adam Schiff Date: Sun, Nov 21, 2021 Subject: Elaine Luria needs us right now = Folks, Congressman Adam Schiff here. I want to talk to you about my friend and colleague, Elaine Luria. Elaine is running in one of the most competitive swing districts in the country. She is one of the National Republican Congressional Committee's top targets in 2022. And she is up against several Republicans fundraising off of, and otherwise exploiting, Trump’s Big Lie. We can’t let them succeed. In order to fend off these extremist opponents, Elaine has a crucial fundraising deadline at the end of the month – = | | style=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmNkY2RiNC01ODRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2IQR6i773NQhm97PsnqAi5aPEpkDIVH3BRZ8tp2nlzs= I have had the pleasure of working with Elaine in Congress for many years. She’s always willing to go the extra mile to get things done, to deliver, and she always puts her constituents first. She’s smart and asks the right questions. Elaine has been a critical voice in Congress for keeping our elections fair and protecting our democracy – much to the chagrin of Republicans who want nothing more than to defeat her. Trust me, I know the feeling. The good news is that Elaine isn’t afraid to stand up to Republicans. To demand truth and accountability. And she’s certainly not going to let GOP outside spending defeat her. Last cycle, national Republicans spent $3 million trying to unseat her, but she stood strong and won. We will need to stand up to even stronger forces this time around. And Elaine needs your help to get the job done. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for standing with her. — Congressman Adam Schiff | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Wes Moore
subject: Giving thanks to you
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38971833/317851836/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211124thanksgiving_wm_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWNkY2RiNC01ODRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b68x2oZxmeks2kjuMJXojfcH6dGAnBqi7k4a3IWb7Tc=)
---
Friends, Before we log off for the Thanksgiving holiday and enjoy coming together with our loved ones, I wanted to give thanks — to you. I am truly blessed to have a beautiful, encouraging family by my side as I embark on this journey to give back to my state of Maryland and create positive change for the people. We’ve already built something really special since I announced my candidacy to be Maryland’s next governor. In the past six months, I’ve had the pleasure and privilege to meet with Marylanders all over the state and hear your stories, your needs, and your dreams for the future. Just a few days ago, I had a ball at the Montgomery County Thanksgiving Parade walking alongside our incredible team of volunteers who came out in force to represent our vision of opportunity for all Marylanders. Events like this one remind me: _we’re just getting started._ | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38971835/317851837/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211124thanksgiving_wm_30da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWNkY2RiNC01ODRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b68x2oZxmeks2kjuMJXojfcH6dGAnBqi7k4a3IWb7Tc=)
---
This Thanksgiving, I’m truly thankful for your support. Our spirit is strong, and together, we will continue to work toward a government that works for all people across Maryland and gives everyone a seat at the table.
Have a happy, healthy Thanksgiving,
Wes

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
People keep asking what my plans are for the next election. Well, I've made a decision.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2xe54--fgxr-4qqlpo5&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2xe54-1mbx9-4qqlpo4/)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I’m 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That’s why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2xe54-1mbxa-4qqlpo4/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2xe54-1mbxb-4qqlpo5/)
---

My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2xe54-1mbxc-4qqlpo6/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2xe54-1mbxd-4qqlpo7/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2xe54-1mbxe-4qqlpo8/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |

name: National Republican Polling
subject: They’re “canceling” patriotism
body:
I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hill
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zehr302r40k91ohdg0be94p4k9atdvfsg12d69u8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctge0ob2c1h2bs) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale’s Michigan campus_ —one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zl883h7dgu6t3q6ik6lvdfhjh2ooov0uiacu7720_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctge0ob2c1h2bs)** Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty—especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several recent polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty.** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away.** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will...**
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of I _mprimis_ ...for life).
* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.
* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”
* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support.** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znov6lfv8t31em0mjd34m9ih3g4bkq4uldodp058_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctge0ob2c1h2bs)** After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost.** Warm regards, Bill Gray Associate Vice President, National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2z2r5foqvnn4i832lofj890odt3c40318j1s3u15g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvfhfq6asi8rvrctfstbgo36ut5erdqmcocl86h0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6ctjm1o31c9g649fg)

subject: Gratitude in the face of grief
body:
#AllyForUtah Update | The latest news from the Ally Isom For U.S. Senate Campaign
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qaDnnKHO9gecKtuA3YnYzP3GmvdQ8L20twnsFYauqLa1BftKwV9JT9KBxokaCjv4837gvgpFc3Q1ysqXfcjYd5fi7TDw2vKuS-bRd7y-jrSdD4snNUUwd-g7vcfk57RVf_BFJya-eKY9VzEFKvux3w==&c=YSYX2kGzNzj0BlxpkyyGuzPTGZxrjP9vw0wXNsJmqzaJ4PTBQix1rQ==&ch=qr9q1Xbwu_NSa_3TsQ5rsmmvmRfWj53cdQx-0y9vV5pzcsA2ZlMxzw==)

Friend,
This week's campaign update will look a little different than previous weeks. In light of the Thanksgiving holiday this week, I wanted to express my thoughts on gratitude.
---
|
---
|
---
| "Enjoy the little things, for one day you may look back and realize they were the big things."
Gratitude does something to your brain. I found out by keeping a daily record of those things that brought me joy. I started about six months after our daughter passed beyond life's veil, six months from a dark, numbing day when I wondered if joy would ever again be possible and even the hint of laughter induced guilt.
In a 3x4" notebook, each night I recorded the date and one to five specific things that brought me joy that day. Entries varied. It could be a person's name, a natural wonder, a simple hue, a moving poem or moment of levity. Some days, the light would cut through thick, dark clouds and divine abundance was undeniable. At other times, smothering, steel-cold grief confiscated every nook, and finding one joyous thing strained my senses. But for 365 days, I persisted.
Over time, the pattern was evident. Taking time to intentionally wire my brain to celebrate joy wove a glistening thread of gratitude and wonder through every breath of every day. Over time, gratitude helped me move beyond impenetrable shock and loss to authentically recognize growth and gains. My senses awakened. My awe deepened. That little notebook was my jewel box.
Grief is intensely personal. It becomes one's new normal. But with gratitude--with intentional patterns of gratitude, even within grief--every day can be a true celebration. Each day becomes a gem.
Thank YOU for being a part of #TeamAlly. clean_body: #AllyForUtah Update | The latest news from the Ally Isom For U.S. Senate Campaign | | | | | | | == | | | | | | Friend, This week's campaign update will look a little different than previous weeks. In light of the Thanksgiving holiday this week, I wanted to express my thoughts on gratitude. | | | "Enjoy the little things, for one day you may look back and realize they were the big things." Gratitude does something to your brain. I found out by keeping a daily record of those things that brought me joy. I started about six months after our daughter passed beyond life's veil, six months from a dark, numbing day when I wondered if joy would ever again be possible and even the hint of laughter induced guilt. In a 3x4" notebook, each night I recorded the date and one to five specific things that brought me joy that day. Entries varied. It could be a person's name, a natural wonder, a simple hue, a moving poem or moment of levity. Some days, the light would cut through thick, dark clouds and divine abundance was undeniable. At other times, smothering, steel-cold grief confiscated every nook, and finding one joyous thing strained my senses. But for 365 days, I persisted. Over time, the pattern was evident. Taking time to intentionally wire my brain to celebrate joy wove a glistening thread of gratitude and wonder through every breath of every day. Over time, gratitude helped me move beyond impenetrable shock and loss to authentically recognize growth and gains. My senses awakened. My awe deepened. That little notebook was my jewel box. Grief is intensely personal. It becomes one's new normal. But with gratitude--with intentional patterns of gratitude, even within grief--every day can be a true celebration. Each day becomes a gem. Thank YOU for being a part of #TeamAlly. Please == or == if you want to be part of the NEW DAWN for the Republican Party. We are entering a stage in the campaign where volunteers are crucial. Dedicated individuals like you can make a difference. Click == to sign up! | | | == | | | == | | | ~ Ally Isom | == == == == | | | | | Ally For Utah | 3350 S. 2940 E. #9032, SLC, UT 84109 | | Sent by mailto:info@allyforutah.com powered by

name: Rick Scott
subject: The polls are IN!
body:
Fellow conservative, The polls are in, and a majority of Americans **disapprove** of Joe Biden’s performance as President.

**Americans can agree:** **the** **Democrats are causing skyrocketing prices, rampant crime, and a dangerous crisis at the Southern border which is _bad for America._**

With more and more citizens waking up to the **truth** about the disastrous Biden Administration, we have a unique opportunity to **surge ahead in our fight to take back America in 2022.** [**TAKE BACK AMERICA**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d9db9cfab3d840b5a89236792194b88d&_e=wqkNtLeBjlvDAS68AIpLTqLTwUP306Qz93vJuRQ2f-7yY_Sureo-C72m_w9XfEfzjUsYH-KN-W8iM-iXduSlQtJ8m9923gGhPrPioNZegOSvc9mqFT7mLb25ImEkpYEKfJkLBqeeCP4lsDA3Sy-vfJ4GBXe2L8cxf3jpZz4z87Jydu5b3cRBgolxuRROEkX6mo3oAM2Gs0vsoirYUiDAmLYSX5inun0xHM2EUmCFqzMo-Ebkx-xpRFhI4pP0gk79gNASATwXogZgu4Ljym0zkW-XcWen0jej4ofY6AkODLPkuqDYAyWfFcUiF59urCstrhmT0JRHXGEz4lpk5DBmfhE8jPUDy3NrSJKDR_SkZoySyepV4J1oPzmEzbKZCYP3J8Xgwy0D2pvlW5AUkCDt3zeOvefdCnd2Ae2IxGaDuk62VKXqThAB3yyIyq1Nw3rllIO4qy3F2w-CZ6NZXTdfkQ%3D%3D) **I’m calling on 250 patriots to join our 2022 A-team now that momentum is on our side - but this chance won’t last forever.**

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: We're thankful for you 🦃
body:
https://www.mobilize.us/tndp/event/427173/ [https://www.mobilize.us/tndp/event/427173/]

Happy Thanksgiving Peter!

We are so grateful for our organizers, volunteers, activists, supporters, and everyone fighting to build a country that works for all of us. Because of you, we're in a better position than ever before to flip Tennessee blue.

But we aren't just Democrats on Election Day. We're committed to upholding Democratic values every day of the year, which is why we are doing a Holiday Food Basket Drive [https://www.mobilize.us/tndp/event/427173/] along with our County Parties to help get food to our neighbors in need this holiday season. We've already made our first donation drop for Thanksgiving, but we'll continue taking nonperishable food through December 21st. Find out more and sign up below 👇

SIGN UP [https://www.mobilize.us/tndp/event/427173/]

We couldn't do this without you. Thank you again, and we hope you and your families have a restful Thanksgiving.

Grateful,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
