name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: BRAND NEW EVENT: America Fest 2021
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2bvdokp6oesek51loablkr598rifdq2rk8kg0lo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpj3c5km9pr1dr2etgj9o9hm9orad3mcdie2dphclq7cd76cjgn6p5n6lqr0o9gcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj661pbbd9nmtgmccdgmdg6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933cpjmeo74clh60oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc883odbuh8ico0mbf7rkc967ml9ajqlaeggoe9o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctge8pb2c1h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd4iji55tecku5a9k4etmu12tcno849ej5phfhcg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctge8pb2c1h2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmggb7noe7q4kt8ian780u9jn216e3vpacecd1mg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctge8pb2c1h2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztun3568u2ma7tnprb3ep0rf59dtco6i0mqb1nu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctge8pb2c1h2bs)**[?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8cino8gpg44ossi8dqdbghrrb7d6fdd1jkb47a0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctge8pb2c1h2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1ugou5vts9bc01pr2bh0c9kpvusobqh2dnv9mh0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctge8pb2c1h2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z97avrgrjsofv1ncuhp9m2b4oo9l7420gqsu9th8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctge8pb2c1h2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdvgknj3ojajkksoiaiu7bq2s1vh4lq6j091l9eg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctge8pb2c1h2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf37ell0021v43r00c1kejsglif91uabj1au0nvg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctge8pb2c1h2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7oa0ama9498io4pp0rqiins3qc26585j2p03ugg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctge8pb2c1h2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zctcvnr9vtj13a1tp1abnnjdo0p7bjfgcu13fl9g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctge8pb2c1h2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zasaqbc46e41b0h2qh2up5ilgca94jn4tpm6913g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctge8pb2c1h2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zag5911cc5flqmqv00gqv63ps9l67uduqcpu4ld0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctge8pb2c1h2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

clean_body: This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? | | | | Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a brand new event:AmericaFest 2021! This four-day event will be the largest conservative movement event in the country —and an event like you’ve never seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals. You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona . If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, AmericaFest 2021 will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to**bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war. Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens And Many More! Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson And More Musical Guests! Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need YOUR help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for AmericaFest 2021 and have promised not to disappoint! It’s going to be awesome. Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— and so much more. If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** — With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Abigail
subject: I’m so thankful for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/JehVAPGeMkwXtBb8PtlEzPOWwUM8wMA2w7jThs7pxWE=/CsvYc3zalfuX1cWDTipdidOaCkunc4qvbsYdqbqC-IA=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211124-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

I have so much to be thankful for this year, and your support has been on my mind ahead of Thanksgiving tomorrow.

From the moment we began this campaign, I've been struck by the graciousness of people like you - people who supported me in a tough race and who believe in my work on behalf of the people of Central Virginia.

Tomorrow, I'll be volunteering, spending time with my family, and reflecting on all that I am thankful for.

With you in my corner, Peter, I know we'll win re-election next year and keep the House blue. I'll continue doing what I've always done - working tirelessly for the needs of our community.

From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving.

Grateful, as always,
Abigail
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?RobAstorino.com?=
subject: Illegals soon to be voting in NY elections
body:
When do we say "enough?" | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=e439965f2a&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| Friend,

The one-party, far-left, Democratic rule in New York has been a blessing for those living in our country illegally.

First, they were given free health care and other taxpayer-funded welfare benefits.

Then, they were given "Free College."

Next, they were given driver's licenses.

Earlier this year, they received $15,000 per individual as part of the "Excluded Workers Fund."

Now, they will soon be getting the right to vote in New York City elections.
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=e302ac63f7&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
|
This pertains to NYC, but there is legislation in the State Legislature that would grant the right to vote to non-citizens statewide.
The right to vote in any U.S. election is a right reserved for American citizens. Period.
As Westchester County Executive, Rob loved participating in naturalization ceremonies and welcoming excited and grateful new citizens. They did it the right way - the legal way - and there are over one million individuals waiting in line to earn citizenship. We should not be rewarding those who are doing it illegally and when Rob is governor, we will stop incentivizing illegal behavior and focus taxpayer resources on our veterans, infrastructure, and education, to name a few.

[**If you've had enough of the radical effort to destroy our state and country, please stand with us today.**](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=24ddd90b9b&e=3ca66fc65a)
---

[ CONTRIBUTE $100 ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=3e2632d18a&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[ CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=03993137c3&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[ CONTRIBUTE $25 ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=fc73d68084&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[ CONTRIBUTE $10 ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=04632a99c8&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[ CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=6d62a1530b&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
| Thank you,

Team Astorino
---
|

---
| _Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.
You can learn more by visiting [robastorino.com](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=d6f0facf4f&e=3ca66fc65a)._

name: Ammon Bundy for Governor
subject: Upcoming Special Events
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www
body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| Hi Peter,First, _thank you for your continued support_ \- we can't make this campaign a success without your help! :-)I wanted to reach out and let you know about a couple events on the horizon for your calendar...
* * *
**_A Christmas Evening - Black Tie Affair_**[](https://www.votebundy.com/dec11)**SATURDAY, DECEMBER 11, 2021** Enjoy with your spouse or a friend an intimate evening filled with live music, excellent food and a Christmas atmosphere. This is an opportunity to support Ammon in his bid for Idaho Governor, enjoy friends and help Keep Idaho IDAHO._This is a fundraising dinner reserved for guests 18 years and older_. Suit and tie / evening dress requested.

[**VIEW DETAILS AND PURCHASE TICKETS!**](https://www.votebundy.com/dec11)<https://www.votebundy.com/dec11>

* * *
**Virtual Townhall**[](https://www.votebundy.com/campaign-events/virtual-townhall/)**TUESDAY, DECEMBER 14TH, 2021**
This is a live and online event where you can interact with Ammon and ask him **_any_** * question on your mind. Don't miss this special event. Attendance is free, and _all_ are welcome, but _you must register to gain access_.**Also, another BIG endorsement will be announced and you'll want to be among the first to hear it!**
[**VIEW DETAILS AND REGISTER NOW!**](https://www.votebundy.com/campaign-events/virtual-townhall/)<https://www.votebundy.com/campaign-events/virtual-townhall/>

* * *
So mark your calendar _now_ , and plan to participate in both of these exciting events. Keep watch on our **Events** page ([votebundy.com/events](http://votebundy.com/events)) and **Campaign Calendar** ([votebundy.com/calendar](https://www.votebundy.com/calendar/)) for future Meet 'n' Greets, Townhalls, Convocations and other activities coming soon to your local area.We would love to see you again!
Your Friend,**Ammon Bundy**

* * *

name: Andy Ngo
subject: Assaulted 4 times for exposing Antifa
body:
Peter, I was one of the first civilians savagely beaten by lawless Antifa thugs. And unless we do something to stop them today, I'll be far from the last. **_[That's why I'm asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me fund my landmark lawsuit that will bring Antifa and their members to justice.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868338:6Kl4TO2NZ:m:1:3253819041:142F7DB9342A2BCF54839D6AAD0BD006:r) _** **You see, I was at Antifa 's "ground zero" in the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc before. I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist, to document and report on the event. As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety. The mob was angry and looking for a fight. Most of them wore masks -- and not the kind we're forced today because of coronavirus. They wanted to act like criminals without getting caught. Many had on helmets and makeshift armor. Some carried weapons like metal pipes, chains, crowbars, and even bricks. I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on. **People like you needed to know what was happening. ** But I didn't go unnoticed for long. Somebody recognized me and jeers quickly rose through the crowd. "F*** you, Andy Ngo!" and "Go home, fascist!" I tried to escape, but it was too late. **Projectiles started flying. Then came the fists. ** Before I knew it, I was being punched, kicked, and hit with flying objects. I tried to protect my head, but I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger. Not to mention they stole my camera. What they did to me is unacceptable. But this last summer, it became much worse than I could've ever imagined as Antifa set fire to entire cities for weeks on end. **And now, we 're watching Antifa and similar groups threaten mass riots and violence across the country.**
**[Will you donate $35 or more to help me cover the costs of my lawsuit against Antifa?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868338:6Kl4TO2NZ:m:1:3253819041:142F7DB9342A2BCF54839D6AAD0BD006:r)** This is bigger than me alone. You see, after I got away from the mob, police finally showed up to question me, but my attackers stole all my evidence. Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured the attack, clear as day. I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved. Wrong. To this day, over a year later, my attackers are walking free. Portland police did nothing. No charges. No convictions. No justice. It's not much of a surprise, though. You see, radical politicians have long-since bowed to the dangerous mob that terrorizes their streets. And now, as you and I are watching Antifa's nationwide takeover, more and more politicians across the country are following suit. It's so bad that the justice system is buckling under the pressure of threats of violence from these disgusting thugs. We have to stop them and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family. [_**That 's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my landmark lawsuit against Antifa and their members.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868338:6Kl4TO2NZ:m:1:3253819041:142F7DB9342A2BCF54839D6AAD0BD006:r) Because Antifa wants the end of America as we know it -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse - open anarchists who want to tear down our society and remake it in their own twisted vision. By any means necessary, **_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem. _** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. It's a sick strategy, but very smart - because so far, they've been right! **For the most part, they 've gotten off scot-free.**** ** Our politicians and media are treating this deranged terrorist group like peaceful protestors! As we've seen, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continues to escape consequences. **So now I 'm taking justice into my own hands - with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty. ** And, as I mentioned, we're suing Portland's Antifa Chapter. We've made a lot of progress in this case, but we're far from victory. [**_You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868338:6Kl4TO2NZ:m:1:3253819041:142F7DB9342A2BCF54839D6AAD0BD006:r) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger. This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't. This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe. And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver. By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. [**_Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to fund this critical lawsuit?_ ** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868338:6Kl4TO2NZ:m:1:3253819041:142F7DB9342A2BCF54839D6AAD0BD006:r) Please don't wait - if we don't fight back and win now, these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America, destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Andy Ngo Investigative Journalist P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over-- _**they 're just beginning**_. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out.[ **Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868338:6Kl4TO2NZ:m:1:3253819041:142F7DB9342A2BCF54839D6AAD0BD006:r) [**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868338:6Kl4TO2NZ:m:1:3253819041:142F7DB9342A2BCF54839D6AAD0BD006:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868338:6Kl4TO2NZ:m:1:3253819041:142F7DB9342A2BCF54839D6AAD0BD006:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868338:6Kl4TO2NZ:m:1:3253819041:142F7DB9342A2BCF54839D6AAD0BD006:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58868339:6Kl4TO2NZ:m:1:3253819041:142F7DB9342A2BCF54839D6AAD0BD006:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

name: Morgan Harper
subject: Thinking of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Taking a moment to personally thank you and share our next steps.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211124-413-footer-ak&t=2&akid=413%2E90090%2EHiOEY5)
**I wanted to take this opportunity to personally wish you an early happy Thanksgiving!** With Thanksgiving quickly approaching, I’ve been thinking about how grateful I am to have your support.
Growing up in Columbus, Ohio after I was adopted by my mother, I quickly saw how in the toughest of times, we always had community. We had friends and neighbors looking out for us. I think that in today’s world we’ve lost some of that magic.
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15799?t=3&akid=413%2E90090%2EHiOEY5)
That’s why it’s been so important to me to build a people-powered, community-centered movement for a better Ohio. Every day I fight for a state that works for everyone, where folks are uplifted and feel like there’s opportunity to grow, live, and thrive here.
Honestly, November has been a tough fundraising month. The entire Morganize team is taking a much deserved break for the Thanksgiving holiday. [**_Before we take a break from fundraising could you rush $5 to our campaign so we can start back up strong?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15799?t=4&akid=413%2E90090%2EHiOEY5)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15805?refcode=em20211124-413&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=413%2E90090%2EHiOEY5)**
I know we can accomplish so much before the new year. We’ve already seen the power that progressives in Congress can have on bold life-saving policy. **I will be a progressive voice in Congress and vote YES on policies that will help communities just like mine growing up.**
[**_Before Thanksgiving tomorrow, can you put your faith in me and contribute $5_****? It would mean a lot to have your support before we break for the holiday.**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15799?t=24&akid=413%2E90090%2EHiOEY5)
Wishing you a safe and happy holiday,
Morgan
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/15799?t=25&akid=413%2E90090%2EHiOEY5)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211124-413-footer&t=26&refcode2=413_90090_HiOEY5&akid=413%2E90090%2EHiOEY5)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=413%2E90090%2EHiOEY5)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

name: Max Steiner
subject: Thanksgiving
body:
I hope you have the opportunity to spend tomorrow with family and friends, and are able to take some time to reflect on everything we have to be grateful for. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38973177/317857975/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGZiZDMyNy01ZjRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amrJRRidlT-WLUSG3fUqu_wPk1XzcBQXoT89o5Cb47A=)
Happy Thanksgiving, friend.

For many of us, this will be our first time celebrating under the same roof with family and friends since the pandemic began. That’s something I am especially grateful for, and I hope you have the opportunity to spend the day with loved ones too. But if you’re not, that’s okay -- I hope your day is just as joyful and relaxing.

The last couple years have been incredibly challenging -- whether it was dealing with the pandemic, the wildfires, or just the increasingly tense political environment. That’s a big reason I'm doing my part to help unify our communities and fight for a better future for all of us -- not just here in the North State, but across the entire country.

I'm so grateful for all the support you've provided thus far, and I hope you and your family have a great Thanksgiving.

Thank you,

Max Steiner
Veteran for Congress

[](http://links.keeneyforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aed21f976a07410f8206002471f0b00c&_m=da1ebb9f639042be87001a61af6b7e77&_e=2aPNRlmoOR8tQQTt2mXkkF2c1tBcCM5nPR1N-Ggn_-RRY8Dbt5Qn5A8WsiVp1H7_Y1zqy-7jPuyWtNmJUZgcYOOgAPXUyN2e3HgLy-fyFSre8i5zKo82Rw5qay5NwGaorZYe811Dx73C8pUJl7_Dbkd_oUtDL0904G0KWiF7AA-gn6ysP4cxkCaXzDw9rA1zZWdzatPmxG-L0mqF-slJmQWnxDo-wXL7AESUsx1f66w1-XDoOxbMc1wt0XKAM8TFZ-f_B69ivjmVno73BBTVNJCUcGiny1w9Fuk-r_Y-QAcoISBIUC-KhTbpgJ1_3M-qUOh0PRQrK4_a3xhhBot8j83Mfo8OZTViYQQmcY2kQcqq11GSe-GXp18OHyCH223WYos6ek-mltM6wGMSNm8ZG6rPdP_xTKN5GPROOaw6PyEL7hB6mus_wxGDkrYyfP9nDwoX0-Fi93ROEJDlTgD3ecV2xwOzRrKdKCBy_q0eJjtX7HMQjKRo2MJ0oJ8Csj2w)

Hi friendーI'm Taylor Keeney, and I’m a Republican running for Congress in Virginia’s 7th Congressional District.
I’m not just another career politician running for office. I’m a true political outsider who wants to bring a fresh voice to Congress.

I’m a _constitutional conservative_ , a _proven leader in my community_ , and most importantly, a _wife and mom to two incredible children_.

_**Family means everything to me.**_

[](http://links.keeneyforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aed21f976a07410f8206002471f0b00c&_m=da1ebb9f639042be87001a61af6b7e77&_e=2aPNRlmoOR8tQQTt2mXkkF2c1tBcCM5nPR1N-Ggn_-RRY8Dbt5Qn5A8WsiVp1H7_Y1zqy-7jPuyWtNmJUZgcYOOgAPXUyN2e3HgLy-fyFSre8i5zKo82Rw5qay5NwGaorZYe811Dx73C8pUJl7_Dbkd_oUtDL0904G0KWiF7AA-gn6ysP4cxkCaXzDw9rA1zZWdzatPmxG-L0mqF-slJmQWnxDo-wXL7AESUsx1f66w1-XDoOxbMc1wt0XKAM8TFZ-f_B69ivjmVno73BBTVNJCUcGiny1w9Fuk-r_Y-QAe1UxFTYHgsvELvDAXzJSPtB9phIyJWWvkvsVgfdpWGvYEKd7cA7xLKEUZ7TEp4Q3luae1XhMRMrpHynsTRbwEO5qTUj8hHWNBMx8jPUyKcBBC4IWZCaL4PMumk1OrxlR1eOgdE2lkjkV4R9zO5uFqIsaxG76scS10lPGJx1s0cLXmlt75zK5ak3XE811wIcnQSFfR1mNffbsFwu5gLUPXo)

That’s why when I saw families in need in my community, I stepped up to help.

I wanted to make sure no child in the Richmond Region was going without clean diapers, a safe place to sleep, or clothes to wear, and so, in 2019, while on maternity leave, I founded **Little Hands Virginia**.__

[](http://links.keeneyforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aed21f976a07410f8206002471f0b00c&_m=da1ebb9f639042be87001a61af6b7e77&_e=2aPNRlmoOR8tQQTt2mXkkF2c1tBcCM5nPR1N-Ggn_-RRY8Dbt5Qn5A8WsiVp1H7_Y1zqy-7jPuyWtNmJUZgcYOOgAPXUyN2e3HgLy-fyFSre8i5zKo82Rw5qay5NwGaorZYe811Dx73C8pUJl7_Dbkd_oUtDL0904G0KWiF7AA-gn6ysP4cxkCaXzDw9rA1zZWdzatPmxG-L0mqF-slJmQWnxDo-wXL7AESUsx1f66w1-XDoOxbMc1wt0XKAM8TFZ-f_B69ivjmVno73BBTVNJCUcGiny1w9Fuk-r_Y-QAd30lcK3iYyFK5cF-tHEKsstvcfP12MqKJEqfq7q_OkMof6eTOr664h0cBr7C8AAGwrcMUKREgv2uQd0kxAWRde-hU58JAdaYqpjquJdXZRPeZWvcDeYLpN8o7XN-728BkPrEe_7AVXaR9Vp0R5URFzTyF-9-pB4y6sf2CkVRM8W6xUn6ACJc_lMZZa5FTN5B8fQScLjSNjpMBIiA7Sx7En)

In less than two years, we ensured that 700 children had the essentials they needed and will serve over 1,000 children in 2021 alone.

I have seen the issues facing our community firsthand, and when I see a problem, I jump in.
**My top priority is to leave the great commonwealth of Virginia and America better for our children. **

That’s why it frustrates me to see Democrats like Abigail Spanberger ruin this great commonwealth and country. **She pretends to be a moderate but governs like a radical in Congress,**_**and this year has voted with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time.**_

That’s because Democrats are all after the same goal: tax you relentlessly to pay for their socialist agenda, take away your rights and freedoms, and pass the consequences down to our children:

Spend Endlessly ➡ **Indebting our Children**
Defund Police ➡ **Increasing Crime and Putting Families at Risk**
Lockdown our States ➡ **Shuttering Small Businesses and Destroying Communities**

Democrats are selling out America’s future, our children’s future, for more power!

I want to set an example not only for my children but for the rest of America: when you see a problem, you don’t wait around, hoping someone else will fix it.

**I’m running for Congress because despite what Democrats and the media tell you, America and what it stands for is worth defending.**

_**And that’s exactly what this mom is doing!**_

[](http://links.keeneyforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aed21f976a07410f8206002471f0b00c&_m=da1ebb9f639042be87001a61af6b7e77&_e=2aPNRlmoOR8tQQTt2mXkkF2c1tBcCM5nPR1N-Ggn_-RRY8Dbt5Qn5A8WsiVp1H7_Y1zqy-7jPuyWtNmJUZgcYOOgAPXUyN2e3HgLy-fyFSre8i5zKo82Rw5qay5NwGaorZYe811Dx73C8pUJl7_Dbkd_oUtDL0904G0KWiF7AA-gn6ysP4cxkCaXzDw9rA1zZWdzatPmxG-L0mqF-slJmQWnxDo-wXL7AESUsx1f66w1-XDoOxbMc1wt0XKAM8TFZ-f_B69ivjmVno73BBTVNJCUcGiny1w9Fuk-r_Y-QAfa2eAc7uc-qG2KQbcLlwcuqK-Rnd5Mh6dMsC0fHAi15vYuJ8KJ9FiioEHvEEGlSBqgRldKbcHY9UZodab5c5gMfU-IF2nnA2ggLbeZEoX5kYzgKG37dQ4OT-7OPwhlu6jzWRtZgDoj5UUuIPJ8_6q41b_e4Mo_CYkQ8Ba_WHPD0ebOOvMlfwUNxi1tmp5DeO5HazUfZ7dWD8Sh4eHOa4Nx)

Friend, it’s going to take patriots from all walks of life to stand up to the radical Left.

_[**Will you join my fight to safeguard Virginia and America’s future for our children by rushing an initial donation of $5, $10, or even $25 right now?**](http://links.keeneyforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aed21f976a07410f8206002471f0b00c&_m=da1ebb9f639042be87001a61af6b7e77&_e=2aPNRlmoOR8tQQTt2mXkkF2c1tBcCM5nPR1N-Ggn_-RRY8Dbt5Qn5A8WsiVp1H7_Y1zqy-7jPuyWtNmJUZgcYOOgAPXUyN2e3HgLy-fyFSre8i5zKo82Rw5qay5NwGaorZYe811Dx73C8pUJl7_Dbkd_oUtDL0904G0KWiF7AA-gn6ysP4cxkCaXzDw9rA1zZWdzatPmxG-L0mqF-slJmQWnxDo-wXL7AESUsx1f66w1-XDoOxbMc1wt0XKAM8TFZ-f_B69ivjmVno73BBTVNJCUcGiny1w9Fuk-r_Y-QAeTby5vaC2x75ndWRrY5JCzPCOVI3BZQv4oJTQHzVMSrhMTFAxNcMBQHOMA09qdo1W7I4nFJJnRvjMvj-r_1VNYK2Co0EQFL_5_7HyixLZXnsGM1LPGMvAm2wqREWpTWEVsOCUl4cCKch5ErY9dICUz645EbXWt_vYAUKGDcIMdBBlmI5O9ppa5_Z-K1Rq4Y8CkRzNDFmIcm7nsk30GjC6e)_

Thank you,
Taylor Keeney

name: Marisa Wood (personal)
subject: Thankful
body:
My husband John and I are so thankful for our family and friends who enrich our life and bring joy to our hearts, not to mention our neighbors and this community. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38973400/317861429/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTlhYmMxZC02MTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zF7TLD8ImRl2_nZbz1p5rgd_B6PINgUkQSx6Ve_g9BU=)
I'll keep this brief, friend.

My husband John and I are so thankful for our family and friends who enrich our lives and bring joy to our hearts.

We hope you have the opportunity to spend the day tomorrow surrounded by those who sustain you and make life's challenges a little easier to face.

We're also thinking about those less fortunate who are unable to spend time with family and friends due to work obligations or issues with health. We're keeping you in our thoughts and prayers as always, and hope that you are able to find the strength and energy to overcome the challenges you face.

This campaign is about confronting the challenges our communities face head-on, while offering a new vision for the future. On this Thanksgiving, John and I want to share our genuine appreciation for you and your support.

Thanks a million, and Happy Thanksgiving!

Marisa

name: Doug Gansler
subject: What are you thankful for this year?
body:
Thanksgiving is just around the corner and I’m taking some time to think about all the things I’m thankful for this year. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk_ehETlmzyrjZM1AWCic10Uqx4CBFAz9XbK2bPk35xaXQuZeBJhjqCw4D1vqcXdEXi67J3oupRsPapXVsDz1S2BAecw50H6GpX80H0wDvz4788mA28OygjqKt5aeZujzv6ML1mFbc7Z_UN_PUrQckCgMRiRkMrUbljTQydvZCADWuS16M5MakehuGcAR5w1qF6lsU8wypcKhgf-V6sSD77NNATNfvGQziK3cjgR83sDpgSZXI1SkEGKB8JIgL535w/3ha/WfoVmgRqTTexZfwMG_wldQ/h0/pHAP-OAeXMr3QkW7d1qZIaiv8ocMsTKqnekeX88Bg48)
---
Hi friends,
---
Thanksgiving is just around the corner and I'm taking some time to think about all the things I'm thankful for this year. First off, I am so thankful for my family: for my sons, Sam and Will, and for my dog, Jack. I'm thankful to live in the great state of Maryland, for our beautiful nature and for the community I call home. I'm thankful for the Orioles having the top-rated farm system in the MLB. And of course, **I'm thankful for** you**!** For every single person who has shown interest and supported our campaign - thank you. I'm running for Governor for you and every single Marylander. I've met some amazing people in my time campaigning for Governor so far, and I look forward to meeting so many more of you in the upcoming year. Until then, I want to take this opportunity to get to know you all better. **[So, I want to hear from you: what are you thankful for this year?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk_ehETlmzyrjZM1AWCic10Uqx4CBFAz9XbK2bPk35xaXQuZeBJhjqCw4D1vqcXdEXi67J3oupRsPapXVsDz1S2Lsbsd8KeX5S9QaSomEN0RVYWdKR3siZtouNp7l6H9EDtEIR7SB4sEKDDQhaTKEW07bj593ui9UlfdYrLiJscq8FDbF4sy-d6oHuygWjUYVV7ZS-DRH-gN1KMFCyIHXXNDqYBni_kSEZq2XqVo8ewvN1lFXgwZKS6qjdxND7mf18/3ha/WfoVmgRqTTexZfwMG_wldQ/h1/8InplmTPunjlh53AS1QNgS8yk26aB0zjRRwZsU71M6k)**
---
[ **TELL ME WHAT YOU'RE THANKFUL FOR ->**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk_ehETlmzyrjZM1AWCic10Uqx4CBFAz9XbK2bPk35xaXQuZeBJhjqCw4D1vqcXdEXi67J3oupRsPapXVsDz1S2OiAuiToTopz2cSCVD6jG08x00kioOudUCp3iuf3lsgoAr8KzgTr36ynMzNd_ChjkUxCI4qLZGwDrdSjVVdWMsJaC2KqVgZSOzeTx0Pnz1pkPPoi6l5N9ZUKDYn4asaeflyMMDo40dYUGKrfFGVjAorqXIqY7AeNzS6Q6LMTxXwk/3ha/WfoVmgRqTTexZfwMG_wldQ/h2/A4WzZYB0eXJIwFCCq4m5hjtQitbB0jFKqXv-iZfLihg)
---
I'm so thankful to call Maryland my home, and yet, there is so much about our state that can be improved. That's why I'm running - to use my experience and vision to make real change in our great state.**I hope you'll join me in my mission to make Maryland better for everyone.** Happy Thanksgiving! 🦃 Doug
---
[ **DONATE**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzuiUShEtXoU52QtoxV1eZTN4El4qeC15DA5VdeIv11s9PtIyHXJl3KLqphMvsJ9TsL_9m4riB8FHBuaiR2Tsn2drvPBveWzHdMY_gvPsMQ1ReCQKVw2O-hRARNhR754KLAutAxG3BCrNjA_FlD2qba8ofqE6jMlpik1phsthj-mv8w8oboKEtJPOMh29QmPJmC2cnxvprBNlA9pQ2L9L4xsttvLjQorwfsFgGYL7CqMTW7KqSNAOXZQRlZ0DHlA6ngdhWI0nzqNyNt-GCPvmrzgICnwAyQWwDkPnkqUov573GLMwpUyQ-aomKxjwH93DB6A/3ha/WfoVmgRqTTexZfwMG_wldQ/h3/_ZtvKImo7XI8SbGqbR6aY2aWMU-1zKYt8FI66Hz3d0o)

clean_body: Thanksgiving is just around the corner and I’m taking some time to think about all the things I’m thankful for this year. | | Hi friends, Thanksgiving is just around the corner and I'm taking some time to think about all the things I'm thankful for this year. First off, I am so thankful for my family: for my sons, Sam and Will, and for my dog, Jack. I'm thankful to live in the great state of Maryland, for our beautiful nature and for the community I call home. I'm thankful for the Orioles having the top-rated farm system in the MLB. And of course, I'm thankful for you! For every single person who has shown interest and supported our campaign - thank you. I'm running for Governor for you and every single Marylander. I've met some amazing people in my time campaigning for Governor so far, and I look forward to meeting so many more of you in the upcoming year. Until then, I want to take this opportunity to get to know you all better. I'm so thankful to call Maryland my home, and yet, there is so much about our state that can be improved. That's why I'm running - to use my experience and vision to make real change in our great state.I hope you'll join me in my mission to make Maryland better for everyone. Happy Thanksgiving! 🦃 Doug By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Friends of Doug Gansler, please .

subject: Thank you for your consistent support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Putorti for Congress
body:
I want to dedicate this Thanksgiving to thanking you for your confidence in me and the movement we are building.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38973442/317861732/1720206612?refcode=BLU-PUT-20211124-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTEzYWExNy02MTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMoiCOUUjbOLYXmwOK5prjJU8dSa0KbvRoQYrRJkpPA=)

| I want to take a moment to express my gratitude for your unwavering support of our campaign. We’re building something special here in the North Country – a coalition of grassroots supporters who believe in a better future for our community.

I’m working hard to improve the lives of Upstate New Yorkers. My family and I have deep roots here, dating back to my great-grandmother who immigrated to the U.S. from Italy as a child and opened a grocery store in her home that my parents still operate. The North Country means the world to me and I’m eager to represent it in Congress so I can give back to a community that has given so much to me.

**I know you believe in the movement we’re amassing here, and I want to dedicate tomorrow's Thanksgiving to thanking you for your confidence in me and the campaign we are building.**

Thank you and Happy Thanksgiving,

Matt

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: quick note
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

I wanted to reach out before Thanksgiving and, well, say thanks. I’m
grateful that we’ve had your support this year. Here’s just some of what
you helped us accomplish:

Five campaign launches for progressive primary challengers. Without you,
we couldn’t have had such incredible launches for Odessa Kelly, Rana
Abdelhamid, Kina Collins, Jessica Cisneros, and Summer Lee. With your
help, our primary campaigns have gotten off to fast fundraising starts and
made national headlines.

Jessica is less than 90 days from early voting. We’ve asked folks to chip
into her campaign several times, so she can build the momentum and voter
contact operation right now to win, and our supporters have come through.
We can win this race together.

We’ve shown our strength when corporate Democrats try to stop
progressives. Justice Democrats in Congress ensured progressive priorities
like climate action and universal pre-K remained in the Build Back Better
Act in the House. And when centrists try to blame progressives for
corporate Democrats losing elections, we stand up and counter the
mainstream scapegoat narrative.

So, thank you, Peter.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84530?refcode=em20211124-20649&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=20649%2E1203867%2EJdBa_9 ]Our momentum is growing but it will take a mountain of continued
support to win our primaries and build the progressive movement. Can you
chip in $3 today so we can continue our work together?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84530?refcode=em20211124-20649&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=20649%2E1203867%2EJdBa_9 ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director, Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=20649%2E1203867%2EJdBa_9 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=20649%2E1203867%2EJdBa_9 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211124-20649-footer&t=1006&refcode2=20649_1203867_JdBa_9&akid=20649%2E1203867%2EJdBa_9

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=20649%2E1203867%2EJdBa_9

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: You’d probably rather be getting ready for the holiday than reading this email, so I’ll keep this quick! | | | Peter, Listen, it’s the day before Thanksgiving. You’d probably rather be getting ready for the holiday than reading this email, so I’ll keep this quick! My team shared with me that we’ve had a tough fundraising month, and we’re really pushing to hit 500 contributions by November 30th to get us back on track. I can’t tell you how much this grassroots team means to me. Every day, I’m blown away by how strong y’all fight for me, for a brighter future for Nashville, and for progressive change across the country. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Have a happy Thanksgiving tomorrow, and thank you so much for your support. 🦃 In gratitude, Odessa Odessa Kelly Candidate for Tennessee’s 5th Congressional District | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

Subject: Tell us: Why are you in this fight?
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_ Peter, we want to know: **[Why do you want to primary Kyrsten Sinema?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnls1-fa6y_I3_sHa1h_5i5w8k4T7QKuMvCga60_gowatGkkYCLoSS4wjMxmcWtdpWlu6jha8hBBezi0IhMaDr1VFiwmo2WL3EEFajAL0lB6vPmYjccXwml55mUwZS2HLeXM5VJjMjUJzuDzZTb6-yKD-WwLnOZXtrZft8GGrhmgYh-pz-yHr5YuKK-2l6EvH0hOEW__lksZCU8J43_MwR47zjd2D7WBSPv7Q24AAv6-w5eCIVL_sC3ZnPNs06AQQOwdvX11WO10-eci7NBgfZkYB9xv0uUTR4WRvcf5AfWX3A/3ha/yWFu6nXoSnC70-THuk69rw/h2/1JdRaxB5ESD7iEtmM8-zzxS4c8M7KYewSDhiBktyIK8)** [Tell us more »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnls1-fa6y_I3_sHa1h_5i5w8k4T7QKuMvCga60_gowatGkkYCLoSS4wjMxmcWtdpWlu6jha8hBBezi0IhMaDr1VFiwmo2WL3EEFajAL0lB6vKXfafSkU7jqOHwc5906P3Qu0684t4w9DSIXqRbZBpLNlcld62o6VXzLewFdJmqSC4VjkxU0gA1p0zoXtAllqfAhOD7EhuL7MbtaJpPwUXmawHBxqXZDnxrpVn8JO0JHznpVWvKaEron7ZGhiwXCHGvw4Wq5PbEAlGQ_Io2H8hDWGr0SkaUs5Rb6cpqb6kQiRg/3ha/yWFu6nXoSnC70-THuk69rw/h3/2G_6jz-ypcz9vFiQhbiTBT1EDxRWh2WJJwYiTFikF_Q) Here's why we want to primary Sinema, and why we're in this fight:
* **Senator Sinema has obstructed President Biden's agenda for long enough.** She's obstructed his agenda on issues ranging from health care to education, from climate change to immigration, voting rights and more.
* **Sinema has empowered both Mitch McConnell and Republicans at the expense of the rest of us.** Arizonans deserve two U.S. Senators who will fight for their priorities — and we definitely don't deserve a Senator who goes out of their way to prevent progress from happening.
* **Change is possible — but ousting an incumbent Senator is hard work, and it doesn't happen overnight.** When it comes to voter education, outreach, and organizing, it's earlier the better. We're working closely with grassroots organizations on the ground in Arizona who are leading the fight to hold Sinema accountable and helping to lay the foundation for a successful primary challenge.

**[As an early supporter of our Primary Sinema Project, we want to hear more from you — specifically, why you're in this fight with us — to help inform our strategy moving forward in 2022 and beyond. So, will you take two minutes to tell us in a few words why you want to primary Sinema?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnls1-fa6y_I3_sHa1h_5i5w8k4T7QKuMvCga60_gowatGkkYCLoSS4wjMxmcWtdpWlu6jha8hBBezi0IhMaDr1VFiwmo2WL3EEFajAL0lB6vKoz0re95mPxCg2Cgoo19grd-Sapuz2SCtpXwYAizU64gLyncLe9oUmWJmsjgJfhPVcsjvul4S1XRsfj4L9JtgTvA_gno6X6KQGdgu-OAXIHHPzEOfleZPQkuQKXpt0hbRqMf4RP1zip24L5JVEMRfXMC6huY3byxvHmBNueLepOiwLk6G3wpBaEpVRjVCYX7g/3ha/yWFu6nXoSnC70-THuk69rw/h4/QBUJt2clqJ9hRNULWa4poXglUW4ub3sgooR7Elu5N3w)** [Tell us more »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnls1-fa6y_I3_sHa1h_5i5w8k4T7QKuMvCga60_gowatGkkYCLoSS4wjMxmcWtdpWlu6jha8hBBezi0IhMaDr1VFiwmo2WL3EEFajAL0lB6vI2y5vXT-y9_73AH2KS2YyMbTOS1he5KQSyqN7tZzP8IfATE14LsTModhimMLsoQI7k3VCT58sqS_zO6Nga5QmUNI64QaE_g_mEbGiR-n9Ptyc__8pS3DgFuISBVylujE4joWC2gCarEBjr7sKw9-LTaQ8vEMLc_V6wJlN_ytLbPemZki2RZQVqcxr3CCM9jNA/3ha/yWFu6nXoSnC70-THuk69rw/h5/6Usln3MAyfqX-dVG7xA_Ghih1O-uxqfJsJ8dsHRzWr0) Thank you, The Primary Sinema team

subject: Thank you, Biden, for the most expensive Thanksgiving ever
body:
Sorry, America, the turkey might not be on every table this year — because this Thanksgiving is on track to be the most expensive ever... |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=761d28b804&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | Dear Friend, **Sorry, America, the turkey might not be on every table this year — because this Thanksgiving is on track to be the most expensive****ever****. ** **And you can thank Joe Biden!** _Massive spending bills, small business restrictions, and outsourcing of energy and jobs overseas are crippling the American economy._ The purchasing power of working class Americans is shrinking - while the liberal elite’s portfolios only grow larger. Of course, this was all part of the plan. **The Democrats seek to take power from the American people and shift it over to the swamp bureaucrats who support them.** ****
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=8720f48676&e=c2296cffff)
---
| [STOP BIDEN](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=4d105d296a&e=c2296cffff "STOP BIDEN")
---
| **While Americans struggle to put food on the table for Thanksgiving and face skyrocketing gas prices to see family and friends****, the left continues to make things worse.** [**Can Amanda Makki count on your support in her fight to retake the House and end Bidenflation?**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=986be8272f&e=c2296cffff)

| [HELP AMANDA FIGHT INFLATION](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=d69f47252f&e=c2296cffff "HELP AMANDA FIGHT INFLATION")
---
| **Thank you for joining us,**

_Team Makki_
---
| _Amanda Makki for Congress_**|[Visit our website](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=f505231fc1&e=c2296cffff)**

The purchasing power of working class Americans is shrinking - while the liberal elite’s portfolios only grow larger. Of course, this was all part of the plan. name: Melanie D'Arrigo
subject: Medicare for All - The Numbers to Know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | As an allied health professional, I’ve worked to help families get the care they need without going into debt.
But it’s not always possible. The United States is the _only_ industrialized nation where it’s common to declare bankruptcy from medical expenses.
**I’m running for Congress to pass Medicare for All because I’ve seen the broken, overly complicated healthcare system from the inside.**
******[Peter Willis, I’m rejecting corporate PAC and lobbyist money, which means I need your help to win. Can you donate to my campaign today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC-o930whjiL8nngrxwQzyy7pVRD-PmSc8QBIt8WF3uBGuExIl5-55AgOZJnHd4MCGWZDaxBp2HobYjrwX1P0PgznwLjIpDsgLFpt2_e2e8LdIlw6GppGllizbpPioarBzcLwykJJ6v36etb2g8J94xtwfhK45b59zxOfqO8ld7zZs_B-74LXoZKW4S6rUtAdJMW7B5-mDqjpx302XLmdhbHSIoAhsAILqfEVHM7PTY_EPJarA-uNSfBTHotCFEY_OnBbzng3Lkg6kH-3sQMy3IOlrsmXBCMGPGG3j6W2J0J5SpZH_l0s-Rd4BzBtb3tyns/3ha/EVhzx83ATumsHqywBAgGtQ/h0/Bzb1HMyvqJ3LlXtf54L5ADWiKx1id7yUTIOu9Ajc2TU)**
Tens of thousands of Americans die each year because they lack healthcare and millions more go into debt.
Progressive Democrats like myself support Medicare for All, which is the only healthcare policy that would bring both of those numbers to zero.
Here are some numbers to know about Medicare for All:

# 100%
100% of Americans would have healthcare if we passed Medicare For All.

# 68,000
68,000 lives would be saved each year if we passed Medicare For All.

# 0
With Medicare for All, there would be no co-pays, deductibles or premiums.

# $450,000,000,000
Medicare For All would save $450 billion a year compared to our current healthcare system.

# 2,300,000
Medicare For All would create 2.3 to 17 million new healthcare jobs in the U.S.

# $83,000
The average small medical practice would save $83,000 per year under Medicare For All.
**Medicare For All would save money, boost our economy and most importantly, save lives.**
We have the collective power to change the system. The only thing stopping us are the insurance lobbyists and the politicians they bribe— it’s that simple.
**[The health insurance lobby will spend _big_ to defeat our campaign for Medicare for All. But I know we can fight back with people power. Can you donate to my campaign today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC-o930whjiL8nngrxwQzyy7eZVUxEGszKh24rVuTj1Bxe-jVjTjFPngrctV6_J0u3mGNSyUzDu611ri0ahNQTtRR9l2klD-1UXv3AJyDWL0-gb5m0lx7GXq8tfrXJ7qQjzsXK4Zz1LAT6pNZaUXM7-Q39diWAQ4sH1UWZrL1yav6BibN7HTIlogTnPSRA3NkF3lbNyr1LFcqEMdlaGkeagDeougc3y9yVQMdeDHUsDCU2UNDjCoIsrqZIP1uuVEw69z9ECWfZc-KkNzGNG5Jd02mv9hdvIAjRwJC_UFXkmkMbZfukMqKyTCOqUca8aDFh0/3ha/EVhzx83ATumsHqywBAgGtQ/h1/XVFPyzrU9XXcfSvXMqtRgNFRhf-iQxtJbbzQaVMoGxU)**

clean_body: | | | As an allied health professional, I’ve worked to help families get the care they need without going into debt. But it’s not always possible. The United States is the only industrialized nation where it’s common to declare bankruptcy from medical expenses. I’m running for Congress to pass Medicare for All because I’ve seen the broken, overly complicated healthcare system from the inside. **** Tens of thousands of Americans die each year because they lack healthcare and millions more go into debt. Progressive Democrats like myself support Medicare for All, which is the only healthcare policy that would bring both of those numbers to zero. Here are some numbers to know about Medicare for All: 100% 100% of Americans would have healthcare if we passed Medicare For All. 68,000 68,000 lives would be saved each year if we passed Medicare For All. 0 With Medicare for All, there would be no co-pays, deductibles or premiums. $450,000,000,000 Medicare For All would save $450 billion a year compared to our current healthcare system. 2,300,000 Medicare For All would create 2.3 to 17 million new healthcare jobs in the U.S. $83,000 The average small medical practice would save $83,000 per year under Medicare For All. Medicare For All would save money, boost our economy and most importantly, save lives. We have the collective power to change the system. The only thing stopping us are the insurance lobbyists and the politicians they bribe— it’s that simple. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | Thank you for building with me. — Melanie is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. If you’d rather contribute by check, feel free to make the check out to the following address: Friends of Melanie Darrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo | | Sent via . subject: These two words are simply never enough...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Asking for assistance is not a skill of mine, but with tireless effort promoting American values and principles on the campaign trail and in office, I will repay you. Your confidence that I can be an influential member of Congress is not taken for granted and I will do my best to guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American. Friend, recently you've indicated support for my campaign for US Congress. "Thank you" is never enough, but I am very grateful. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38974328/317867380/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjk0Y2IxOS02OTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AXs-P1iHrAf-ItbNXpdOTCo3-bPD1RAQu27OlpH8Yp4=) [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38974329/317867381/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjk0Y2IxOS02OTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AXs-P1iHrAf-ItbNXpdOTCo3-bPD1RAQu27OlpH8Yp4=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38974330/317867382/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjk0Y2IxOS02OTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AXs-P1iHrAf-ItbNXpdOTCo3-bPD1RAQu27OlpH8Yp4=) Without your generosity, Friend, we would not be able to challenge Jack Bergman to represent Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula in Congress. Asking for assistance is not a skill of mine, but saying thank you comes more naturally. As I campaign across the district, I am honored and grateful to have supporters like you in my corner. I will repay my donors with tireless effort promoting true American values and principles on the campaign trail and in office – principles like wisdom, honesty, courage, justice, and freedom. I appreciate your consideration and you can rest assured your contribution to our campaign is going a long way. Together, **[with your support](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38974331/317867383/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjk0Y2IxOS02OTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AXs-P1iHrAf-ItbNXpdOTCo3-bPD1RAQu27OlpH8Yp4=)** , we can fulfill the needs of our communities' everyday citizens and working families. I'm confident I can be an influential member of Congress and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American. Here's a look at some of the policies I will fight for: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38974332/317867384/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjk0Y2IxOS02OTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AXs-P1iHrAf-ItbNXpdOTCo3-bPD1RAQu27OlpH8Yp4=) If you agree, **[can you make a contribution today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38974333/317867385/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjk0Y2IxOS02OTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AXs-P1iHrAf-ItbNXpdOTCo3-bPD1RAQu27OlpH8Yp4=)**? If you have questions, my door is open. I want to hear from the district. So, please reach out to **info@votedrbob.com** and my team will get the messages directly to me. I look forward to working with you and for you. I will be blessed to be a part of your giving and so grateful for your support. Friend, please extend my appreciation to your family and friends ahead of this holiday season and have a blessed Thanksgiving. Very Sincerely, – Dr. Bob [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38974334/317867386/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjk0Y2IxOS02OTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AXs-P1iHrAf-ItbNXpdOTCo3-bPD1RAQu27OlpH8Yp4=) [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38974335/317867387/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjk0Y2IxOS02OTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AXs-P1iHrAf-ItbNXpdOTCo3-bPD1RAQu27OlpH8Yp4=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38974336/317867388/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjk0Y2IxOS02OTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AXs-P1iHrAf-ItbNXpdOTCo3-bPD1RAQu27OlpH8Yp4=) If you believe you received this message in error, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2a7ff90f-674d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/ab94cb19-694d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjk0Y2IxOS02OTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AXs-P1iHrAf-ItbNXpdOTCo3-bPD1RAQu27OlpH8Yp4=&id=116937387). "Thank you" is never enough, but I am very grateful. = = = Without your generosity, Friend, we would not be able to challenge Jack Bergman to represent Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula in Congress. Asking for assistance is not a skill of mine, but saying thank you comes more naturally. As I campaign across the district, I am honored and grateful to have supporters like you in my corner. I will repay my donors with tireless effort promoting true American values and principles on the campaign trail and in office – principles like wisdom, honesty, courage, justice, and freedom. I appreciate your consideration and you can rest assured your contribution to our campaign is going a long way. Together, = , we can fulfill the needs of our communities' everyday citizens and working families. I'm confident I can be an influential member of Congress and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American. Here's a look at some of the policies I will fight for: = If you agree, =? If you have questions, my door is open. I want to hear from the district. So, please reach out to info@votedrbob.com and my team will get the messages directly to me. I look forward to working with you and for you. I will be blessed to be a part of your giving and so grateful for your support. Friend, please extend my appreciation to your family and friends ahead of this holiday season and have a blessed Thanksgiving. Very Sincerely, – Dr. Bob = = = If you believe you received this message in error, please . PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. BOB POX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States

| Hello team,

Ahead of Thanksgiving tomorrow, I have been reflecting on how grateful I am to have you on my team, friend. Ever since I launched my campaign this past June, I have been so overwhelmed by the support I have received.

I am also so grateful to be surrounded by family and friends who have supported me every step of this journey. I cannot imagine how Paul Gosar must feel without the support of his own siblings, who consistently call for his removal in Congress.

With you fighting alongside me, team, I know we can defeat Gosar and give the people of Arizona the leadership they deserve. Thank you so much for your continued support and engagement.

From me and everyone at Team DiSanto, we wish you a very happy Thanksgiving.

With gratitude,
Delina

name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: How Out of Touch can Tim Walz Be?
body:
| Peter -- Last week Tim Walz [accidentally told the truth. ](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Et6aNZrEKc84KLay0ikYNWPvqmLl2FUalizFj1pZrRXe2wml9hpbtRrLQY-tL38B29s8gRKhls-cQI0sZowDWIe2o1PSf5z_IqYZ7T83ioWDQhO_zar9PF1bsvMG2byFRgmDLxO97W1XOnHJ7y_QQ3kM8-ZTSf6k1j8SbZQy1v8&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=delegates&n=1) In a recent press conference he finally, accidentally admitted, **"We all know there is no correlation to me using emergency powers that actually show it protected people or made a difference.”** He backpedaled of course, quickly trying to repeatedly emphasize that lockdowns and mask mandates worked in the past. Now that we have vaccines, Walz claims, the vaccine mandate is the one and only way forward. As this tyrant simply moves from one set of destructive policies to the next, How many months will it take for him to admit vaccine mandates have amounted to yet another major policy failure? As we approach Thanksgiving this year...
* Walz claims that **Minnesota is one of the ‘leading’ states in vaccination rates, but we’re also currently the worst when it comes to spread.** He’s pressing forward with illegal, unscientific mandates as the only way out.
* Minnesota healthcare jobs are down nearly 20,000 since the beginning of the pandemic, now totalling 40,000 in current, unfillable healthcare job openings. **Rather than simply giving people back their jobs, he is deploying the MN National Guard to hospitals.**[ Read more here.](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=cOwiuZeejIRNTC9rtN7j-vvgJnXNzOVi2q4q1ol78M-ejbj5cHbLvym8bkLYIMJZIlePLGAu9l9lL8mPEzlMqvDrbhrBa_2V62tTJUqEkDY&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=delegates&n=2)
* Brandon-flation has caused **food prices to climb by over 5% since last year** , but we have twice as many people flying for Thanksgiving this year than last.

Despite Walz and the left doing their hardest to pillage your wallet and force you into compliance, there is a silver lining to all of this - More and more people are learning to see through the lies. With each passing day, Walz is creating more and more disaffected moderates and Democrats. And conservatives have a candidate who is reaching them. Conservatives know the wind is at our backs for next year, but we cannot squander this opportunity with the same old. **This is why it is crucial that our campaign is the one mounting the attack against Walz.**
It is up to you to make sure we have a viable conservative candidate to go up against Walz. Over the weekend, dozens of our volunteers and supporters have stepped into leadership roles to turn out delegates to the state convention. Many understand our best shot at victory next year lies with Team Shah. You can help them! Sign up to volunteer at electneil.com/volunteer and our team will be in touch with you about going to your local precinct caucuses, being a delegate at the state convention, and our path to victory in the coming months. If you’re fed up with Walz’ authoritarian rule, you can take the steps needed to boot him out of office. We're looking forward to hearing from you. Happy Thanksgiving! Dr. Neil Shah Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
[http://electneil.nationbuilder.com/](http://electneil.nationbuilder.com/?e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=delegates&n=3)
---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Friend, join me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Rep. Demings is the kind of Senator we need. She's ready to take on Rubio and win, and she can win.
| | |
---
Friend –
It’s Adam Schiff, and I want to tell you about my good friend, Val Demings.

**But first things first: I endorsed Val Demings for Senate on day one. And I want to tell you why.**

Val Demings is brilliant, a proven leader, tough as nails, and we desperately need her commonsense approach in the Senate. I’m going to tell you more about Val, but first I’m asking:
**[Can you give $5, or whatever you can, to Val Demings’ campaign? Every dollar you can spare will help Val build the grassroots operation she needs to take on Marco Rubio, defend our razor-thin Senate majority, and bring real leadership back to Florida.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38974816/317869539/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1802-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzU3ZTIyZi02YTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M1gNRSkcRoKYlwgS67wdowhK1p79V9qG0VQBV_id_E4=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38974817/317869540/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1802-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzU3ZTIyZi02YTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M1gNRSkcRoKYlwgS67wdowhK1p79V9qG0VQBV_id_E4=)
---
Here’s why I’m supporting Val Demings, and why you should, too.
Val knows Florida, and she knows public service. She served for 27 years in law enforcement, becoming the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief (did I mention she’s tough as nails?). In the House, she's fought for gun reform, affordable health care and to protect voting rights. And I stood beside her as she fought to uphold our values against the likes of Donald Trump. I know she’s the right person for the job.
The stakes are too high for Democrats not to compete everywhere. Our Senate majority is razor-thin at 50-50. To create a better, more just and safer future for our country, we must defend AND expand our Democratic Senate. But Republicans are doing everything in their power to tip the scales in their favor – going so far as to introduce and pass voter suppression laws in state legislatures across the country.
Look, I’ve known Val for years, and we have been in the trenches together fighting to defend our democracy. And there’s nobody better prepared for the job. She is tenacious, commanding, undaunted and knows how to fight for what she believes in. She’ll be the kind of senator who never tires of advocating for families across Florida. And because of her tenacity, I know she can take on Rubio – and she can win. CNN is already calling Florida's Senate seat one of the 10 most likely to flip.

The difference between Marco Rubio and Val Demings couldn’t be clearer: Time after time, Rubio sought to forgive Trump’s worst abuses, while Val fought against them and to uphold our democracy. She has dedicated her life to serving the public and Florida.
**I can’t wait to call her a U.S. senator – but she needs your help to get there.**

**[Will you chip in $5, or whatever you can, to Val Demings' campaign to flip Florida blue? Just 10,033 votes decided Florida's last Senate race, and it will be close once again. Each dollar makes a real difference:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38974818/317869541/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1802-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzU3ZTIyZi02YTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M1gNRSkcRoKYlwgS67wdowhK1p79V9qG0VQBV_id_E4=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38974819/317869542/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk1802-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzU3ZTIyZi02YTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M1gNRSkcRoKYlwgS67wdowhK1p79V9qG0VQBV_id_E4=)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38974820/317869543/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk1802-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzU3ZTIyZi02YTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M1gNRSkcRoKYlwgS67wdowhK1p79V9qG0VQBV_id_E4=)

| | [Donate $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38974821/317869544/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk1802-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzU3ZTIyZi02YTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M1gNRSkcRoKYlwgS67wdowhK1p79V9qG0VQBV_id_E4=)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38974822/317869545/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1802-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzU3ZTIyZi02YTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M1gNRSkcRoKYlwgS67wdowhK1p79V9qG0VQBV_id_E4=)
---
This is a race we can win, friend – but not without your help.
Thank you,
Adam Schiff

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: New allegations of Trump family wrongdoing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=o3W3mk6iLGmCZWXqivkmWc6Sb996d2rI&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend: Earlier this year, the bipartisan select committee investigating the Jan. 6 insurrection announced its intentions to investigate the communications of Trump family members and GOP members of Congress who may have aided in the "Stop the Steal Rally" - aka the pep rally for the attack on the Capitol.
**Communications from Kimberly Guilfoyle - a top fundraiser and campaign strategist for President Trump, and the girlfriend of his son, Donald Trump Jr. - reveal her bragging about raising $3 million for the rally that helped facilitate the violent and deadly attacks on Jan. 6.**
According to an investigation by ProPublica, these communications from Guilfoyle "represent the strongest indication yet that members of the Trump family inner circle were involved in financing and organizing" the rally preceding the Capitol attack.
In addition to bragging about raising funds for an event that helped catalyze an insurrection, Guilfoyle was also with Donald Trump himself in the Oval Office watching coverage of the Jan. 6 events, telling him it was a reflection of "the will of the people." She took the stage herself at the rally and told the crowd that "we will not allow the liberals and the Democrats to steal our dreams or steal our elections."
Friend, week after week, there is mounting evidence against Trump, his family, and accomplices - and what that evidence shows is that Donald Trump tried to use his power to overturn the election; and when he failed, he incited a deadly insurrection while Congress certified the election results. **Here 's what I believe as a former U.S. attorney and state attorney general for over 20 years: There is real potential for criminal charges to be considered against the former president and anybody who aided him.**
Republicans are running scared and will do whatever they can to protect themselves and cover for Donald Trump and his family. They are already making threats to try to keep the facts from coming out. It's up to all grassroots Democrats to speak out and ensure Trump and his family are held accountable - **which is why I need to know where 650 more of you stand right now:**
**[Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump, his family, and members of Congress if proven that they aided the Jan. 6 insurrectionists?](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-accountability?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1102-su-nd)**
Even out of power, Donald Trump is being well protected by the Republican Party. I'm determined to secure the full truth and accountability for what happened on the day of Jan. 6, but I can only do it with grassroots support. Thanks for doing your part.
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1102-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=TvJe%2FvvAoxSBx%2B1V8HXtkM6Sb996d2rI&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

Republicans are running scared and will do whatever they can to protect themselves and cover for Donald Trump and his family. They are already making threats to try to keep the facts from coming out. It's up to all grassroots Democrats to speak out and ensure Trump and his family are held accountable - which is why I need to know where 650 more of you stand right now: Even out of power, Donald Trump is being well protected by the Republican Party. I'm determined to secure the full truth and accountability for what happened on the day of Jan. 6, but I can only do it with grassroots support. Thanks for doing your part. Dick

name: NH SENATE ALERT (via MaggieHassan.com)
subject: URGENT: Mike Pence is coming back to NH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
**Mike Pence is headed back to the Granite State, folks.** The last time the former Vice President was here, he said that **"[Republicans] are on the verge of another great Republican comeback. It starts right here in New Hampshire."** This time, he's headlining a New Hampshire Republican fundraising event to raise massive sums of money to unseat Maggie Hassan and rally the GOP's far-right base. **Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and the rest of the GOP have a plan to take back the Senate, and it starts with flipping New Hampshire.** So far, Republicans have already spent over $4.5 million on attack ads against Senator Hassan and are raising tens of millions more to flip the Senate in 2022. If we're going to win and protect our Senate majority, it will take a grassroots effort, but time is running out before our November fundraising deadline. **[That's why we're asking for your support today: whether it's $5 or $10, whatever you donate will make a big difference in this battleground race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975073/317870764/-1803038125?refcode=e202111124_pence-eom&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGJmYjkxOC02YzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=co8msGowUgtmw5QDt9QPFg-8w6o8Bo4NBwJWXFbUWAg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975074/317870766/-1803038125?refcode=e202111124_pence-eom&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGJmYjkxOC02YzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=co8msGowUgtmw5QDt9QPFg-8w6o8Bo4NBwJWXFbUWAg=)

name: MattandCynthiaforRI.com
subject: Next week’s November deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Hi —

We’re less than a year away from the election — and next Tuesday, our
November fundraising deadline comes to a close. We’re expecting
fundraising to slow down this week for the holiday, so we need a surge of
grassroots support to get ahead now and hit our goals. Every donation,
whether $5, $10, or even $50 makes a big impact in our movement.

Here’s what your donation helps accomplish:

* Supporting Matt and Cynthia as they fight for bold, progressive change
— Whether it’s rallying outside to spend emergency COVID funds or
fighting to pass a Green New Deal in Rhode Island, Matt and Cynthia
are pushing to build a government that truly supports all Rhode
Islanders.

* Powering our organizing work — Matt and Cynthia aren’t cozying up to
corporate bigwigs that can drop thousands of dollars on a candidate of
their choosing. They’re out meeting with teachers, knocking on doors
for candidates in special elections, and listening to community
members' concerns to help inform their legislative priorities when
they take office.

* Getting ready for the fight ahead — There’s no question that our
movement threatens the conservative Democratic establishment in power,
and they’re going to keep attacking Matt and Cynthia to try and
discredit our transformational work. We need to be ready to fight back
at whatever they’ll throw our way. That looks like staffing our team,
preparing to send mailers to get our story in front of voters, and
more!

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/2766?t=1003&akid=264%2E43343%2EpPIQkW ]There are just six days until our end-of-month fundraising deadline,
and we need your help to hit our goals. If you’ve been waiting to get
involved, now is the time to join us! Chip in any amount here:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/2767?t=1004&akid=264%2E43343%2EpPIQkW ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

Thank you for helping us build a Rhode Island for all.

Team Matt and Cynthia

name: Noah K. with Team Lasry
subject: Join us for a Virtual Conversation with John Brennan, former CIA Director, and Alex Lasry on Thursday, December 16th!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
Can you join us, Peter?
