[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975287/317872002/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211124MTOCountdown_N_MCF_90DO_4_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTIxYmFhOC02ZDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DdtedRvzCK86eF3LIiTCPDr7p8nRPvK7fFBvy4XWl0=)
| | | **⏰ IT’S ALMOST OVER! ⏰**
[**Can you rush a $15 contribution, or whatever you can give, right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975288/317872003/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211124MTOCountdown_N_MCF_90DO_4_G_N_L1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTIxYmFhOC02ZDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DdtedRvzCK86eF3LIiTCPDr7p8nRPvK7fFBvy4XWl0=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975289/317872004/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211124MTOCountdown_N_MCF_90DO_4_G_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTIxYmFhOC02ZDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DdtedRvzCK86eF3LIiTCPDr7p8nRPvK7fFBvy4XWl0=)[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975290/317872005/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211124MTOCountdown_N_MCF_90DO_4_G_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTIxYmFhOC02ZDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DdtedRvzCK86eF3LIiTCPDr7p8nRPvK7fFBvy4XWl0=) Mark your calendars: our fundraising blackout is almost upon us! We are in the FINAL countdown to hit our goal of $5,000. **_[Can you be one of 15 donors to give by midnight tonight by making a contribution right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975291/317872006/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211124MTOCountdown_N_MCF_90DO_4_G_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTIxYmFhOC02ZDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DdtedRvzCK86eF3LIiTCPDr7p8nRPvK7fFBvy4XWl0=)_** [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975292/317872007/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211124MTOCountdown_N_MCF_90DO_4_G_N_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTIxYmFhOC02ZDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DdtedRvzCK86eF3LIiTCPDr7p8nRPvK7fFBvy4XWl0=) We’re all fighting so hard to secure our voting rights. Our opponent’s policies would take New Mexico back decades, undoing the progress our state has made to protect voting rights, and standing **against** everything Maggie stands **__for.__** We know we’ve been sending out a ton of emails this month, but it’s critical that we raise enough money to ensure Maggie’s re-election campaign enters into the election year on strong footing. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975293/317872008/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211124MTOCountdown_N_MCF_90DO_4_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTIxYmFhOC02ZDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DdtedRvzCK86eF3LIiTCPDr7p8nRPvK7fFBvy4XWl0=) We’ve been working hard to make sure every single voter has the right to be heard at the polls. With record turnout in 2020 and 2021, we have to keep fighting to make sure we have an even higher turnout in 2022. clean_body: And time is running out for us to hit our $5K goal. = | | | ⏰ IT’S ALMOST OVER! ⏰ = = Mark your calendars: our fundraising blackout is almost upon us! We are in the FINAL countdown to hit our goal of $5,000. = = We’re all fighting so hard to secure our voting rights. Our opponent’s policies would take New Mexico back decades, undoing the progress our state has made to protect voting rights, and standing against everything Maggie stands for. We know we’ve been sending out a ton of emails this month, but it’s critical that we raise enough money to ensure Maggie’s re-election campaign enters into the election year on strong footing. = We’ve been working hard to make sure every single voter has the right to be heard at the polls. With record turnout in 2020 and 2021, we have to keep fighting to make sure we have an even higher turnout in 2022. That begins with easier access to the ballot box, securing early voting, and making sure everyone feels safe at their polling place. name: Matt West
subject: Why this is personal for me.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
21st century challenges require 21st century solutions. | Friend, launching my campaign for Congress wasn’t a choice for me — it was a must. It was do or die. ICYMI, I’m a scientist, engineer, DeFi Developer, and progressive. Above all, I am a nerd. A HUGE nerd. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975340/317872057/2035722763?refcode=em_MW_FR_MattsStory_112421_img1&amount=25&refcode2=0a7fc5ae-6d4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTdmYzVhZS02ZDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v2OZLMJjqFisHcj92mmQo0mhRRuTWWpFWNgoFJEx32o=)
_High school me, falling asleep with a book in my hand._ I grew up fascinated with science from a young age and studied chemical engineering before receiving my Ph.D. in fuel cell technology. I wrote my dissertation on how to create new highly efficient and non-polluting power sources. I also worked as a development engineer at Intel, designing laser-based manufacturing processes to build the latest chips for computers, cars, and homes. I even do some part-time work coding for a cryptocurrency group. Like I said. Big nerd. **But here’s why it matters: I believe that science is the key to solving some of our biggest challenges — from tackling climate change, improving our power grid, addressing current and future pandemics, ending food scarcity, and helping to raise people out of poverty.** **_[Scientific-based solutions WILL save lives and protect families. And I am ready to be the voice that science desperately needs in Washington. Will you chip in $25 today to help me get the job done?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975341/317872059/2035722763?refcode=em_MW_FR_MattsStory_112421_l1&amount=25&refcode2=0a7fc5ae-6d4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTdmYzVhZS02ZDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v2OZLMJjqFisHcj92mmQo0mhRRuTWWpFWNgoFJEx32o=)_** Time and time again, I’ve watched politicians in Congress ignore the experts and spread cringe-worthy anti-science lies. **There are too few scientists and too much misinformation in our government.** I’ve tried every solution in the book to be the voice science needs, from writing op-eds, volunteering, and helping my neighbors get out and vote, but I felt like I was only screaming into the void. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975342/317872062/2035722763?refcode=em_MW_FR_MattsStory_112421_img2&amount=25&refcode2=0a7fc5ae-6d4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTdmYzVhZS02ZDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v2OZLMJjqFisHcj92mmQo0mhRRuTWWpFWNgoFJEx32o=)
_High school me, probably thinking about my chemistry class._ Now I am taking things to the next level by growing an unstoppable pro-science progressive movement in Oregon. **_[I’m not a career politician with special interest connections, but with your help, I know I can get the job done. Chip in today, and together we can bring solutions to Congress>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975344/317872063/2035722763?refcode=em_MW_FR_MattsStory_112421_l2&amount=25&refcode2=0a7fc5ae-6d4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTdmYzVhZS02ZDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v2OZLMJjqFisHcj92mmQo0mhRRuTWWpFWNgoFJEx32o=)_** Thanks, Matt West

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: [photo enclosed]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975399/317872481/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk406-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGJlYWY1ZC02ZTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5icUfiZ-vbvULg60Z4h_kw88ZwVDiN16F4OQPuEjLA4=)
Peter – I want to talk to you about my Grandpa Finkenauer, a World War II veteran who worked on the line at a packing plant in Dubuque. **He's a big part of the reason I'm running to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA), and I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain why.**
Grandma and Grandpa Finkenauer lived in a three-bedroom, two-bathroom home in Dubuque. It had a backyard and wasn't much unlike any other middle-class home – except when you went down to the basement. Going down there as a kid, I felt like I walked into a different world: There was a bar area with fancy glasses and dishware. Everything glittered.
It's where my grandparents would entertain their friends. After coming home from a long, hard day of work on the line, Grandpa would get cleaned up and he and Grandma would put on their best clothes. Grandma probably wore some of her jewelry that my grandfather gifted her. (He always loved spoiling her.)
Peter, my grandparents were not rich. But they worked hard, and the wage my grandfather earned – and later in life, his pension and Social Security – enabled them to live a good life. They _enjoyed_ life. But that kind of security my grandparents enjoyed – where if you work hard you can not just get by but also thrive – has slipped away from people. **It's still slipping away – and it's because of people like Sen. Grassley who have failed working families for decades now.**
You see, as health care costs have skyrocketed, Sen. Grassley has done everything in his power to side with those making profits over his constituents who need care. He's spoken out against laws that would strengthen workers' rights and unions. He was in Donald Trump's pocket, especially when it came to the nearly $2 trillion tax windfall favoring the wealthy and corporations. **I'm running to defeat Sen. Grassley to be a true voice for working families. To get things done for them – because working families are _my_ family.**
**[If you're with me in this fight for working Americans – if you believe it's time for Sen. Grassley to go – then I'm asking you to make a grassroots contribution ahead of tonight's midnight deadline. Every dollar you give – $](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975400/317872485/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk406-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGJlYWY1ZC02ZTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5icUfiZ-vbvULg60Z4h_kw88ZwVDiN16F4OQPuEjLA4=)****[10, $20, $50 at a time – will fuel our fight for working families and build up the resources we need to defeat Sen. Grassley and win in Iowa.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975401/317872493/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk406-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGJlYWY1ZC02ZTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5icUfiZ-vbvULg60Z4h_kw88ZwVDiN16F4OQPuEjLA4=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975402/317872500/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk406-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGJlYWY1ZC02ZTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5icUfiZ-vbvULg60Z4h_kw88ZwVDiN16F4OQPuEjLA4=)
---
Thank you,

Abby

name: Liz Mathis
subject: What are you thankful for this year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress
body:
I’m thankful for...
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975514/317873123/1246233592?refcode=em_eng_2021.11.24_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTY3ZDYwZC03MDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4p574tVxwbOafIczQjUsdgKwFdkmc4D9Xy_RhFKcTY=) Hi Peter, it’s Liz.

Tomorrow, my team and I are taking time off from the campaign trail to spend Thanksgiving with loved ones and recharge. But before I go offline, I want to share what I am thankful for this year and hear from you about what you’ll be giving thanks to. I’m grateful for my friends, who always manage to make me laugh. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975515/317873124/1246233592?refcode=em_eng_2021.11.24_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTY3ZDYwZC03MDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4p574tVxwbOafIczQjUsdgKwFdkmc4D9Xy_RhFKcTY=)
I’m thankful for my coworkers and team who will get up in the morning to run a 5k with me. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975516/317873125/1246233592?refcode=em_eng_2021.11.24_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTY3ZDYwZC03MDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4p574tVxwbOafIczQjUsdgKwFdkmc4D9Xy_RhFKcTY=)
This year, like every year, I am thankful for my family, who are the most important people to me.

**And I’m thankful for YOU.** Without supporters like you, we would not have the resources we need to win. Your continued support means the world to me. [**But, I want to hear from you, Peter. What are you thankful for this year?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975517/317873126/-1565593423?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTY3ZDYwZC03MDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4p574tVxwbOafIczQjUsdgKwFdkmc4D9Xy_RhFKcTY=&emci=f7659a2f-8e4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2567d60d-704d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6566505) | [**I’m thankful for... **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975518/317873127/-1565593423?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTY3ZDYwZC03MDRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4p574tVxwbOafIczQjUsdgKwFdkmc4D9Xy_RhFKcTY=&emci=f7659a2f-8e4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2567d60d-704d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6566505)
---

I look forward to learning more about what matters to you. In thanks,

Liz Mathis
_Candidate for Congress, IA-02_ _ _ **Liz Mathis is a lifelong Iowan, State Senator, and former local news reporter running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District in Congress.**

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Michelle Lujan Grisham**
Date: Tue, Nov 23, 2021
Subject: President Biden's infrastructure bill
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975858/317875181/-1540418300?code=jtk1110-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGQ5MDZkZS03MTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m_QOOopDZwoKRLD3fFjTcb0bOAKQjL-ksOf5gKuGLLI=)
---
Hi, Peter.

I just got back from my trip to Washington, D.C., where I joined President Biden at the signing ceremony for his bipartisan infrastructure bill. Because you're one of my strongest supporters, **I want to tell you just how much this law will help each and every American in their daily lives. **
This law will help states across the nation rebuild infrastructure that is decades old. For you, Peter, the impact of this bill could look like: high speed internet in more communities, decreased highway traffic, better access to clean drinking water, safer bike lanes, and more. **On top of all that, this law is also the single biggest investment in climate change that our country has ever made.**
**This is a huge win for the American people, Peter **– including New Mexicans, who will receive a staggering $3.7 billion in state funding to protect us against wildfires, expand broadband internet access, improve our water systems, and more. My team and I are already getting right to work planning these exciting projects.
I'm so proud of this infrastructure bill, and I believe President Biden's progress over this past year is astounding. He's swiftly helping our country recover from a damaging Trump presidency – and 90% of Democrats approve of his leadership, **but I need to know what you think, Peter.**
**My team is running a live poll to find out how many Americans approve of President Biden after passing this impressive bill. You've been selected for our survey, so please answer our poll before it closes at midnight tonight:**
| | **Do you approve of President Biden?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975859/317875182/-1637588567?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1110-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGQ5MDZkZS03MTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m_QOOopDZwoKRLD3fFjTcb0bOAKQjL-ksOf5gKuGLLI=&emci=ba29dd19-8b4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c8d906de-714d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24265352)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975860/317875183/-1637588567?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1110-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGQ5MDZkZS03MTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m_QOOopDZwoKRLD3fFjTcb0bOAKQjL-ksOf5gKuGLLI=&emci=ba29dd19-8b4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c8d906de-714d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24265352)
---
_This poll closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight. Late responses will not be counted._

Michelle Lujan Grisham

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ortega For Congress
body:
I talked about what this campaign stands for and how corporate Democrats are ruining our chances to pass popular progressive policies. Watch the full video here and then chip in to help fund our people-powered campaign. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975915/317875324/-1058621347?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211124TYTrecap_MO_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmFlZTlmZS03MTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1NOmiIQsb8JPmcbQRqtiGcU5lwvKF5mEeTn7vh1-QIA=)

Did you catch my interview on The Young Turks? [I talked about what this campaign stands for and how corporate Democrats are ruining our chances to pass popular progressive policies. Watch the full video here and then chip in to help fund our people-powered campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975917/317875326/-1058621347?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211124TYTrecap_MO_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmFlZTlmZS03MTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1NOmiIQsb8JPmcbQRqtiGcU5lwvKF5mEeTn7vh1-QIA=) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975919/317875328/-1058621347?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211124TYTrecap_MO_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmFlZTlmZS03MTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1NOmiIQsb8JPmcbQRqtiGcU5lwvKF5mEeTn7vh1-QIA=)
---
My take is that corporate Democrats are doing even more damage to working and middle-class families than Republicans. At least we know where Republicans stand. It’s corporate Democrats like Lou Correa — who take money from Big Oil and Big Pharma while gutting popular policies in committee for their corporate backers.
For too long, we’ve seen Democrats compromise and make careers out of their lukewarm positions, and that’s not what I'm interested in doing. I’m running to fight for popular policies that help working families:
* Medicare for all - to expand Medicare and fight for Medicare to negotiate better prices for the people.
* Green New Deal - investing in green energy and providing clean air and water for our children.
* Legalization for undocumented workers - an entire segment of the working class who pay taxes, live here, are part of the economy and our communities, but are marginalized and disenfranchised.

Our campaign is about being brave and having the courage to take on corporate Democrats who secretly water down bills from any meaningful impact for working and middle-class families.
[Watch my interview on The Young Turks and chip in today to support our campaign. Together, we’ll shake things up, stop playing nice, and fight for the things that will improve the lives of everyday people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975921/317875330/-1058621347?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211124TYTrecap_MO_full_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmFlZTlmZS03MTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1NOmiIQsb8JPmcbQRqtiGcU5lwvKF5mEeTn7vh1-QIA=)
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38975922/317875331/-1058621347?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211124TYTrecap_MO_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmFlZTlmZS03MTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1NOmiIQsb8JPmcbQRqtiGcU5lwvKF5mEeTn7vh1-QIA=)
---
— Mike

clean_body: I talked about what this campaign stands for and how corporate Democrats are ruining our chances to pass popular progressive policies. Watch the full video here and then chip in to help fund our people-powered campaign. | = Did you catch my interview on The Young Turks? = | = My take is that corporate Democrats are doing even more damage to working and middle-class families than Republicans. At least we know where Republicans stand. It’s corporate Democrats like Lou Correa — who take money from Big Oil and Big Pharma while gutting popular policies in committee for their corporate backers. For too long, we’ve seen Democrats compromise and make careers out of their lukewarm positions, and that’s not what I'm interested in doing. I’m running to fight for popular policies that help working families: Medicare for all - to expand Medicare and fight for Medicare to negotiate better prices for the people. Green New Deal - investing in green energy and providing clean air and water for our children. * Legalization for undocumented workers - an entire segment of the working class who pay taxes, live here, are part of the economy and our communities, but are marginalized and disenfranchised. Our campaign is about being brave and having the courage to take on corporate Democrats who secretly water down bills from any meaningful impact for working and middle-class families. = = — Mike | Mike Ortega is a Democrat running for Congress in CA-46 to fight for all working people who call America home. Mike is a lifelong organizer and a biomedical engineer who has worked on the ground to fight for his community and in the lab to save lives. Chip in to his campaign today. | = | Paid for by Ortega For Congress Ortega For Congress PO Box 1271 Anaheim, CA 92815 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
Our opponent will spend BIG to drown us out.
#
In a moment, we’re going to ask you again to chip in and support Beto. But first, we want to explain a key way your contribution will help us reach Texans.
Part of our path to victory includes putting ads on TV and online. These ads will help spread Beto’s message across Texas, tell people about campaign events near where they live, and even turn new supporters into donors.
Here’s something to keep in mind as we ask you to help fund our ads: **Our opponent is guaranteed to spend BIG to drown us out.** Case in point, Greg Abbott launched an ad attacking Beto before we even announced our campaign.

body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/7GJXK9O2tHMiQrL7CBinLNg90WGrPvDjWCXpYYYQFd4=/Ix7KY1jt1IiWyrjXTj0rFHwBMD1K_kOzmu4zIQBOwmM=?refcode=E12593-20211124-ToughDecision-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Peter -- There have been a couple of major developments in our race over the past couple of weeks, and it's all led up to me making a tough decision. First, the draft maps came out and have my district getting even redder. Then we heard that Devin Nunes is planning to run against me. And now a GOP Super PAC is running brand new attack ads against me over the holiday break - on networks like the Hallmark channel! My team and I have been going back and forth about how to respond. (I'm trying to leave them alone over the holidays, but there's too much happening!) And today I had to make a tough decision - do we spend our hard earned resources on new ads of our own or do we hold back? I decided to move forward with the ads because I don't think we have time to waste. But now we're going to be another $5,000 short of our fundraising goal for November. **I need your help to make sure this doesn 't detract from our fundraising progress, because Devin Nunes has a $12 million warchest and that's going to be a big challenge to overcome if he officially enters the race next month.** Will you step up here, Peter? I'm dropping a custom ActBlue link below so I can track all our supporters who help us meet this goal. **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-10-Email-Nov2021-FR-November?refcode=Peter](https://act.myngp.com/el/7GJXK9O2tHMiQrL7CBinLNg90WGrPvDjWCXpYYYQFd4=/Ix7KY1jt1IiWyrjXTj0rFHwBMD1K_kOzmu4zIQBOwmM=?refcode=E12593-20211124-ToughDecision-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)** Thanks for everything and have a great holiday,
-- Josh

body:
| | | Hey Peter, Just following up on my email below. If you haven’t had the chance to give it a read, here’s the bottom line... _Almost every decision Joe Biden has made since taking office has made our country worse._ Biden’s far-Left policies are sending the prices of everyday items like food and gasoline through the roof. And his total failure to secure our southern border has led to the worst national security threat in years. Peter, as your Congressman, I’ll fight to get our economy back on track, secure our southern border, and defeat Biden’s socialist agenda. Will you join the fight today with a generous contribution? Please use this safe and secure link to chip in your best gift: **[https://secure.winred.com/casey-for-congress/e_fwdturkeytax_111821/amount=any](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/2a279228d0124c71/100e2d0c4882e2f9c3d6b838967d376c/36963)** Thanks for your support! Casey Sent from my iPhone

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/2a279228d0124c71/76572a1cb9e53083c3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Peter, Thanksgiving Dinner is going to be a lot more expensive than usual.****[**Almost every Thanksgiving dish**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/2a279228d0124c71/59185e0d684cfc1ec3d6b838967d376c/36963) will cost more than last year.
* Green beans are up 10%.
* Russet potatoes are up 12%.
* And the price of an 8-16 pound turkey is up a whopping 26 cents more per pound.

**Peter, Biden’s reckless Big Government spending and failed socialist policies have led to a supply chain crisis and a severe labor shortage. name: Gibbons for Ohio
subject: Happy Thanksgiving from Team Gibbons
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sjIF6hZ5vVW4w6woKZS3jEWACNkcF6u5DlbxWI0N4RT9W-4bSvNximymu7eXRkI9qloT3vteKoRpiopu7vPEuCUjmLMBMmEe9kAqMRBsTR5X0gEUOTw5MUij4bLdO96Pa4nN1YBXJU7rcEnei45VcvL6xAKrf53SoIgbCBYRzET4UchfdtTwng==&c=aULdXYJUwDq44Nq9vBl6ajGMBDG_njnKo-G9RTWjNfJ-iULjC08_hQ==&ch=MkapyQHSo_4izb5Ix_b3L88tiPEFq9EYwrBB-bqHXTAATKIQOdMbqA==)
---
| Peter,
Happy Thanksgiving from #TeamGibbons!
---
|
---
| As we celebrate this holiday, I want to express my gratitude for your support, as well as my gratitude for our nation and great state.
I hope you get the time tomorrow to reflect on the blessings in your life while spending time with friends and family.
***
I had the opportunity to meet with supporters at a meet & greet in Cincinnati last week. I was able to hear directly from Ohioans on a range of current issues facing our nation, including the astronomical national debt.

---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sjIF6hZ5vVW4w6woKZS3jEWACNkcF6u5DlbxWI0N4RT9W-4bSvNximNFrHI-J2UlDC51k70osjTyhwyw4RFTTJPbD6ptZKtA9DVXfcr5eHoR7FN94PQl-YeHs2rBKhkrVHRjGjqUgfymxZdKnR8Re1S2gRWXUFgKWH6QiWrBszutejabw23Ix-yaxz4v_G87vUDxNzWv0bc=&c=aULdXYJUwDq44Nq9vBl6ajGMBDG_njnKo-G9RTWjNfJ-iULjC08_hQ==&ch=MkapyQHSo_4izb5Ix_b3L88tiPEFq9EYwrBB-bqHXTAATKIQOdMbqA==)
---
|
After the holiday weekend, I will be back on the road headed to Cincinnati again for the Republican Senate forum. I hope to see you there.
In the meantime, Diane and I send you and your family well wishes. May your day be filled with good food, good health, and good times with those you love. We are thankful for your support and friendship.
Sincerely,
Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate

---
| | |

body:
CNN calls my re-election fight the marquee Senate race of 2022.
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/4728?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211124-SenMaggieHassan-announcement-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211124-SenMaggieHassan-announcement-ETG-sl1&akid=2068%2E9716520%2ExkgTRv)
Friend,

There's a good reason why CNN calls my re-election fight the "marquee Senate race of 2022."

The polls here in New Hampshire have been **_statistically tied_** for months. Mitch McConnell's dark-money allies have already spent **_$4 million_** to defeat me -- with tens of millions more likely to come.

But we just got a crucial glimmer of hope: Our state's Republican governor -- McConnell's most important Senate recruit in the entire country -- has decided NOT to run for my seat.

**This shocking development means that if we move RIGHT NOW, we can seize the advantage in the most important Senate race of this cycle -- and push McConnell one seat further away from retaking control.**

**We can’t risk losing here or in any swing state, which is why I’m teaming up with the DSCC to raise $25,000 by midnight.**

**[Please -- pitch in $5 or more TODAY to help me win in New Hampshire, defend our Senate majority, and keep Mitch McConnell out of power>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/4728?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211124-SenMaggieHassan-announcement-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211124-SenMaggieHassan-announcement-ETG-sl1&akid=2068%2E9716520%2ExkgTRv)**If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Maggie Hassan's campaign and the DSCC. | | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/4728?amount=5&t=7&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211124-SenMaggieHassan-announcement-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211124-SenMaggieHassan-announcement-ETG-sl1&akid=2068%2E9716520%2ExkgTRv)

| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/4728?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211124-SenMaggieHassan-announcement-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211124-SenMaggieHassan-announcement-ETG-sl1&akid=2068%2E9716520%2ExkgTRv)
---

Six years ago, I won my Senate race **by just over a thousand votes** , and recent polls show _this election could be even closer._

That would mean McConnell and his dark-money allies need just a thousand more votes to take full control of the Senate and block Joe Biden's entire agenda -- and they’re already spending big to make sure that happens.

**We can’t take anything for granted. New Hampshire is a purple state to its core, and we need every single vote we can get. That’s why I’m asking for your help:**

[**It’s critical that we have the resources we need to defend this seat and keep McConnell out of power. Please, split a $5 donation between my campaign and the DSCC now:**](https://go.dscc.org/go/4728?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211124-SenMaggieHassan-announcement-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211124-SenMaggieHassan-announcement-ETG-sl1&akid=2068%2E9716520%2ExkgTRv)

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
U.S. Senator, New Hampshire

Maggie Hassan is running for re-election in New Hampshire, where she won by just over 1,000 votes in 2016. She’s fighting to create jobs, improve health care, and protect our Democratic majority, but she needs your help.

name: Tony Vargas (Personal)
subject: a note of thanks before tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
Before signing off for the weekend, I wanted to make sure to ...

|
---

| |
---

Friends, As we're getting ready for time as a family this Thanksgiving, I couldn't let the holiday pass without a note of thanks for your support and encouragement. This year has been one full of blessings and the beginning of a journey that I'm so grateful that you're joining us on. When I think of what I'm most grateful for this year, these smiling faces will be at the top of my list. I hope your day is filled with laughter, time with those you love and, of course, a few extra slices of pie. :) From our family to yours -- Happy Thanksgiving!

_\- Tony, Lauren, Ava, and Luca Vargas _
---
|
---

Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund and Latino Victory Fund.

| | Derek — We know the outcome of this election wasn’t what we wanted or expected it to be, but we have to learn from what went wrong and grow in our successes. It’s clear that the way campaigns are run in Virginia is changing and we need to adjust. The path to holding onto our Democratic majority in Congress next year is going to run through Virginia. Some of our incredible Congresswomen like Elaine Luria, Jennifer Wexton, and Abigail Spanberger are going to see strong Republican opposition. We need to be ready to protect our Democrats in Congress and we want your input on how we can best do that. We’re holding post-election debriefs throughout the Commonwealth to hear what folks think worked or didn’t work during this last cycle. If you can’t make it to a debrief, we still want to hear from you. **[Fill out our 2021 Elections Wrap-up Survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38976590/317878251/-775784000?refcode=dpva-em-211124-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDU1ZTYwZi03NjRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C0g9Y7sBDyUKGmo5D2_xed9yrTednbZB-OkgT0iCn94=&emci=00a4340d-a444-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ad55e60f-764d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15759664) Your feedback will impact the way races are run in Virginia next year.** If we’re going to be successful in 2022, we need to reflect on 2021 and address where we fell short. We hope you’ll join us as we kick start building out our 2022 campaign efforts by providing us your input on our 2021 Elections Wrap-up Survey. | **********[TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38976591/317878252/-775784000?refcode=dpva-em-211124-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDU1ZTYwZi03NjRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C0g9Y7sBDyUKGmo5D2_xed9yrTednbZB-OkgT0iCn94=&emci=00a4340d-a444-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ad55e60f-764d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15759664)**********

name: Great America Update
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6516%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=89Z2yZmxnnuYUBAnGztVtQ&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67292%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ujxNLQYb0tq%2fkU6Sih0K9A&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67293%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZVH92kJjkUnpI4qeF7%2fW4Q&sysid=1)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67294%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YBjH8xIhojz1IcGDWlmU%2bQ&sysid=1)
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Right USA on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Citizenship requires vigilance
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58865951:JYKOAO2NL:m:1:3253819041:10597B8A7FA494D7035E185C684CF321:r)
---
| | Are you proud to be an American citizen?
If you're like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can't say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can't say the same thing even today.
You don't have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It's one of our nation's great achievements.
But there's a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges.
And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty.
That's why today I hope you'll support our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58865951:JYKOAO2NL:m:1:3253819041:10597B8A7FA494D7035E185C684CF321:r)**
This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.

* **The first important goal **of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through We must add hundreds of thousands more subscribers in 2022!
* **The second vital goal **is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal **is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and new Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans.
NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that _ your_ support is critical to our success.
With your help, we'll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens.
We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months.
**You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58865951:JYKOAO2NL:m:1:3253819041:10597B8A7FA494D7035E185C684CF321:r)_
---
| | And for a gift of $100 or more, you'll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson's latest book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. _Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He's also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale.
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58865951:JYKOAO2NL:m:1:3253819041:10597B8A7FA494D7035E185C684CF321:r)
---
| | Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, "In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure. " **
Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government.
Warm regards,
Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58865951:JYKOAO2NL:m:1:3253819041:10597B8A7FA494D7035E185C684CF321:r)**
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the
Hillsdale Note:
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z1uidt9mfd3f0vpte1ll7j799bfkfougvssi7e8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctieco34cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice—that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted—liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope—we must fight back with the truth. **Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning.** In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”** And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans—especially younger Americans—and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ze0oc1ahljr7mphcmts98mas5t8rq2s3n2nhacbo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctieco34cdh2bs)**_ [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z9ac8o26p3advbqt6rvkopptsqnkcg6hitjol9e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctieco34cdh2bs) Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** This work is the surest means of defending liberty—which is why we make every online course available **free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources—and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** —but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. **Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more?** Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4akue5v5aonh10lh5nf4l2rs648nmdp9ktp96cg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctieco34cdh2bs)**_ We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles** and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zcmrq10n8goe9lsm1v5breabh1pm2q12lnlr4qro_rp22sh2s8i66pj7ctieco34cdh2bs)**_
---

name: Susan Wild
subject: Happy Thanksgiving 🦃
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I am thankful for the community here in Pennsylvania’s 7th district.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38976850/317879102/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211124-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTlmYjM2Zi03ODRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Nbx80OhtDTnne-6GXZUn6Ad_Fd6LSNYjOofqvs-RMk=)
---
| Peter,

Like many of you, I’ll be spending tomorrow thinking about what I’m thankful for.

I am thankful for my family, who I am looking forward to spending the day with.

I am thankful for the community here in Pennsylvania’s 7th district, which I’ve been a proud member of for over 30 years.

I am grateful for the frontline workers who have kept our economy moving forward during the coronavirus pandemic, and I am grateful for the scientists who worked hard to develop a vaccine that allows us to safely celebrate this holiday with our families and loved ones.

Above all, I am incredibly grateful to have your support. Together, I know our incredible grassroots team can rise to any challenge.

Thank you, Peter!

With thanks for people like you,
Susan

clean_body: I am thankful for the community here in Pennsylvania’s 7th district. | = | Peter, Like many of you, I’ll be spending tomorrow thinking about what I’m thankful for. I am thankful for my family, who I am looking forward to spending the day with. I am thankful for the community here in Pennsylvania’s 7th district, which I’ve been a proud member of for over 30 years. I am grateful for the frontline workers who have kept our economy moving forward during the coronavirus pandemic, and I am grateful for the scientists who worked hard to develop a vaccine that allows us to safely celebrate this holiday with our families and loved ones. Above all, I am incredibly grateful to have your support. Together, I know our incredible grassroots team can rise to any challenge. Thank you, Peter! With thanks for people like you, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States | | ---|--- Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. body:
Two important things you need to know about the new poll in our race for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38976892/317879393/1201999653?refcode=em21_211124_poll3_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211124_poll3_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDYwYmJhNi03OTRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6UFN5K771slmBatmMItV3SHFg4qhYZ3i3QIhR1Fy80=) A brand-new poll was released in our race for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin. Here are two quick things you need to know about these numbers:
1. **Ron Johnson is seriously vulnerable.** He hasn't made a decision on re-election quite yet but the guy recently told _Fox News,_ “I don’t know if I can walk away at this point.” With $2 million sitting in the bank and Donald Trump’s full endorsement, he's ready to hit the ground running at any moment.

2. **Sarah Godlewski is by far the strongest Democrat to defeat him.** The latest poll in our race was conducted by a top-rated _FiveThirtyEight_ pollster and it shows Sarah is the only Democrat leading Ron Johnson. That’s great news for our campaign, but she can’t take him on alone.

Our fundraising has slowed down over the past few days, and with lots of people traveling for Thanksgiving tomorrow, we’re worried we could fall behind in the holiday rush. Anything you’re able to contribute today will make a meaningful difference.

[**Add a donation to Sarah Godlewski’s campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin. name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5febed9dabc9/campaign-update-yellow-couch-tour-flag-day-and-juneteenth-5319802?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=f342c2fc7a&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear Friends,

This Thanksgiving week I want to express my gratitude for all of the support my campaign has received. I am so thankful for everyone who has donated, attended a meet and greet or Yellow Couch Tour Stop, and shared our campaign message. Twenty years ago, my family attended an interfaith event at the Assembly Hall on Temple Square. Choirs from different churches sang songs of praise and passed out music for the audience to sing along. That night we were introduced to new, wonderful Thanksgiving hymns centered on thankfulness. Since then, my family has gathered every year at Thanksgiving to sing those hymns and reflect on our blessings. As we prepare to gather and sing again, I am reminded of the importance of giving thanks even in challenging times. The last year and a half have been one of the most difficult times in our nation’s collective history, but I am thankful for the hope the future brings and for a community that shares that hope. I have been amazed and overwhelmed by the community that has emerged to support this campaign. In talking with many of you, I’ve learned you share my vision for a brighter future full of civility, solutions, and a better life for every Utahn.
---
|
---
|
# Better With Becky
---
|
---
| This week on the podcast we discussed how to navigate potentially difficult conversations at the Thanksgiving dinner table.
---
| [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=a2bb08191c&e=10c1db3257)
---
| I believe that conversations that may seem loaded are an opportunity to grow closer to loved ones with whom we may not always agree.
---
|
---
|
# Contact Me
---
|
---
| I want to know the stories that are on your mind. I believe that the only way to truly represent you right is to know you first, so reach out! You can follow me on [Twitter](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=e7520544e9&e=10c1db3257), [Facebook](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=06a7259999&e=10c1db3257), and [Instagram](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=0860cecdd4&e=10c1db3257) where my DMs are always open, and you can email me becky@beckyforutah.com.
---
| I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving! Thank you again for all your support.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Jaworski?=
subject: legalize it
disclaimer_text: paid for by Jaworski for Texas
body:
I know where I stand: I am in support of legalized recreational and medicinal cannabis in Texas. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/2022-13449328?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=88246739ba&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | Dear ,

As I travel across our state in this campaign, one topic continues to come up in conversation with my fellow Texans: **cannabis**. And whether we should legalize it in Texas is an important debate we ought to be having.

**I know where I stand:**[**I am in support of legalized recreational and medicinal cannabis in Texas.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=ea9b9faf9b&e=5d8d80652b)

Why is that? Here are just a few of the reasons:
* **Legalized recreational and medicinal cannabis will be a money maker for Texas.** How does 30,000 permanent jobs, $1.1 billion in revenue to add to the state budget and $300 million statewide savings for police and prosecutors sound? It sounds like smart progress to me.
* **Cannabis provides our veterans and those suffering from illness a wellness alternative to addicting opioids. **
* **Legalized cannabis will fund our police and courts** by removing a wasteful, petty prosecution and turn this cash crop into a profit center for a growing state.
* **And finally, I must simply ask:** how many young lives, principally lives of color, are we going to permanently burden and put in private prisons so that people can make a profit off of their incarceration? We, as Texans, must stand up and demand better.

I have campaigned all across our state sharing my plan to legalize cannabis in Texas and protect responsible cannabis use by adults.

[**Will you stand with me and support my campaign to be your next Attorney General?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=2920562b36&e=5d8d80652b)

We must demand common sense solutions from our elected officials. Cannabis legalization is a solution that will make a huge difference in the lives of the people of Texas.

For medical treatment. For criminal justice reform. For jobs. For all of these reasons and more, I support cannabis reform.

[**Donate today to help me continue to spread this message all over our state.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=f7f33e9528&e=5d8d80652b)

All the best,

Joe
---

All the best, Joe | "Donate Now" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Our mailing address is: Jaworski for Texas2228 Mechanic St Ste 307Galveston, TX 77550-1881 Want to change how you receive these emails? Before we sit down with our family and give thanks to God for our many blessings, I wanted to express my gratitude to you. Team,

Before we sit down with our family and give thanks to God for our many blessings tomorrow, I wanted to express my gratitude to you.

My whole family is thankful for your support. As we embark on this challenging journey to restore moral leadership to Illinois and save our state, I couldn't be more grateful to have you by my side. We know that the hardest things are the ones worth doing, and it means the world that you are willing to join us in standing up for our rights and values as Illinoisans. We'll be including you in our prayers of thanksgiving this year.

May you have a wonderful holiday with your friends and family.

Happy Thanksgiving!

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SETH MAGAZINER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
---
Peter,

While we've continued to face unprecedented challenges in the past year, we still have much to be thankful for. I wanted to take a moment to share some of the things I'm most grateful for this year.

I'm thankful for my wife Julia and for the arrival of our newborn son Max. I'm thankful for the health care workers, frontline workers, scientists, and doctors who have continued to get us through the COVID-19 pandemic.

I'm also thankful for the opportunity to serve Rhode Island as Treasurer and for the tremendous support our campaign for Governor has already earned from across our state.

Finally, I am thankful for the people of Rhode Island. It is the creativity, grit, compassion and positive energy of everyday Rhode Islanders that gives me confidence that we can build a stronger, fairer economy in the Ocean State for everyone.

No matter how you're celebrating this year, I hope you and your loved ones have a happy and healthy Thanksgiving.

Thank you,

Seth

clean_body: Peter, While we've continued to face unprecedented challenges in the past year, we still have much to be thankful for. I wanted to take a moment to share some of the things I'm most grateful for this year. I'm thankful for my wife Julia and for the arrival of our newborn son Max. I'm thankful for the health care workers, frontline workers, scientists, and doctors who have continued to get us through the COVID-19 pandemic. I'm also thankful for the opportunity to serve Rhode Island as Treasurer and for the tremendous support our campaign for Governor has already earned from across our state. Finally, I am thankful for the people of Rhode Island. It is the creativity, grit, compassion and positive energy of everyday Rhode Islanders that gives me confidence that we can build a stronger, fairer economy in the Ocean State for everyone. No matter how you're celebrating this year, I hope you and your loved ones have a happy and healthy Thanksgiving. Thank you, Seth | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY SETH MAGAZINER FOR GOVERNOR VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Seth Magaziner for Governor Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 303 Providence, RI 02901 United States

body:
| | | Team, Many of us are thinking about what we’re thankful for over the next few days. Family. Friends. Life. But we also know there are folks who don’t have the same opportunities and resources we do. **Today, we’re raising money for the Southern Maryland Food Bank today. 100% goes towards supporting those in need in Charles, Calvert, and St. Mary's Counties.** Just $50 can provide a hot meal for 25 people. **[_Make a donation right now, so families can enjoy the holiday season with a little less stress this year >>_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P0hu3qC7oygiW418nt5xKraOQhJC69lxtWwSw0t9BcqrrzW-Kr7QlygOYNUD7GdRGEHI0fnCWAeaLN07wBUDvAGu_WSMN2R4nGg350sfIKhZKbzQLWpD72JbLYaTAt1zCENWOSU4s8ouEfRG4jRfAZzakjMb4crlaGkbMpcmQjEY-Mslmxh6rH4I0yLCEmADYRIzte0M1L3lP-WFRtk1Y3gLPjOqtU_cVe4kwHpsF5PolPJufx7hE-2Y0Re_qETlsL0G5fUlvycKT3NqdLykvJ_hpe2fqKEt-GKsG-GbNQXLJgiDMwZgHyvbTw4WZZgyLyaPtse-r-O-P5psic4xKiVYv1bXkTatFqgawdZHLitryWqUgKkgRWuvdIJoez9g/3ha/6_8yyHMbT0eF3KAYZljtfw/h0/K7Nt0Rit_NDqkLr6gO16pE_6cR6htvs-9YsOk1qR_ms)** The Southern Maryland Food Bank provides food to 35 different pantries across the tri-county area. **We’ll go even further.** If you email a receipt of your contribution to the SOMD Food Bank to info@mckaylawilkes.com before November 29, 2021, along with your shirt size and address – we'll send you a Mckayla '22 shirt (while supplies last.) **[_Can you make a $50 contribution right now to feed 25 people in our community?_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P0hu3qC7oygiW418nt5xKraOQhJC69lxtWwSw0t9BcqrrzW-Kr7QlygOYNUD7GdRYmF40zkURvP4ybW8IT36uWErYG3hJKkGhArAwsgWbO3rEGgr09P44kMVrMsW5c3uub8LR5UlN3xdvuKM6BnMBLKuw8bPeSKoSAw5V4ulMLeSGsSzFgWOUk8AnjXYhm1IuBOvg2Ea5sMAwKi4xamu3gLqIYp0tjNaGQbL-PEDFMvbsI8AUTwalm0zErlDGjwlqLxJCTqbFwxytKO8Lxq3dRPTSnZgpqtbA6e5ILOSh-PaUDJeLeXxPiW76naencDhWbD5FzTgq8zgOO8Vvtwnj2Ydu5Im7CpjxE3T6TZpd4iF54kV5mxuotj_B7MQ3ue8/3ha/6_8yyHMbT0eF3KAYZljtfw/h1/fytZCHvJIETqdIv_8QmyVv8ssBj2mSxVYBxF1krHpXA)** Thank you for being a part of our community — and for supporting others along the way. But we’re not letting that happen this year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = In the last two months alone, Scott Perry was happy to vote against both the bipartisan infrastructure bill and Build Back Better plan, two of the most transformational economic programs in a generation—denying his own constituents and millions of fellow Pennsylvanians jobs and economic opportunities. Why? Because the values of bipartisanship, fighting for the best interests of Pennislavnians, and building a better future for our communities are lost on him. And has been for the last 9 years he’s been in office. = Thank you, Team Eugene ** | | Eugene DePasquale has dedicated his public service to tirelessly fighting for working people, our senior citizens, and our most vulnerable. Will you pitch in any amount to help us elect a real leader to represent PA-10? = ** PAID FOR BY DEPASQUALE FOR PA-10 Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. Box 1822 York, PA 17405 United States We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, please .

Peter,

We need our kids to be taught how to succeed in life, NOT how their skin color defines them above their own name.

And Merrick Garland making the call to have the FBI investigate parents who are concerned by Critical Race Theory and ridiculous mandates imposed on their children is _**nothing short of a radical power grab.**_

This insanity needs to stop, and I will take this fight straight to Washington D.C. as your next Congressman. See my thoughts on CRT here:

clean_body: | | | | Let’s save our kids from a failed curriculum Peter, We need our kids to be taught how to succeed in life, NOT how their skin color defines them above their own name. And Merrick Garland making the call to have the FBI investigate parents who are concerned by Critical Race Theory and ridiculous mandates imposed on their children is nothing short of a radical power grab. This insanity needs to stop, and I will take this fight straight to Washington D.C. as your next Congressman. See my thoughts on CRT here: I will strike back against those that want to teach our children how to hate themselves or one another for their skin color. Please give your support to my campaign today and help our movement in standing up against federal overreach and saving our kids from being damaged by this CRT nonsense. | | | | | | Parents should ALWAYS have a say as to what is taught to their own children. **Listen up, friend!**
Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.
So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in 2022 – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes).
That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. Especially when up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multi-million-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $55,000 before her midnight deadline tonight, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **
**[Will you rush $5 or more now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38978191/317888193/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1780-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmJhYzE0Zi04MzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=977598vVX7Trx2Pa8-gZJ498mSbR6cCxef6wqhMl0nQ=)**
From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it.
Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony Rubio.
That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. **But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be.**
**So if you truly want Val Demings in the Senate, if you truly want to flip Florida blue and oust Marco Rubio, then I need you to give, because she can't cede any ground:[Make a contribution of $5 or more now – every dollar you can spare before the midnight deadline – to elect Val Demings and defend Democrats' Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38978192/317888194/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1780-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmJhYzE0Zi04MzRkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=977598vVX7Trx2Pa8-gZJ498mSbR6cCxef6wqhMl0nQ=)**

name: LAST CHANCE (via DCCC)
subject: we’ve got your back:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Get the DCCC's FREE Guide to Thanksgiving with your Republican Relatives! >>
| | | **Thanksgiving is TOMORROW -- but we noticed you haven 't had a chance to claim our Thanksgiving Guide for your Republican relatives yet.

We know all our grassroots Democrats deserve to be armed with the REAL facts before the holidays.

This is your last chance to claim your guide before midnight so you're prepared for the holidays!** | [Get the DCCC's FREE Guide to Thanksgiving with your Republican Relatives! >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thanksgiving can be AMAZING.

But even we know it can be a recipe for DISASTER when your pro-Trump uncle takes the seat right next to you at the dinner table. _**NO!!**_

With everything our grassroots Democrats -- like you \-- do for us, we knew we had to give you the proper ingredients to deal with conversations about politics that are tougher to master than cooking a turkey!

[**That 's why we put together a FREE guide to Thanksgiving with your Republican relatives -- so you're prepared for every ABSURD comment they have. (Just like the one from Uncle Dave below!). >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_-_)

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/4E6Vs3E3k6S~)

Grassroots Democrats like you always have our backs.

And we know we need to have yours, too.

So before you head into the fray, check out our [**Talk Turkey Recipe for Thanksgiving with your Republican relatives.**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-YTZEZ0_)

Make sure you're prepared when your Trumper relatives decide to stir the pot -- because burning bridges is (almost) as bad as burning the rolls.

[Click here, sign up, and we'll email you our printable PDF for FREE >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_)

Happy Thanksgiving (and good luck)!

DCCC

name: Salud Carbajal
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress |
body:
As our nation prepares to enjoy a day of giving thanks, I would like to share a few of the things I am most grateful for.

First and foremost, I am thankful for my strong and loving family.

I am also thankful that our country has made progress in our battle against COVID-19, and that those who are fully vaccinated are once again able to celebrate this holiday safely in-person with their loved ones.

And finally I am thankful to you, for your continued support and trust, and having the opportunity to represent you in our nation’s capital.

Best wishes for a Happy Thanksgiving.

Sincerely,

Salud Carbajal

-------------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress |
-------------------------------------------------

Salud Carbajal for Congress
P.O. Box 1290
Santa Barbara CA 93102 United States

name: Rabine Press
subject: STATEMENT: Pritzker yet again signs another partisan sham map into law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rabine for Governor
body:
| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=press_release&n=1)
---
## Gary Rabine, a candidate for Governor, is issuing the following statement on the Governor signing the Congressional map into law.
“The congressional map is nothing but a partisan sham and JB Pritzker lied to Illinois voters when he said he would not support a gerrymandered Congressional map. JB Pritzker will always put his political party ahead of the interests of Illinois citizens and he simply can't be trusted. It’s time for new leadership in Illinois.” | [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2FdvgCsR9_jQ8abFi8T5Pk8k_OrMSVTTyo3l8QalTMQow&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=press_release&n=2 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2FdvgCsR9_jQ8abFi8T5Pk8k_OrMSVTTyo3l8QalTMQow&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=press_release&n=2)

name: Sarah

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hi -- It's Sarah again.
Should I be worried? I have not received a reply from you. This is my _THIRD_ time reaching out.
We just need a couple more replies. [**Please, respond now and then I promise to stop flooding your inbox.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58869459:JgszyO2Nu:m:1:3253819041:9C96646DD2CCA13C5340B76F661922D9:r)

From: Sarah
Subject: Hi, you weren't responding so I thought I'd check in one more time_

Hi again,
I wasn't planning on doing this but I'm really hoping you'll respond if I try one last time...
**Nearly everyone on this list said they 're on Trump's team, not with the Liberals.** Now I have the task of contacting the last remaining hold outs -- _including you._
[**I was able to extend your deadline to respond for just 10 more minutes. Can you take a moment to answer?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58869459:JgszyO2Nu:m:1:3253819041:9C96646DD2CCA13C5340B76F661922D9:r)
_\-- Sarah_

_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58869459:JgszyO2Nu:m:1:3253819041:9C96646DD2CCA13C5340B76F661922D9:r)
From: Sarah
Subject: quickquestion for you_
Hey there,
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58869459:JgszyO2Nu:m:1:3253819041:9C96646DD2CCA13C5340B76F661922D9:r)**
**[No. I Don 't Support Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58869459:JgszyO2Nu:m:1:3253819041:9C96646DD2CCA13C5340B76F661922D9:r)**
President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots. **
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58869459:JgszyO2Nu:m:1:3253819041:9C96646DD2CCA13C5340B76F661922D9:r)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah
