name: Rabine for Governor
subject: Thanksgiving Newsletter
body:
Happy Thanksgiving from our family to yours!!

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_24_thanksgiving_newsletter&n=1) | |
---|---|---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_24_thanksgiving_newsletter&n=2) Dear Peter -- Happy Thanksgiving! There is no doubt we, as Illinoisans, have a lot to be concerned about right now. Our state of Illinois today is not the state it was even a short time ago. Inflation and high taxes are crushing working families in Illinois. The woke mob has taken over corporations, academia, and government institutions. Politicians like JB Pritzker choose their special interest friends over the hard-working people of our state they are supposed to represent. And Pritzker continues to wage war against families with his radical policies. Despite all of this, we have much to be thankful for - our friends and families. We are so blessed to live in the greatest country on Earth and protected by United States Constitution. This Thanksgiving, I urge you to focus on what is truly important. Thank God, the giver of all good things, for what He has done for you. Put politics aside and rejoice in the Lord. “Rejoice always, pray continually, give thanks in all circumstances; for this is God's will for you in Christ Jesus.” - 1 Thessalonians 5:16-18. From my family to yours, have a happy and safe Thanksgiving! Best Regards, Gary Rabine **Will you join our growing movement to defeat JB Pritzker?****** Join Team Rabine to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker and help turn our state around! | [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_24_thanksgiving_newsletter&n=3 "Join Team Rabine") [Join Team Rabine](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_24_thanksgiving_newsletter&n=3)
---
* * *
### Project Hood 100 Day Camp-out Against Gun Violence (11/27)
Pastor Corey Brooks will mark the tenth anniversary of Project H.O.O.D. with a 100 Day Camp-out in protest of gun violence.
Pastor Brooks is raising funds to build a community center to expand Project H.O.O.D.’s services. Gary Rabine amongst CEOs, leaders, community stakeholders, and celebrities will join Pastor Brooks as they commit to spending at least one night on the roof.
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=PZU23hx_LbfyyAY8PsDc1LZQczIB-CXto5lhTl6HOwR95-rjqWvwbiuQyd-4aqr-&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_24_thanksgiving_newsletter&n=4 "Event Details Here") [Event Details Here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=PZU23hx_LbfyyAY8PsDc1LZQczIB-CXto5lhTl6HOwR95-rjqWvwbiuQyd-4aqr-&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_24_thanksgiving_newsletter&n=4)

Join us for a fun night with like-minded people to hear about improvements for the future of our great state of Illinois!

Please bring your unwrapped gift to the event and a representative from St. Joseph Carmelite will pick up all of the gifts and donations from Galleria Marchetti on December 3rd.

---
### Rittenhouse Found Not Guilty
Governor JB Pritzker sent out a statement calling the ruling in the Kyle Rittenhouse case a “tragedy.”
His remarks are reckless and irresponsible. Our Governor swore an oath to uphold the Constitution, which provides for the right of self-defense. Governor Pritzker was not a juror in this trial. He has no business pronouncing judgment on the outcome of this case. His comments are especially odious given his complete silence and inaction when it comes to stopping the violence we see on a regular basis in Chicago.
Kyle Rittenhouse is a resident of this state. He has the right to defend himself just like any other resident of Illinois. Kyle Rittenhouse deserves better than Pritzker’s complete disregard of the Constitution.
JB Pritzker seems to think anyone who might disagree with him politically is not deserving of the rights guaranteed to us in our Constitution. The kind of world Pritzker wants should frighten us all. Everyone, regardless of their race, creed, gender, or age, deserves to have their Constitutional rights protected. To undermine those rights is simply irresponsible and not becoming of the leader our state.
### Illinois Gets Low Marks for Financial Transparency
Illinois ranks as one of the worst states in the country for transparency of financial reporting, according to a new report from Truth in Accounting.
Illinois has a meager Financial Transparency Score of 56 out of 100. Only four other states had a lower score. The report analyzes financial reports available in statehouses throughout the country and compares them to best practices in the private sector.
One of the main issues with Illinois’ finances is the lack of accountability and transparency which is intentional. If the people of Illinois knew how bad the state’s finances really were, they would demand our leaders address the problems. Because the career politicians running our state want to avoid taking responsibility for their reckless spending, they prefer to make it as difficult as possible for the average citizen to understand the truth about our finances.
As Governor, I will make this information accessible because I want the people of this state to not only be informed but to also get engaged in helping to turn our state around.
* * *

From my family to yours, have a happy and safe Thanksgiving! Best Regards, Gary Rabine Will you join our growing movement to defeat JB Pritzker?** Join Team Rabine to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker and help turn our state around! | "Join Team Rabine" Project Hood 100 Day Camp-out Against Gun Violence (11/27) Pastor Corey Brooks will mark the tenth anniversary of Project H.O.O.D. with a 100 Day Camp-out in protest of gun violence. Pastor Brooks is raising funds to build a community center to expand Project H.O.O.D.’s services. Gary Rabine amongst CEOs, leaders, community stakeholders, and celebrities will join Pastor Brooks as they commit to spending at least one night on the roof. "Event Details Here" Meet Gary Rabine- Rock Bottom Restaurant & Brewery (11/30) Join us for a fun night with like-minded people to hear about improvements for the future of our great state of Illinois! "Event Details Here" An Evening with the Candidates (12/1) Don't miss your opportunity to meet these Republican gubernatorial and senatorial candidates all in one place! WEDNESDAY, December 1st Carmon's: 804 N. Neil St, Champaign, IL 61820 "Event Details Here" Chicago Minority Suppler Development Council Holiday Brunch & Annual Toy Drive to benefit St. Joseph Carmelite (12/3) Chicago MSDC is holding its Annual Meeting and Holiday Brunch on Friday December 3rd at 10am at Galleria Marchetti. Please bring your unwrapped gift to the event and a representative from St. Joseph Carmelite will pick up all of the gifts and donations from Galleria Marchetti on December 3rd. "Event Details Here" Knoxville County Meet & Greet (12/7) Join Gary, friends, family, and neighbors in Knoxville County to discuss the future of Illinois and learn more about the campaign! TUESDAY, December 7th Big Catz BBQ! 221 East Main St., Knoxville, IL 61448 5:00PM "Event Details Here" Rock Island Meet & Greet (12/8) Join Gary, friends, family, and neighbors in Rock Island to discuss the future of Illinois and learn more about the campaign! WEDNESDAY, December 8th Welcome Inn Restaurant 118\. 10th Ave. West, Milan, IL 61264 9:15AM "Event Details Here" Cordova, IL Meet & Greet (12/8) Join Gary, friends, family, and neighbors in Cordova to discuss the future of Illinois and learn more about the campaign! WEDNESDAY, December 8th Cordova Township Civic Center 3rd Ave. South, Cordova, IL 61243 6:30PM "Event Details Here" Rittenhouse Found Not Guilty Governor JB Pritzker sent out a statement calling the ruling in the Kyle Rittenhouse case a “tragedy.” His remarks are reckless and irresponsible. Our Governor swore an oath to uphold the Constitution, which provides for the right of self-defense. Governor Pritzker was not a juror in this trial. He has no business pronouncing judgment on the outcome of this case. His comments are especially odious given his complete silence and inaction when it comes to stopping the violence we see on a regular basis in Chicago. Kyle Rittenhouse is a resident of this state. He has the right to defend himself just like any other resident of Illinois. Kyle Rittenhouse deserves better than Pritzker’s complete disregard of the Constitution. JB Pritzker seems to think anyone who might disagree with him politically is not deserving of the rights guaranteed to us in our Constitution. The kind of world Pritzker wants should frighten us all. Everyone, regardless of their race, creed, gender, or age, deserves to have their Constitutional rights protected. To undermine those rights is simply irresponsible and not becoming of the leader our state. Illinois Gets Low Marks for Financial Transparency Illinois ranks as one of the worst states in the country for transparency of financial reporting, according to a new report from Truth in Accounting. Illinois has a meager Financial Transparency Score of 56 out of 100. Only four other states had a lower score. The report analyzes financial reports available in statehouses throughout the country and compares them to best practices in the private sector. One of the main issues with Illinois’ finances is the lack of accountability and transparency which is intentional. If the people of Illinois knew how bad the state’s finances really were, they would demand our leaders address the problems. Because the career politicians running our state want to avoid taking responsibility for their reckless spending, they prefer to make it as difficult as possible for the average citizen to understand the truth about our finances. As Governor, I will make this information accessible because I want the people of this state to not only be informed but to also get engaged in helping to turn our state around. | Paid for by Rabine for Governor | PO Box 59183, Schaumburg, IL 60159 A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the Board’s official website (www.elections.il.gov) or for purchase from the State Board of Elections, Springfield, Illinois.

name: Derek Schmidt

body:
In case you missed my last email, I wanted to follow up with you once again. This week, the Kansas Legislature passed important protections against Friend, In case you missed my last email, I wanted to follow up with you once again. This week, the Kansas Legislature passed important protections against President Biden’s “jab or job” mandates while our lawsuits to stop them altogether remain pending. I commend the Legislature's work to honor medical freedom and religious freedom here in our great state. I believe that no Kansas family should have to risk losing their livelihood if they disagree with the President of the United States on a personal medical decision. **I trust YOU to make your own decisions for yourself and your children.**
[**Do you agree? Help me spread the word and continue fighting the Biden administration’s illegal mandates!**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=18b097d49d804039a5efbe4cae60c6a6&_e=-I13WFzMcEMjMppYTtxIBnLf0Fr6iaXe-3u6-_V9vdJW6SvgmA49IP-xLnvK8LE7GU6MSetddkf3aHfu-NdOXhf4CmJnzaYj72N4yZ6nM9Dwo3AxpZEsDvtPXvB8CT0XSOsk6ZciYTUMQZ0Qw-Pp_HpI5es4ucjB2ArGeaKIpaM3vxS7hT0emzo5bbRzgP4Yi1TVnj43OSduA4xQ7zhPjp_TZt9UUehKoyg0gUGpV06iRGlM6eBF6SmidEb0trsGaRMKLkLxH4iLU839miaOjFDDE0W1XALMBFDqd834lnzdeNoWa2Or8p7MGO2Cxg8E8N0xp4zbAyvV-rlajYrZu5oJ57LKfkOyAGGPjGK8FZsENLgoGbC2DMdkLbzdMD9NTj5SLEvXbSv3ywBDD_66oD34-lcFaLyvckoHhGKbcfWwxo9cDY6XWqv9mSkogfeIDnl4RX2zWct2WUS5ngiyK1F26BpJHPFqNMPlpCMYlA5y4sZKJ2x5Fqt5TWTxlHW4) [**STAND WITH DEREK**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=18b097d49d804039a5efbe4cae60c6a6&_e=-I13WFzMcEMjMppYTtxIBnLf0Fr6iaXe-3u6-_V9vdJW6SvgmA49IP-xLnvK8LE7GU6MSetddkf3aHfu-NdOXhf4CmJnzaYj72N4yZ6nM9Dwo3AxpZEsDvtPXvB8CT0XSOsk6ZciYTUMQZ0Qw-Pp_HpI5es4ucjB2ArGeaKIpaM3vxS7hT0emzo5bbRzgP4Yi1TVnj43OSduA4xQ7zhPjp_TZt9UUehKoyg0gUGpV06iRGlM6eBF6SmidEb0trsGaRMKLkLxH4iLU839miaOjFDDE0W1XALMBFDqd834lnzRQLwTFGx5sDphDFZ_jnqFILf4cZRCy8lmzJUZITUlI1SF8I6sycD8nF3_fqkhvCZeTRu2zDKufsbCGyuaY5f03PeBEAZmDbQeZk63XNWenkTX1FZQQTERMxXuO9eZegPG18wNyAAu_srruhPcUuX85C5slNNldBb0v0aT8Vz1hcqqi8ZEtMYEmbM7YVg0-L9pCf7b1ANLgJy5Sja_uLLE) I won’t back down until we are ALL free to make our own health care decisions regardless of whether President Biden and the federal government agree. After all, nothing in our Constitution grants any president this kind of power. **[Will you help me keep up the fight?](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=18b097d49d804039a5efbe4cae60c6a6&_e=-I13WFzMcEMjMppYTtxIBnLf0Fr6iaXe-3u6-_V9vdJW6SvgmA49IP-xLnvK8LE7GU6MSetddkf3aHfu-NdOXhf4CmJnzaYj72N4yZ6nM9Dwo3AxpZEsDvtPXvB8CT0XSOsk6ZciYTUMQZ0Qw-Pp_HpI5es4ucjB2ArGeaKIpaM3vxS7hT0emzo5bbRzgP4Yi1TVnj43OSduA4xQ7zhPjp_TZt9UUehKoyg0gUGpV06iRGlM6eBF6SmidEb0trsGaRMKLkLxH4iLU839miaOjFDDE0W1XALMBFDqd834lnxhm3pG0iq0G6ZGxkoQcBf58mE3M_b7zEhODwzGvz8-xNtGyhGjDUi-8mKu9X2AFsqW-A7H8f9pSC4i_NUSO-qq_O6iW_uc_HtaKIXSNjp403r8Ftfg2tvBlvtwemAiMtLy_Aoh4DeJNpN3dR21btEUahDdLUPAwwesOufBlASumsnO_Cb_0ct-oLMU9RZqchZ6Ti93vTBOTVdMc5DnnJgn)** –Derek Schmidt \-----forwarded message below----- Friend, As you probably know, the Kansas Legislature met yesterday for a special session to defend Kansans from President Biden’s far-reaching and unconstitutional vaccine mandates. I have opposed the Biden administration's illegal federal 'jab-or-job' mandates from the day he announced them. And that’s why I continue to fight in federal courts to invalidate these mandates entirely. The Legislature's actions yesterday are a welcome companion to our ongoing legal efforts. I commend Senate President Masterson, Speaker Ryckman and Republicans in the Legislature for their leadership and focused work in passing this bill strengthening protections for religious liberty and guarding Kansans’ jobs, **and if I were governor, I would sign it into law right away.** **[If you agree, I need you to join my team to continue the fight for medical freedom in our great state.](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=18b097d49d804039a5efbe4cae60c6a6&_e=-I13WFzMcEMjMppYTtxIBnLf0Fr6iaXe-3u6-_V9vdJW6SvgmA49IP-xLnvK8LE7GU6MSetddkf3aHfu-NdOXhf4CmJnzaYj72N4yZ6nM9Dwo3AxpZEsDvtPXvB8CT0XSOsk6ZciYTUMQZ0Qw-Pp_HpI5es4ucjB2ArGeaKIpaM3vxS7hT0emzo5bbRzgP4Yi1TVnj43OSduA4xQ7zhPjp_TZt9UUehKoyg0gUGpV06iRGlM6eBF6SmidEb0trsGaRMKLkLxH4iLU839miaOjFDDE0W1XALMBFDqd834lnzQrvZbl4f6XHis1snsmtNrVSBKyMEEqV-j3fQAekxGrlu1wch_Pm3ysExr-3Lf-5f7o3jCWTyE3ON0_WFabEeanTtLZY7ProvdIzMbZPCrv3-XOV13l-tBc5Bbuxyy3vA5UBimAEy1MOBiFTDPvCioVnC94EvSoAykKBDqGAwJ1BadP9VjA58Hap3OWrLpgaLsXYD_Tbm-mOan4gkaIe54)** [**STAND WITH DEREK**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=18b097d49d804039a5efbe4cae60c6a6&_e=-I13WFzMcEMjMppYTtxIBnLf0Fr6iaXe-3u6-_V9vdJW6SvgmA49IP-xLnvK8LE7GU6MSetddkf3aHfu-NdOXhf4CmJnzaYj72N4yZ6nM9Dwo3AxpZEsDvtPXvB8CT0XSOsk6ZciYTUMQZ0Qw-Pp_HpI5es4ucjB2ArGeaKIpaM3vxS7hT0emzo5bbRzgP4Yi1TVnj43OSduA4xQ7zhPjp_TZt9UUehKoyg0gUGpV06iRGlM6eBF6SmidEb0trsGaRMKLkLxH4iLU839miaOjFDDE0W1XALMBFDqd834lnyOdK90gXTD2EMYcFDC9gJ2oNpnEqiDvpGZJUHFIiKBupXCewOYLb1O5tqJsr_-njV3rkl_syWWoX3wyJjJVbNJcS7Q4RbT1bNFyNYVc3TVvq7EAVhug_qeYhyc_-5Yoz2b4s7kAdrxHaJJQ5FVvim7ivSNp52cy1jAHnT0BNJoOpDu-bgyX3Xrs26MWfArVTjEF5P0UKxrq3Anju-oRhHN) [**DONATE**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=18b097d49d804039a5efbe4cae60c6a6&_e=-I13WFzMcEMjMppYTtxIBnLf0Fr6iaXe-3u6-_V9vdJW6SvgmA49IP-xLnvK8LE7GU6MSetddkf3aHfu-NdOXhf4CmJnzaYj72N4yZ6nM9Dwo3AxpZEsDvtPXvB8CT0XSOsk6ZciYTUMQZ0Qw-Pp_HpI5es4ucjB2ArGeaKIpaM3vxS7hT0emzo5bbRzgP4Yi1TVnj43OSduA4xQ7zhPjp_TZt9UUehKoyg0gUGpV06iRGlM6eBF6SmidEb0trsGaRMKLkLxH4iLU839miaOjFDDE0W1XALMBFDqd834lnygIr7iHQESs7h4YDh9NzCu6pRoqv3qMm9b1-NckPx0O1qRVRjM9x5-4UXCUQ-1bySFdq6mnnoNyWS9LE6RawhflKTNTonkr7K1mpOhX_-vWWGnEV3BMAk9E7kTkUroWcFH5b9nHK75HU7GCdUBvzJmNxDcf7_WF5DR5HH1df86X9h2RrB89xs4g26HqjtMvOc33_bFf3A7fUTTKP8xcbeG) When I’m governor, I’ll fight every single day against the federal government’s attempts to micromanage our daily lives. **When I’m governor, I’ll defend your right to make your own decisions for yourself and for your children. ** The fight we are engaged in now is a very important one. We must push back against these harmful and unprecedented federal mandates, and more importantly, we must NEVER give up our freedom. [I hope you’ll stand with me by chipping in anything you can to help me spread the word and keep up the fight.](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=18b097d49d804039a5efbe4cae60c6a6&_e=-I13WFzMcEMjMppYTtxIBnLf0Fr6iaXe-3u6-_V9vdJW6SvgmA49IP-xLnvK8LE7GU6MSetddkf3aHfu-NdOXhf4CmJnzaYj72N4yZ6nM9Dwo3AxpZEsDvtPXvB8CT0XSOsk6ZciYTUMQZ0Qw-Pp_HpI5es4ucjB2ArGeaKIpaM3vxS7hT0emzo5bbRzgP4Yi1TVnj43OSduA4xQ7zhPjp_TZt9UUehKoyg0gUGpV06iRGlM6eBF6SmidEb0trsGaRMKLkLxH4iLU839miaOjFDDE0W1XALMBFDqd834lnwyJq19jowXyV6cAcGOmgW2ift4SClz_eExZ7WnOhp9A_OSkBvirQQ3kGLbceS_fzUbjXMOXgSGAduLgNgkDhV3J-spORiZ8d_zlO0RInqXtmBbV2uUguRp9LZpz2RbGLIQISBfOdzHWdQoRby4TSegfh6sda5SB74M0n8RzINsG6Igr4syW8hHZdI-zZP3c43j01PYmKzZdf-DhRYIyXCm) –Derek Schmidt | |

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | After four dark years, they have finally restored dignity and leadership back to the White House. So we’re sending them a card to let them know how thankful Democrats in Pennsylvania are for them. We need to make sure the card gets to the White House before the Bidens dig into their turkey tomorrow night, so make sure to sign your name by 10 PM tonight! They’ll love to see your name, \--Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Patrick Witt for Congress
subject: What I’m thankful for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Patrick Witt for Congress](http://links
body:
[](http://links.patrickwitt.com/u/click?_t=c6f93fbae9f248579219163f37a7b6fe&_m=2202a03c2b304366b258b065ff3335d0&_e=544xuGQNwo93UmoqyX_6ODnSB-lR9friRBtWZEw8KARoveBlDzyQ1XyRg_jRdbvBJl12MXwWEHGV1ExVEBWo5pRCFNLiGq0SnwwHCfKZ8rSLe-VLNiSb1bR37MRpNXTUuhnfRoQYZ4aNJ7uh_wXC4MFK97qWetm3CFhw1-93Y1qsJr6DAm0t7YhAvhAnt9WQw7n1CzO2bmAhv5cXjjkxAUBwGGo2_vB5vodbL2faotegTWyngZubndV2RfWr3T1pSQdkuZzA5RAW9XFz_EEDBrFN7eTQ6kUpmo18HkSwuLYswaV3WZrNpbeaQF7ugUvFULj6nnkQLookBEOL439DZF98TJqe98czh6kY3oIGwnVda2EffhPU1DiQM74gBtDlqB8eaqq8To-5Tp1yvnKp6VSa6eFepVk9BZVgDUwcqxx9FOmbTLrwBC7ta8RVHejh) Dear Peter, Thanksgiving is a day to celebrate with family and give thanks for our blessings. So today, I want to express my gratitude to you. **With your support, our grassroots movement has taken Georgia by storm.** In a little over four months, our campaign has raised over $350,000 and has attracted conservatives all across Georgia who are sick and tired of watching the Left destroy our country and our national traditions. If you’re able, I would appreciate your financial support as we approach our end-of-month deadline. Of course, I understand if you can’t, but please step up if you can. name: Congressman John Garamendi
subject: Reconnecting
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Garamendi for Congress** |
body:
It has been a while since we connected. I hope this finds you and your loved ones healthy and well.
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---

| | | | | | | |
---

|
---
Dear Friend, It has been a while since we connected. I hope this finds you and your loved ones healthy and well. Here’s an inside look on what we are doing to address western wildfires, put an end to the new nuclear arms race that has the potential to devastate our world, and fight the global climate crisis. In my 11th year in Congress, I’ve:
* Introduced legislation to conduct proper forest management and unlock new federal resources to help California fight and prevent wildfires;
* Continued my work as a senior member of the House Armed Services Committee to try to put an end to the trillion dollar nuclear arms race that could destroy our planet, and;
* Passed legislation that would require the U.S. military--the largest institutional consumer of oil in the world--to cut its emissions and be an ally in the fight against the climate crisis.

Without your tremendous support and partnership over the years none of this would be possible. I want you to know how much I appreciate your support, and I hope we can continue to work together for years to come. We have accomplished so much, and we have more work to do to rebuild the middle class, lower healthcare costs, protect our climate, expand access to an affordable education, and much more. Thank you for everything you do. I will continue to pass along updates on my work and hope to hear from you soon as well. Sincerely,
|
---
|
---
Congressman John Garamendi

|
---

clean_body: It has been a while since we connected. I hope this finds you and your loved ones healthy and well. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Friend, It has been a while since we connected. I hope this finds you and your loved ones healthy and well. Here’s an inside look on what we are doing to address western wildfires, put an end to the new nuclear arms race that has the potential to devastate our world, and fight the global climate crisis. In my 11th year in Congress, I’ve: Introduced legislation to conduct proper forest management and unlock new federal resources to help California fight and prevent wildfires; Continued my work as a senior member of the House Armed Services Committee to try to put an end to the trillion dollar nuclear arms race that could destroy our planet, and; Passed legislation that would require the U.S. military--the largest institutional consumer of oil in the world--to cut its emissions and be an ally in the fight against the climate crisis. Without your tremendous support and partnership over the years none of this would be possible. I want you to know how much I appreciate your support, and I hope we can continue to work together for years to come. We have accomplished so much, and we have more work to do to rebuild the middle class, lower healthcare costs, protect our climate, expand access to an affordable education, and much more. Thank you for everything you do. I will continue to pass along updates on my work and hope to hear from you soon as well. Sincerely, | | Congressman John Garamendi | | Your support means the world to me. If you 'd like to continue supporting me, please consider contributing today. | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|--- | | | | ---|--- | | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | | ---|--- | | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for and Authorized by Garamendi for Congress** | | | | | | PO Box 440, Walnut Grove, CA 95690 |

Just hours after the Rittenhouse verdict, the chairman of the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee, Sean Patrick Maloney, released this statement:

**_"It is disgusting and disturbing that someone was able to carry a loaded assault rifle into a protest against the unjust killing of Jacob Blake, an unarmed Black man."_**

Savor that for a minute.

That’s from the head of the Democratic Party’s congressional campaign arm. Everything about it is wrong...**not just a lie, but factually wrong.**

Maloney is lying and exploiting tragic events to divide the nation further. He is desperate and knows his time is short. Facts don’t matter to Maloney...that’s why our team is working day and night to WIN in 2022.

The midterm elections are less than a year away, and they will decide the future of President Biden's ENTIRE agenda -- from reproductive and voting rights to health care and economic justice.

That's why this is DEEPLY concerning: A new poll of registered voters shows **Republicans are TEN POINTS more likely than Democrats to say they're certain to vote in 2022!**

Democrats like you helped bring Joe Biden to the White House and kick Mitch McConnell out of power -- _so how could ANY Democrat be uncertain when we’ve seen the true power of every single vote?_

**We need to know ASAP how many Democrats will stand with President Biden and vote next year** \-- and records show we haven't heard from you:

| Supporter: **DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM**
---

Deadline: **TONIGHT**
Planning to Vote in 2022: **UNKNOWN**

With our Senate majority hanging on by just one seat, we can’t take anything for granted. **Please confirm your response before our live poll expires at 11:59 P.M.:**

** WILL YOU VOTE IN THE 2022 MIDTERMS?**

The current system of top-down one-party rule has led to high taxes, record-high inflation, widespread shortages of goods, and burdensome regulations. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ade3bf97c603/urgent-deadline-approaching-13485821?e=146fae137d)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

**Make no mistake about it, the results of this year's election are proof that New Jerseyans are hungry for change.**

The current system of top-down one-party rule has led to **high taxes** , **record-high inflation** , **widespread shortages of goods** , and **burdensome regulations that infringe on our individual rights**.

This is what happens when you give the out-of-touch Trenton and Washington political class too much power!

**It’s time we started to put people before politics!**
---
|
---
| [PUT PEOPLE BEFORE POLITICS](https://rikfornj.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a092c3ebea780d48d4377bed&id=4ec351e9d3&e=146fae137d "PUT PEOPLE BEFORE POLITICS")
---
| I’m a parent, I’m an entrepreneur, and I’m fed up with an out-of-control government, high taxes, rising inflation, supply shortages, and less freedom.

**Peter, the next election won’t be a blue or red wave.** It’ll be a blue-collar wave, made possible by hard-working blue-collar Americans just like you who are tired of the status quo and one-party rule.

I’m running for Congress to take on the failed agenda of Phil Murphy, Joe Biden, and Nancy Pelosi. **Can I count on you to join me in this fight?**

[**Chip in $25, $50, $100, $250, or more today to show those out-of-touch politicians that this campaign is powered by the people!**](https://rikfornj.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a092c3ebea780d48d4377bed&id=370dc253a2&e=146fae137d)

**Don’t let me down, Peter! I’m counting on you! **

Yours,

Rik Mehta
